ayam aum namaḥ gaṇapataye nārāyaṇa priyaiḥ puṣpaiḥ anyaiḥ ca api sugandhibhiḥ pūjā upakaraṇam vastram sarvam lakṣa guṇam bhavet lauhitya dakṣiṇe tīre liṅga rūpaḥ vināyakaḥ hara gaurī samādeśāt devānām sam matena ca sthitaḥ loka praśām tyartham sarva vighna vināśanāt pūjayitvā atutam devam śaktitaḥ dravya sam cayaiḥ vināyaka tvam āpnoti veda śāstra artha pāragaḥ sakṛt pradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvā dṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā atumānavaḥ sam sargiṇām ca mlechānām gatyartham su tapasvinām putra artham sarva lokānām tatra śam bhuḥ vināyakaḥ kṛtvā abhiṣekam lauhitye spṛśet yaḥ tu gaṇādhipam sapta janma kṛtāt pāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ pūjayitvā atu gaṇapam vinaśyati tatra devāḥ ca su prītāḥ brahma viṣṇu hara ādayaḥ atha asuraiḥ mahā vīryaiḥ hiraṇyākṣa mukhaiḥ aṇe maghavā tujitaḥ vīryāt hiraṇyākṣeṇa vā etadā tatas surāḥ ca nirvīryāya yāvat varṣa śatam purā ca parājayaḥ heram pūjayāte parā siddhiḥ deva ādīnām bhavatu iti mahā makhena yuṣmābhiḥ pūjā gaṇapateḥ kṛtā helayāna kṛta āmohāt tasmāt prāptaḥ parājayaḥ śīghraṅgat śata vaipuṇya aṅgaṇapasya mahātmanaḥ bhaviṣyati prahṛṣṭa avibudhāḥ devāḥ ūcuḥ svarga bhoga prada prītyā aheram natāḥsmaha mahā māyam mahā kāyam heram natāḥsmaha ekadam tam mahā prājṣam lam batuṇḍam vināyakam devam mahā ṛṣi devānām mā indrasya canatāḥsmaha yat tepuḥ arcanam yajṣena kṛtam tat kṣama svanaḥ surāṇām ca giraḥ śrutvā gaṇapaḥ uvākyam abravīt yuṣmābhiḥ vriyatām chitaḥ tatas śakra ādayaḥ sarve bṛhaspati purogamāḥ ūcuḥ gaṇapatim deva ājayaḥ usmākam bhavatu iti devānām vacanam śrutvā gaṇeśaḥ vākyam abravīt bāḍham eva suraśreṣṭha jaya uvaḥ bhavatu drutam tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve harṣa nirbhara mānasāḥ gaṇeśam pūjayāmāsuḥ gandha sāraiḥ tu maṇḍanaiḥ vām cchitam pītām baram namaskṛtya ūcuḥ deva gaṇāḥ mudā hara ātmajam tu samprāpya pūjayitvā gaṇādhipam āgatāḥ tvad sakāśam vai mahātman nadyakeśava etat śrutvā ātudevānām vacanam hariḥ avyayaḥ śrutvā vāc amṛtam deva anārāyaṇa mukhāt cyutam hṛṣṭāḥ ca su mudā āviṣṭā dravyaiḥ iṣṭaiḥ samarcayan punar viṣṇuḥ uvāca idam devān indra purogamān svam svam balam samāhṛtya sajjībhava ta vijvarāḥ hariṣyetān durācārān balam ca eva samam tatas astra vṛndam ṣṭhata nirbhayāḥ mādhavasya vacaḥ śrutvā pragatāḥ sura puṅgavāḥ vimānāni samāruhya sarve divya astra dhāriṇaḥ devānām harṣa vākyāni daitya cāraiḥ śrutāni vai rājānam kathayāmāsuḥ hiraṇyākṣam mahā balam adhunā indra ādi devāḥ ca nikhilāḥ krūra buddhayaḥ katham jayam ca lapsyāmaḥ daitya vṛnda iti dāruṇe tripurāriḥ uvāca idam gaṇeśam yajata amarāḥ pūjayitvā atutam devam jeṣyatha asura dānavān tatas deva gaṇaiḥ hṛṣṭaiḥ pūjitaḥ gaṇanāyakaḥ gaṇādhipena tuṣṭena krūraḥ dattaḥ varaḥ mahā n jeṣyatha adya asurān sarvān hareḥ bāḍham upaśrutya rathinaḥ śastra pāṇayaḥ vadatu alam tatas rājṣaḥ vacaḥ śrutvā madhuḥ vacanam abravīt rājan sahāyam meni yojaya jite nārāyaṇe devāḥ sa bhayāḥ tridaśa adhruvam tasmāt nārāyaṇaḥ asmākam bhāgaḥ sarva puram jayaḥ tatas dhum dhuḥ ca sum daḥ ca kālakeyaḥ mahā balaḥ sahāyaḥ ca madhoḥ tasya jeṣyāmaḥ mādhavam nṛpa sarva daitya balemukhyāḥ ca tvāraḥ dṛḍha vikramāḥ kāla mṛtyu samā vīrāḥ sarva astra vidhi pāragāḥ tam ca jeṣyāmi jiṣṇum nṛpa ūcatuḥ tau nṛpam hi āvām jeṣyāvaḥ u vai balāt balau jeṣyāmi na atrasam tripuraḥ ca abravīt vākyam jeṣyāmi ca vināyakam tāvat ūce atha senānīḥ mayaḥ devām takaḥ balī kuberam pratirakṣobhiḥ sarvān ca eva hiraṇyakān gatvā uvāca hiraṇyākṣam jiṣṇu dūtaḥ ūham āgataḥ rājyam tyajasva avācā anaḥprāṇeṣu yat ita ihitam tatas kopāt uvāca idam nāradam muni sattamam ahim syaḥ tvam brāhmāṇa adya agacchat ūrṇam mama agratas devānām cavipattim cakadanam nidhanam puras tam prāptam hari hara ādikam sajjīkṛtya balam sarvān rathān śca ānayata drutam daitya rāja vacaḥ śrutvā balādhyakṣaḥ samam tatas balāni āhūya sahasā āsam trastāḥ tūrṇam āgatāḥ koṭi koṭi sahasrāṇi akṣauhiṇyaḥ balāni ca danāni vicitra aṇi gaja uṣṭra aśva kharān api ca samāruhya yayuḥ tadā vādyaiḥ sarvaiḥ ca bhūyiṣṭhaiḥ siṃ ha nādaiḥ bhayānakaiḥ diśaḥ tupūrayāmāsuḥ iḥ sandhu velā acala adharāḥ sarva lokāḥ ca vitresuḥ samudrāḥ ca cakam pire deva duṃ du bhayaḥ neduḥ sarva devaiḥ samīritāḥ tīvram mahā havam parighaiḥ pāśa śūlaiḥ ca khaḍga yaṣṭi paraśvadhaiḥ śastra astraiḥ bahudhā muktaiḥ diśaḥ sarvāni raṃ taram vigṛheṣu dharaṇyām ca parvateṣu jaleṣu ca devasthāne tathā ākāśe parvata agreṣu sānuṣu puṣkala ādi ghanānām ca varṣa dhārā jalam yathā śata śotha sahasraśas kecid petuḥ pṛthivyām tu śaraiḥ sambhinna vigrahāḥ śaktibhiḥ musalaiḥ ca anye chatra śūla paraśvadhaiḥ patitāḥsam mukheśūra ayuddheṣu nyāya vartinaḥ ye ca anye kātarāḥ pāpa aham tāraḥ vimukhān raṇe tridiva sthāḥ gaja ārohāḥ saindhava sthāḥ tathā aparān ratha sthām ca ratha ārohāḥ pada gām ca padātayaḥ parasparam vinighnanti śūra ayuddha abhikāṅkṣiṇaḥ muditāḥ satva sampanna adharmiṣṭha abalasam vṛtāḥ keṣām cit vāhavaiḥ channā musalaiḥ bhinna mastakāḥ keśāḥ śirām si vastrāṇi nipetuḥ dharaṇī tale madhya chinnāḥ tathā abhinnāḥ petuḥ urvyām mahā balāḥ khaḍga pātaiḥ tathā ca ugraiḥ śranna bhinnāḥ paraśvadhaiḥ gām eva patita adhīra adivya alaṅkāra bhūṣitāḥ nāgaiḥ hayaiḥ vividha ābharaṇaiḥ naṣṭaiḥ patākābhiḥ ca ketubhiḥ tatovasum dharā sarvāsa śaila vana kānanā lohitam pracuram pītam rakṣobhiḥ ca vṛka ādibhiḥ khāditam prītimadbhiḥ ca pheru gṛdhra gaṇaiḥ mudā mṛtasam jīvanī vidyām surāṇām sam jajāpaha viśalya karaṇīm divyām brahma vidyām mahā balām tatra devāḥ ca jīvanti yemṛtāḥ ca mahā have avraṇa abala sampannāḥprayudhyanti bhṛśam punar tatas siddha cāraṇāḥ ṛṣayaḥ khecarāḥ ca anye ye ca eva apsarasā aṅgaṇāḥ gītiṅgāyanti gandharvāḥ śaśam suḥ parama ṛṣayaḥ jaghāna sura saṅghām stād nartayāmāsa bhū tale tara śara ogheṇa chāditam gaganam tadā nipatanti śarāḥ sainye koṭi koṭi sahasraśas viśikhaiḥ pīḍitāḥ devāni petuḥ dharaṇī tale petuḥ urvyām mahā vīryāya iraṇesura puṅgavāḥ śaraiḥ pravyathitāḥ tetuḥ sthātum śakta ānasam mukhe na śekuḥ samare sthātum maghavam tam yayuḥ tadā citraratha aitikhyātaḥ devaḥ śastrabhṛtām varaḥ yathā ahaṃsi mahā śūra sura senām mudā anvitaḥ satvam praśam sanīyaḥ ca mataḥ hiraṇyākṣa priyaṅkarma kṛtam yuddhetvayā adhunā idānīm mama bāṇaiḥ ca gacchasva yamamam diram idānīm yuddhe balam sarvam tuhelayā ebhiḥ tvām niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ nayām iyam amam diram punarbāṇān ca samare yojayitvā adrutam ruṣā jaghāna pracurān daityām stām ś ca karttasa lāghavāt tatas nyonyam śaraiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ kāla anala sama prabhaiḥ yuddhe dhanuṣmatām śreṣṭhaḥ ciccheda bhuvi vegataḥ draṣṭu kāma āgatāḥ pārśvam ṛṣi devāḥ sura uragāḥ evam śata sahasrāṇi bāṇānām vidhṛtāni ca atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejā gandharvāṇām patiḥ tadā tribhiḥ bibheda bāṇaiḥ ca lalāṭe hṛdi paṣcabhiḥ śaraiḥ sampātitaḥ daityaḥ mugdhaḥ kaśmala tā aṅgataḥ śithilīkṛta cāpaḥ ca lebhesam jṣām cirāt balī tatobāṇa sahasraiḥ tukālām taka sama prabhaiḥ bibheda daityasim ham tusurāṇām uttamaḥ balī hata cetāḥ sa daitya indraḥ bahu śoṇita sam sravaḥ vihvalaḥ bahu bāṇa ārtaḥ śūlam jagrāha dānavaḥ hatvā ācapātayāmāsa tribhiḥ yam tāram eva ca jaghāna śūlam urvīṣṭhaḥ tatas dharva sattamam vicakartta tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥśūlam citrarathaḥ balī śūlam ca naṣṭakam dṛṣṭvā hata bhogam iva uragam gṛhītvā a mudga raṅghoram pradudrāva suram balī sa mudgaram samāyātam daitya senā adhipam tadā sapapāta mahī pṛṣṭhe isam cacāla vasum dharā iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe kālakeyavadhaḥ nāma paṣcaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca bhrātaram nihatam dṛṣṭvā kāleyaḥ nāma dānavaḥ citraratham pradudrāva dhṛtvā bāṇam sa kārmukam dṛṣṭvā suram vidhāvam taṅkāla mṛtyu sama prabham arautsīt tam mahā vīryaḥ jayam taḥ pākaśāsanaḥ śastra abhighāta duḥkha ārtaṅka śmalam ca ānyasam yutam jayam tam abravīt vākyam kāleyaḥ krodha mūrcchitaḥ nihatya bhrātṛ ham tāram atha tvām hanmi sāmpratam tatas tam ca asura śreṣṭham kāla anala sama prabham yathā vṛṣṭi gaṇam prāpya nadī gaiḥ ika vāhinī tathā atauca mahā vīryau na kṣīṇau na ca kātarau yam tāram paṣcabhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhū tale aṣṭābhiḥ niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ ca tura uśvān apātayāt śaktim saṅgṛhya bhūmiṣṭhaḥ kumāram ca jaghāna ha gadayā āpīḍitam sa aśvam sa varūtha aṃsa kūbaram pātayitvā adharaṇyām casim hanādam nanāda ha lāghavāt sa dharām gatvā gadā pāṇiḥ upasthitaḥ vajra pātāt yathā śabdaḥ lokānām duḥsahaḥ bhavet tathā tayoḥ gadā pāte śabdaḥ syāt tu muhur muhur evam tayoḥ gadā yuddham yāvat abda catuṣṭayam tadā apadātinoḥ yuddham adbhutam loma harṣaṇam dṛṣṭvā ca vismayam jagmuḥ deva asura mahā uragāḥ khaḍga pātaiḥ muhūrtām śiraiḥ chatvā āsya khaḍgena pātayāmāsa bhū tale prabhagnāḥ daitya saṅghāḥ ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ pradudruvuḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe kāleyavadhaḥ nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca sa roṣaḥ ca ati tāmra akṣaḥ hi asurān ādideśa ha svayam gacchāmi yuddhāya devānām vijighām sayā etat śrutvā tu vacanam śeṣāḥ daitya gaṇa adhipāḥ yuddhāya prayayuḥ sarve śūla pāśa ati paṇḍitāḥ adhikam pūrva sainyāḥ ca tathā a śataguṇaiḥ api niram taram tathā ākāśam prayayuḥ yuddha kāṅkṣiṇaḥ tatas rudrāḥ sa sādhyāḥ ca viśveca vasavaḥ tathā skaṃ daḥ ca gaṇapaḥ ca eva viṣṇu jiṣṇu purogamāḥ sarve yoddhuṅgatāḥ teca hṛṣṭa araṇa samutsukāḥ na bhūtam na śrutam pūrvam sarva loka bhayaṅkaram śastra astraiḥ barhudhā yuktam śiśireṇa iva kānanam dharām svargaukaḥ ākāśam sam rudhya yuddham ābabhau anyonyam jaghnuḥ ākāśe tathā anyonyam mahī tale śaktibhiḥ musalaiḥ bhallaiḥ bahubhiḥ śara vṛṣṭibhiḥ dāruṇaiḥ khaḍga pātaiḥ ca tathā cakra paraḥśvadhaiḥ abhavan ghora rūpāṇi dharā ākāśa ivyayāni ca śastraiḥ śaraiḥ asṛj pātaiḥ kaṅka vāyasa jam bukaiḥ tathā eva kṣatajaiḥ srastaiḥ sva aṅgāt ca deva dānavāḥ mum canti ca ārta nādān ca sim ha nādam muhur muhur keṣām cit bāhavaḥ chinnāḥ chinna pādāḥ tathā apare chinna pārśva udarāḥ kecid nipetuḥ śataśas bhuvi koṭi koṭi sahasrāṇi gaja vājī asurāṇi ca apatan dharaṇī pṛṣṭhe rakta oghe bahudhā bhuvi tatas tṛṇa kāṣṭha parāḥ tatra śaktayā udāru sam cayāḥ ca jayanti kādhvaja amīnāḥ kamaṭhāḥ ca rmakāyakāḥ śara ādibhiḥ mahā uṣṭraiḥ ca niruddhāḥ pracuraiḥ tathā keśa cāmara śaivālāḥ sampūrṇāḥ tāḥ tatas tatas patadbhiḥ ca tathā anyaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ kṣataja arṇavaḥ tadā avasum dharā sarva āsa śaila vana kānanā parśunā aparameṇa eva agninā agni śikhaiḥ śaraiḥ varuṇasya ca pāśena baddhā magnā ayam akṣaye yeṣām putraiḥ ca pautraiḥ ca purogaiḥ sacivaiḥ tathā nipātitāḥ ca daiteyāḥ śara śakti ṛṣṭi vṛṣṭibhiḥ pannagānām viṣaiḥ ghoraiḥ daityāḥ petuḥ dharā tale pātitāḥ prayayuḥ sarve idha araṇyām tugatāsavaḥ kecid gacchanti pātālam puṇya apuṇya prayogataḥ prayudhyamāneṣu anyeṣu sāmpratam sarvajam vibudhaiḥ arditāḥ daityāḥ śeṣāḥ parvatam āśritāḥ prajagmuḥ ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ kātara araṇa bhīravaḥ ardayāmāsa devān ca sam yamyā agni samaiḥ śaraiḥ tasya bāṇa arditāḥ devāḥ bahavaḥ bala darpitāḥ patita adharaṇī pṛṣṭhe kecid bhagna araṇa ajire dṛṣṭvā tasya mahat karma dāruṇam loka bhīṣaṇam śaśam surṛṣayaḥ devāḥ tatra śiṣṭāḥ pracukruśuḥ atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ śatakratuḥ arim damaḥ jaghāna śarasam dohaiḥ balam balavatām varam rudhireṇa avasikta aṅgau prasṛtena mahā balau tau yathā mādhave māsi puṣpitau kim śuka drumau cakrāṇi ca sahasrāṇi śūlāni musalāni ca tāni cakrāṇi śūlāni nicakartta śara uttamaiḥ surarāj sahasā abhrāntaḥ līlayā a samare balī saca daityaḥ mahā tejāḥ śaktyā ca eva puram daram nijaghāna tadā tūrṇam gaja stham ca stanām tare labdhasam jṣobalam jiṣṇuḥ bibheda danu jaṅkṣaṇāt carma tīkṣṇam dhvajam tasya śareṇa ekena vīra hā śareṇa ekena sūtasya śiraḥ ciccheda tad kṣaṇāt nipatya mūrcchitaḥ pṛthvyām muhūrtāt mṛtyum āpasaḥ gadām ādāya sahasā sajaghāna mahā gajam prahāreṇa arditaḥ padmīsam cacāla sa vihvalaḥ rudhireṇa avasikta aṅgaḥ vimukhaḥ vedanā āturaḥ śatakratum vidhāvanti śata śotha sahasraśas ciccheda pākaśāsanaḥ tubhiḥ tasya māyābhiḥ arditāḥ sura puṅgavāḥ dṛṣṭvā tasya mahat karma mādhavaḥ viśikhān stathā tatas jiṣṇuḥ tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhū tale dadhāra mudgaram ghoram śakram haṃ samudyataḥ sapapāta mahī pṛṣṭha īkṣata vakṣā mahā balaḥ sādhu sādhu iti devāḥ ca siddhāḥ ca eva mahā ṛṣayaḥ apūjayam stadāśakram bahubhiḥ puṣpa vṛṣṭibhiḥ gītam gāyanti gandharvān anṛtuḥ ca apsaraḥ gaṇāḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe saptaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca balam ca nihatam dṛṣṭvā namucim ca svaka agrajam muciḥ tatra abravīt vākyam parokṣeṇa adhunā atvām ca śaraiḥ neṣyāmi bhāskarim tam abravīt mahā tejāḥ śakraḥ sarva sura arcitaḥ vahneḥ uṣṇam avijṣāya pramohāt śalabhāyathā sahasā apraviśam ti agnim tathā amām yoddhum icchasi evam bruvāṇam indram ca jaghāna viśikhaiḥ tribhiḥ sa ciccheda tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ śakraḥ para puram jayaḥ āyasīm tām gadām kopāt mahā bala parākramaḥ devāḥ pracakruḥ nṛtyāni dānavāḥ vipradudruvuḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe mucivadhaḥ nāma aṣṭa ṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca vicakarta śarām stām stān nirbibheda śara uttamaiḥ sa daityaḥ sahasā askam chādayāmāsa mārgaṇaiḥ tāreya ugni śaraiḥ skam jaghāna raṇa mūrdhani tatra samparyavārayat tat nirastam kṛtam tena bāṇena āsphālitena ca aghoram prākṣipat daityaḥ ghora rūpam su dāruṇam bhūdhara a viṭapa asim sahāḥ tathā sarpa ādayaḥ śarāḥ dhāvanti pārvatīputram koṭi koṭi sahasraśas stu śarān skam āpādam tam śaraiḥ agni arka sannibhaiḥ svarṇa puṅkhāḥ śara ālagnāḥ dehe daityapateḥ bhṛśam rejuḥ te svarṇa śakalāḥ yathā kṛṣṇa śiloccaye tasya dehāt tatas ca eva bahu susrāva śoṇitam yathā ca mādhava imāsi purupuṣpaḥ śamītaruḥ syam dana adhaḥ ca ra a śvāḥ ca śii śya re bhūmi lagnakāḥ atha kruddhaḥ mahā daityaḥ śūlam bhīmam ca dāruṇam praticikṣepa kāla mṛtyu sama prabham pārvatīnam danena apiśūlam pāśupatena ha kṣiptam tena kṛtam dagdham muhūrtena raṇa ajire punar śaktim mumoca atha brahmadatta antu dānavaḥ śūlam pratijaghāna atha śatakūṭa sama prabham tayoḥ sa vīryayoḥ astredharaṇyām praṇipetatuḥ tām tathā aśvān bahubhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhū tale gṛhītvā a musalam vegāt sa dudrāva sthaleguham jaghāna tena daitya indraḥ śikhinam śikhivāhanam tatas skam ca jaghāna asura puṅgavam praciccheda asinā āvegāt musalam ca ati dāruṇam tāreyaḥ śaktim ādāya jaghāna kraum ca dāraṇam saḥ upi śaktim mumoca atha amoghām duṣṭa ghātinīm tatas sam dahya sā śaktiḥ viśva pralaya kāriṇī yama daṇḍa samānam sagatāsuḥ papāta urvyām ca ālayam ca vasum dharām puṣpa dhūpa ādibhiḥ skaṃ daḥ sarva devaiḥ prapūjitaḥ iti śrī padma purāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe vyāsaḥ uvāca raṇam cakāra dharmeṇasam daṣṭa oṣṭha puṭaḥ balī sa gatvā ca abravīt vākyam sarva loka vigarhitam na jānāsi mahat dharmam duṣṭa mohāt yathākramam na jānāsi yatas dharmam kāla mṛtyu puraḥsaraḥ dharmāt pracalitaḥ śam uktam vasum mahā vīryam yamam dharma eka sākṣikam sajaghāna tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ kāla mṛtyu sama prabhaiḥ tatas tu uccais śaraiḥ prājyaiḥ yugām tānala saprabhaiḥ nijaghāna yamam saṅkhye sa ciccheda śaraiḥśarān etasmin antare kruddhaḥ śaktyā apraśamanam ruṣā bibheda daitya śārdūlaḥ hi ahaṅkāra yutaḥ balī tām eva atha ruṣā adharmaḥ gṛhītvā aśaktikām drutam nijaghāna tayā eva amum tare bhṛśam sa vihvalita sarva aṅgaḥ mukhāt āgata śoṇitaḥ tatas kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ dhṛtvā daṇḍam su dāruṇam sa aśvam ratham tathā asūtam yoddhāram śastra sam cayam cakāra bhasmasāt tam śamanam śūla hastaḥ tu pradudrāva jighām sayā śūla hastam samāyām tam baḍavānala sannibham śakti hasta ūti nirbhayaḥ saca dṛṣṭvā asuraḥ mṛtyum śūlena eva jaghāna aha śaktim ca eva tatas mṛtyuḥ pracikṣepa raṇa ajire sam dahya sahasā śūlam vahni kūṭa sama prabham daityasya hṛdayam atha anyaḥ durmukhaḥ mṛtyuṅkṛṣṭa cāpaḥ mahā balaḥ dṛṣṭvā tam viśikhaiḥ prājyaiḥ jaghāna sa yamam raṇe śiraḥ ciccheda sahasā āpātayitvā āca bhū tale hata śeṣam balam sarvam pradudrāva diśaḥ daśa iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe vyāsaḥ uvāca viśikhaiḥ ardayāmasa ghoraiḥ āśīviṣa upamaiḥ na śaknuvanti bāṇānām vegam soḍhum samam tatas puruhūtaḥ samāsthāya prāgamat tam mahā balam dṛṣṭvā śakram mahā vīryam namuciḥ daitya puṅgavaḥ abravīt vāsavam saṅkhyā iva sa anugam tadā prākṛtam nirjaram na lābha kṛtakam tam abravīt mahā tejāḥ śakraḥ para puram jayaḥ śūra tā vākya mātreṇa sarvatra sulabhā bhavet mahā parākramam yat vā astitedānava adhama darśayasva āhave vīryam puram etat śrutvā mahā tejāḥ cukopa daitya puṅgavaḥ anyonyam sahasā āvegāt śaraiḥ cicchidatuḥ śarān ati a pūrvam kṛtam karma tābhyām eva raṇe bhṛśam lāghavam śarasam dhāna graha mokṣam su durlabham dṛṣṭvā tu vismayam jagmuḥ deva asura gaṇāḥ tadā viśikhāḥ śataśas tatra viniśceruḥ samam tatas śakraḥ kopāt punar śīghram dhanuḥ udyamya vīryavān tatas mārgaṇa sāhasraiḥ aṣṭabhiḥ tu adhikam tathā śaraiḥ niḥ tara ākāśam dadṛśuḥ tatra sam yuge nipatanti dharā pṛṣṭhe khaḍga pātaiḥ sahasraśas māyā astram darśayāmāsa krūra kṛt namuciḥ tadā tāmasam triṣu lokeṣu kṛtam syāt tuniram taram parasparam na paśyanti deva asura gaṇāḥ bhṛśam sūrya candra grahāṇām ca vahnīnām ca divaukasām vibhagnāḥ sarva devāḥ ca śakraḥ ca raṇasam mukhe prabhagnāḥ ca apare śūrāḥ sam yānti ca diśaḥ daśa kūṭam vilam bitam samālokya śakti āca bahu gham ṭayā cirātsam labhyasam ca daiteyaḥ krodha mūrcchitaḥ gatvā vegāt suraśreṣṭha maiḥ āvatam dadhāra ha trāsayāmāsa sutarām indrasya adviradam ruṣā sa indram mumoca dharaṇī tale tatas bhūmi gataḥ śakraḥ kaśmalam śakraṅgrahītu kāmasya vadha artham yūtha pasyasaḥ sarve prajahṛṣuḥ devāḥ gandharvāḥ lalitam jaguḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe dvitīyanamucivadhaḥ nāma eka vyāsaḥ uvāca gatvā ca mādhavam saṅkhye deva asura gaṇa agratas abravīt paruṣam vākyam avyayam harim īśvaram katham anyāyāt durvadha upāyam kṛtvā naṣṭaḥ ūna śocasi sura tvam ca upanaṣṭam syāt anya sṛṣṭim karomi aham bahubhiḥ sarva gātreṣu jaghāna camadhum tatas māyayā āchāditaḥ saḥ bhūt daityaḥ tam sura sattamāḥ ca rudra ādyāḥ tridaśāḥ sattva dhāriṇaḥ devyaḥ nānāvidhāḥ ca api sa āyudha āvāhana anvitāḥ senā nyaḥ gaṇa pāda āloka īśa hara viṣṇavaḥ anye graha ādayaḥ devāḥ sarve yudhyanti saṅga tāḥ vinaṣṭāḥ ca tadā deva amadhoḥ vaimāyayā adhruvam sam mukhe vimukhe ca eva śara śakti ṛṣṭi vṛṣṭibhiḥ patanti sahasā deva abhūmau śastra abhipīḍitāḥ etasmin antare viṣṇuḥ gṛhītvā ācasudarśanam asurān māyayā adevān jaghāna raṇa mūrdhani atha teṣām śirām syeṣat hitvā ca eva sahasraśas pātayāmāsa deveśaḥ daityānām ca sura ātmanām evam anyān vibhuḥ daityān drāvayāmāsa saṅgarāt tam dṛṣṭvā munayaḥ devāḥ sarve vismayam āyayuḥ karṇe karṇe prajalpante devāḥ muni gaṇāḥ tathā sarva sākṣī tu ayam devaḥ daitya jiṣṇuḥ yuge yuge daityānām agratas pāpa raṇe devān samantataḥ hatvā iṅkam te śivam ca adya dharma kīrti yaśaḥ guṇāḥ atas tvām niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ na yāmi yama sādanam evam uktvā śaraiḥ ugraiḥ jaghāna keśavam raṇe nicakarta śarān tān tu mādhavaḥ vākyam abravīt jānāmi tvām raṇe daityam hara rūpa dharam priyam śūram śūra vikarmāṇam madhum māyā niyojitam mithyā lokam pradāsyāmi pātayitvā raṇa ajire etasmin antare tīkṣṇaiḥ śaraiḥ vivyādha saṃyuge jaṭilam vṛṣaketum ca vṛṣabha stham maheśvaram parasparam bhindatoḥ ca prāptān prāptān śarān śaraiḥ tatas ca pātayāmāsa ghoṭakam vṛṣa rūpiṇam bhrāmayitvā tatas śūlam jaghāna parameśvaram tribhiḥ ciccheda bāṇaiḥ ca śūlaṅkāla anala prabham tatas krūraḥ mahā bāhuḥ madhuḥ māyā atimāyikaḥ devī rūpam samāsthāya asim hasthaḥ prayayau hariḥ śaraiḥ bahuvidhaiḥ viṣṇum jaghāna eva abravīt vacaḥ svāmī tumesura śreṣṭha tvayā eva pātitaḥ yudhi aham tvām ca haniṣyāmi sutauskam davi nāyakau uktavam tam ca daiteyam jaghāna bahu mārgaṇaiḥ sapapāta mahī pṛṣṭhe gatāsuḥ lohita udgiraḥ pitarau nihatau dṛṣṭvā māyā vat haḥ mahā balaḥ daḥśaktim samādāya prāyāt yodhayitum harim tatas dhātā abravīt vākyam skaṃ dam moha prapīḍitam paśyate pitarau dūre paśyam tau yuddham īdṛśam aṃ tarikṣebhramam taucasam sthitaulokasākṣiṇau etat śrutvā tatas dṛṣṭvā tatra taradhīyata petatuḥ tau dharāpṛṣṭhe pravīrau kṣata vikṣatau madhuḥ tad āgataḥ tūrṇamam tardha anantamaḥ vṛtaḥ pātayāmāsa viṣṇau ca māyayā śataparvatān krodhāt sudarśanena eva śiraḥ chitvā ani pātitaḥ madhusūdana eti khyātiḥ viṣṇoḥ lokeṣu kāri tā iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe madhuvadhonāma vyāsaḥ uvāca tatas vṛtraḥ mahā tejāḥ daityānām pravaraḥ yudhi diggaja āḍhyam gaja ārūḍhaḥ prādravat balasūdanam āgaccham tam tatas vṛtram śaraiḥ kāla anala prabhaiḥ tatas vṛtrastuśīrṣam ca jiṣṇoḥ eva patatriṇā ātmānam ca samāśvāsya dhanuḥ udyamya vīryavān śarām śchitvā abibheda āśu śaraiḥ āśīviṣa upamaiḥ śatakratum mahā vīryaḥ sarva deva adhipam yudhi parasparam śara āyānti yathā sapta aśva raśmayaḥ manojava samāḥ śīghrāḥ gāḍhāḥ śikhariṇaḥ yathā baḍavānalasam sparśāḥ khagāḥ vajrārabhedakāḥ tayoḥ dhanuṣmatoḥ yuddhe śarāḥ tulya guṇa anvitāḥ sa nipatya mahī pṛṣṭhe lāghavāt sva ratham yayau ratha sthaḥ tasya devasya śaktyā cais āvaṇam dṛḍham bibheda lāghavena āśu vajreṇa iva mahā girim śuśubhekam tatas śaktim samādāya āvidhya maghavā asuram kṣaṇāt sam jṣām samālambya sa vinadya patattriṇā bibheda samare śakram satataḥ kaśmalam gataḥ indraḥ sam jṣām punar prāpya jaghāna viśikhaiḥ śitaiḥ śata koṭi samaiḥ bāṇaiḥ arditaḥ vyathayā anvitaḥ tatas vṛtraḥ mahā śūlam prākṣipat nirjara īśvare śām bhava astreṇa deveśaḥ vaiṣṇava astram sparśaneca sphuliṅgānām ubhayoḥ senayoḥ bhaṭāḥ na śaktāḥ sam mukhe sthātum śalabhā jvalanā iyathā dagdhāḥ petuḥ pṛthivyām ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ pradudruvuḥ deva dānavayoḥ vīrāḥ śūnyaḥ tatra abhavat raṇaḥ astram nirastakam dṛṣṭvā sa daityaḥ krodha mūrcchitaḥ māyayā aśailasam doham astram bāṇa oghaiḥ śaila saṅghātam praciccheda raṇehariḥ aghoram prāsṛjat daityaḥ puruhūte mahā bale koṭi koṭi sahasrāṇi jam tūnām pravarāṇi ca siṃ ha śārdūla bhallūka vṛka vyāghra mahā gajāḥ dam daśūka ādayaḥ satvāḥ pradhāvanti sureśvaram sūtam ca aśvān pṛthivyām capātayāmāsa tad kṣaṇāt sakam ṭaka aṅgadām bhīmām sampūjya asura sattamaḥ jaghāna padminaḥ śīrṣe mohāt dam tīkṣitim yayau sa gadaḥ sarva deva īśaḥ dharaṇīm samupasthitaḥ adhas ūrdhvam prahāram ca pārśvayoḥ ati bhīṣaṇam dṛṣṭvā deva gaṇāḥ siddhāḥ dānavāḥ vismayam gatāḥ deva dānava vīrāḥ ca draṣṭum na eva tat īśire īśa brahma ādayaḥ khetu sthitāḥ draṣṭum tat adbhutam dṛśyete sarva lokaiḥ ca lāghavam vismayaṃgataiḥ maṇḍalam cakradhanvam ca lāghavam ca pariplutam keśān vṛtrasya a utplutya sampradhṛtya asinā ādrutam śiraḥ ciccheda sahasām agha vāraṇa mūrdhani jaya śabdaḥ tatas tu āsīt devānām ca samam tatas devadum dubhayaḥ neduḥ nanṛtuḥ ca apsaraḥ gaṇāḥ gītam gāyanti gandharvāḥ munayaḥ stuti pāṭhakāḥ bhītāḥ palāyitāḥ sarve daityāḥ tyakta āyudha ādiśaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe vṛtrāsuravadhaḥ nāma vyāsaḥ uvāca ruroha atha abravīt vākyam aṅgaṇa adhipam pitāmeni hataḥ pitrā atas vayasmāt gaṇādhipa tasmāt tvām adya viśikhaiḥ nayāmi iyama sādanam tava tātena duṣṭena surāṇām ahitam purā kṛtam karma mahat pāpam śrutam naḥ janakena hi pāpa karma ratam duṣṭam paṅkāt pratāritaḥ mohāt preṣitaḥ yam amam diram tvām ca aham tad patham daitya preṣayā abhikṣaṇāt iha uktavam tam mahā prājṣam surāṇām vivyādha daśabhiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ kāla anala sama prabhaiḥ yama daṇḍa samaiḥ bāṇaiḥ kṣurapraiḥ ca śilīmukhaiḥ kaṅka patraiḥ mahā tīkṣṇaiḥ vajra anala sama prabhaiḥ vicakarta śarān bodaraḥ sura arcitaḥ tatobhadraḥ ca saubhadraḥ bhīṣaṇaḥ nirjarām takaḥ svām sva aṅgadām samādāya dudruvuḥ tam vināyakam lāghavāt tu vṛthā kṛtvā agadāḥ teṣām mahā balaḥ bhadrakasya tu śīrṣe ca ahanat paraśunā tadā bhīṣaṇasya kuṭhāreṇa khaḍgena nirjarām takam pātayitvā aca herambaḥ mahā giri samām caturaḥ gaṇa mukhyām ca anyām ś ca apātayat dviṣaḥ tatas sam jṣām samālabh yatra ipuriḥ ca asura uttamaḥ tām stuci cheda dharma ātmā a punar vivyādhatam śaraiḥ caturbhiḥ saim ca eva śara ekena ca sārathim śaraiḥ sampātayāmāsa dharaṇyā aṅgaṇa nāyakān lāghavāt turatham ca anyam gatvā tripura nam danaḥ viśikhaiḥ vajra saṅkāśaiḥ sambibheda gaṇādhipam rudhireṇa avasikta aṅga uruṣā ghora yama prabhaḥ bāṇaiḥ saptabhiḥ ca tare tatas sūtena dhīreṇa apanīta uraṇa ajirāt vimukham nā ahanat śūraḥ vināyakaḥ sura arcitaḥ cirāt sam jṣām samālabhya ayam tāram ca abravīt vacaḥ gacchasūta raṇebhīrum vināyakam hara ātmajam tatas iyam tā abravīt vākyam satyam pathyam ca komalam hara ātmaja śarān soḍhum kaḥ samartha uraṇa ajire tasmāt moha gataḥ tvam camayā ānītaḥ prabhāsuta etat jṣātvā tu idānīm bho yat yuktam tat vidhīyatām auṣadha ādi prayogeṇa gajaḥ sam jṣām abodhayat akārayat śataguṇa prāṇam cajayam ādiśat prāc jalam mantritam da tvā ārurodha asya aṅgaka vraṇān evam śata sahasrāṇi sainyāni sainyapālakān sa daityaḥ tasya pṛṣṭha sthaḥ śaraiḥ kāla anala prabhaiḥ hatvā atu apātayat ca urvyām mukhya mukhyān sura adhipān śaraiḥ tasya tadā devāḥ yama daṇḍa sama prabhaiḥ tatra tatra cakāra āśu bhīṣaṇam sam citam śaraiḥ gajena pātitāḥ kecid gaja āroheṇa ca apare vegena bhramaṇena eva surāḥ kecid pratāpitāḥ evam sura gaṇa adhyakṣāḥ śastra astraiḥ vividhaiḥ ca tam tathā api tad gajam yoddhum na śaktāḥ te mahā balāḥ kṣipram tām taiḥ traipuraḥ apātayat śaraiḥ ca deva a jarjara vigrahāḥ śaraṇī aṅgaṇapam jagmuḥ bhītāḥ te vedanā āturāḥ devānām kadanam dṛṣṭvā gaṇādhīśaḥ pratāpavān sa gajam tāḍayāmāsa vajra anala samaiḥ śaraiḥ cakre mahā nāṅgam mahā balam parśunā pṛṣṭhavaṃśa agre sthitvā tena ahanat punar sa gajaḥ sa papāta urvyā aṅga tāsuḥ lohitam vaman śaśam suḥ munayaḥ devāḥ sādhu sādhu iti ca bruvat iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe vyāsaḥ uvāca śrutvā maheśvarāt vākyam devāḥ śakra purogamāḥ dudruvuḥ daitya saṅghām stān sarve sarvān samam tatas ājagāma mahā bāhuḥ kum bho nāma mahā suraḥ naiḥ ṛtu yakṣa rāja anaṅgadayā ca ahanat bhṛśam guhya keśaḥ gadā pātaiḥ jaghāna bhṛśam uttamam tatas nyonyam aṅgada āyuddham abhavat bhīṣaṇam tayoḥ prācuram bhīṣaṇam yānam sphoṭa taila abhivāstikam tena kṛtvā mahā yuddham avasāne dhaneśvaraḥ pātayāmāsatam sphoṭam bhagnadam syam tadā jaghāna śara saṅghaiḥ ca tathā evaiḥ āvaṇam bhṛśam sapapāta dharā pṛṣṭhe gatāsuḥ lohita ukṣitaḥ catur ogaṇa mukhyām ca śaktyā abibhedasam yuge senānyaḥ ca eva pratyekam pātayāmāsa lāghavāt śaktihastam casam hrādam yamadaṇḍam narām takam hatvā ācapātayāmāsa sa bhasmīkṛta vigrahaḥ kālaḥ ca khaḍga pātena pātayāmāsa bābhravam śaktyā amṛtyuḥ bibheda aśvam tathā ani rghṛṇakam raṇe agninā a dahyamānāḥ ca sapta ete ca mahā balāḥ dagdha dehāḥ ca petuḥ urvyā aṅga tāsavaḥ pāśa baddhā mahā vīryā varuṇasya mahātmanaḥ petuḥ urvyām mahā satvāḥ śūrāḥ śūra bhayānakāḥ śūrasya raśmi jālena nihatāḥ paṣca dānavāḥ turutum buruduḥ medhaḥ sādhaka asādhaka abhidhāḥ śaraiḥ nipātitāḥ adaityāḥ sam yuge mātariśvanā naiḥ ṛtogadayā abhīmam pātayāmāsa bhū tale śūla pātaiḥ ca rudrāṇām śataśas daitya dānavāḥ nipetuḥ sam mukhāraṇa paṇḍitāḥ vasūnām śara pātaiḥ ca śūrāṇām raśmi mālinām ca vajra pātaiḥ su dāruṇaiḥ nipāti tāraṇe daityāḥ śataśas bala śālinaḥ tya urvyām skam gaṇeśa parśu pātena patanti mukhya mukhyakāḥ vaikuṃ ṭha kara muktena cakreṇa tīvra karmaṇā daityānām pravarāṇām ca śirām sini patanti kau śamanaḥ yama daṇḍena koṭi koṭi sahasraśas apātayat tadā bhūmyām kālaḥ khaḍgena dānavān mṛtyuḥ śaktyā tathā daityān pāśīpāśena ca aparān pātena takṣaka ādīnām sudhām śoḥ śiśireṇa ca aśva ārohī khara umanyaḥ hani pāśaḥ tathā gajān parigheṇaga jaṅkum bhedaityānām nāśayat tatas evam aśvān gajān ca eva lāghavāt sani apātayat anyābhiḥ devatābhiḥ ca sa mātṛ gaṇa nāyakaiḥ nipātitaḥ amahaḥ ghorāya ite pralaya dānavāḥ śaraiḥ ca khaḍga pātaiḥ ca śūla śakti paraśvadhaiḥ taiḥ ca pātayam tyasurān surāḥ evam saṅkṣīyamāṇeṣu daitya rāj samapadyata āditya ratha saṅkāśam ratha ratna vibhūṣitam śātakumbha mayam divi aṅgham ṭā cāmara bhūṣitam patākā dhvaja sampūrṇam ramyam śakra ratha upamam samāruhya mahā vīraḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ asura adhipaḥ jaghāna śara jālaiḥ ca durnivāryaḥ sura asuraiḥ sa sainyāni gajān vīrorathān ca sahasaim dhavān pātayāmāsa bhū mauca śata śotha sahasraśas pātayāmāsa daitya indraḥ śara oghān mṛtyu sannibhān yathā puṣkariṇī vṛnde gajaḥkam javanam śitaiḥ śara pātaiḥ ha nādaiḥ punar punar dharaṇyām patitā āvegāt tadā daitya īśvarasya ca daśabhiḥ ca su tīkṣṇa agraiḥ jayam tam sajaghāna ha tam paṣcabhiḥ bāṇaiḥ śakram paṣcadaśena tu citraratham viṃśatibhiḥ paṣcaviṃśatibhiḥ guham tri śareṇa eva catvārim śat śaraiḥ yamam tathā eva kālam mṛtyum guhyakeśam jagatprāṇam daśabhiḥ daśabhiḥ śaraiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ ca saptabhiḥ ca eva rudrān sarvān pṛthak pṛthak vasūn sarvān ca sa śaraiḥ siddha gandharva pannagān daśa aṣṭa daśabhiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ yuddhe devān bhinatti asau ojaḥ oghāt ativīryāt tu śīghra lāghavaḥ daśanān āpad prāptāḥ sura abhītyā a pratikartum na ca īśvarāḥ maheśa śūla saṅkāśaiḥ śaraiḥ marma vibhedibhiḥ tāḍitāni rjarā yuddhe mūrcchita ādharaṇīm yayuḥ tasya eva sam mukhe sthātum na śekuḥ pravarāḥ surāḥ tatas deva a vinirdhūtāḥ tridiveśa īśena sam yutāḥ śaraṇyam te harim tatra śaraṇam tāḍitāḥ āyayuḥ etasmin antare viṣṇuḥ prāha jiṣṇum khageśvaram tūrṇaṅgataḥ tasya anti kam javāt sa ratham mārgaṇaiḥ bhitvā a viṣṇum ārodhayat javam anya sṛṣṭiṅkaromi adya hatvā tvām casa nirjjaram tatas viṣṇuḥ tam daitya puṅgavam tatas śara śataiḥ eva jaghāna viṣṇum avyayam a sam bhrām taḥ sa ciccheda yama daṇḍa nibhān śarān punar śara sahasrāṇi prerayāmāsatam raṇe tām ca chitvā a śaraiḥ śauriḥ tam ca vivyādha mārgaṇaiḥ pragauravāt ahārya ābhaiḥ sam sparśāt bāḍava analaiḥ śaraiḥ ca bhedakaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ khagamaiḥ ca manojavaiḥ lāghavāt keśavāḥ trasya tūla śuṣka tṛṇa upamaiḥ bādhaya abhyarditaḥ kruddhaḥ dhṛtvā śikhariṇam raṇe jaghāna mādhavam vegāt hiraṇyākṣaḥ mahā balaḥ tam casam cūrṇayāmāsa gadayā a līlayā a hariḥ evam parvata sāhasram pātitam tu krameṇa hi tathā eva lāghavāt cūrṇam hariṇādāna vāriṇā punar bāhu sahasrāṇi kṛtvā asau dānava uttamaḥ śaraiḥ śaktibhiḥ ati ugraiḥ śūlaiḥ paraśuka ādibhiḥ vavarṣa bahubhiḥ viṣṇum krodha āviṣṭena cetasā śaraiḥ dīptaiḥ mahā ghoraiḥ asurāṇām bhayaṅkaraiḥ vivyādha sarva gātreṣu śam bhuśūla upamaiḥ śaraiḥ dānava adhipatiḥ saṅkhye hi avyayaḥ hariḥ īśvaraḥ gatvā sarva śaktim anuttamām kāla jihvā upama aṅghorām aṣṭagham ṭā samanvitām śuśubhesa sura śreṣṭhaḥ taḍit tvad sāndra megha vat tatas ca cukruśuḥ daitya ajayā iti sādhu vādinaḥ teṣām sisam chidya mādhavam punar āgamat sa daityam śaktipātena pātayāma āsavaiḥ aṇe cirāt sam jṣām samālambya vahni bāṇena keśavam tatas mumoca māyā astram ca asuram ca ati dāruṇam sim ha vyāghra lulāyām ca tadvat dvipa sarīsṛpān jaghāna samare viṣṇum hiraṇyākṣaḥ pratāpavān tatas māyā astra sambhūtān śastra astra oghān raṇe hariḥ sa vihvalita sarva aṅgaḥ tad kṣaṇam lohita ukṣitaḥ tat śūlam catribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pravivyādha surādhipaḥ yam tāram capraciccheda daśabhiḥ ca hariḥśaraiḥ āruroha sa daitya indraḥ sam mukham ca akarot balī bhū maṇḍalam samuddhṛtya viveśa carasātalam śeṣāḥ ca viviśuḥ daityāḥ tam anu prīti sam yutāḥ tatas viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ a jṣātvā daitya balam mahat dadhāra rūpam vārāham daitya rāja jighāṃsayā dhṛtvā akroḍa tanum viṣṇuḥ viveśa tam anudrutam tatra gatvā rasāmūleḥ asātala gatām mahīm dṛṣṭvā sva dam ṣṭrayoḥ dadhre loka ādhārām vasum dharām tām dhṛtvā āgacchataḥ tasya viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ samājagāma daitya indraḥ dhṛṣṭam vāgbhiḥ tudan anu māyā kroḍa tanuḥ viṣṇuḥ durvacām sisahan ruṣā jala upari dadhāra imām dharām bhūdharaḥ eva ca tasyām casacakāra tadā acalām tatas paścāt sasam lagna udaitya rāj samupasthitaḥ samavam cayat tatas punar aruṣa āviṣṭaḥ hiraṇya akṣaḥ mahā balaḥ muṣṭinā aprāharat devam dakṣiṇetu bhuje prabhoḥ evam yuddham mahā ghoram savya asavyaṅga tā gatam tathā ūcuḥ ca deva deveśam viṣṇum vārāha rūpiṇam mā ākrīḍa bāla vat deva jahi amum devakam ṭakam tatas viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ māyā vārāha rūpa dhṛk brahma ādi anumatim prāpya cakram prākṣipat ulbaṇam sahasra sūrya saṅkāśam sahasra aram mahā prabham tat cakram viṣṇunā amuktam hiraṇya akṣam mahā balam cakāra bhasmasāt sadyas brahma ādīnām ca paśyatām daityām raudram cakram ca agamat acyutam tatas brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ śakru mukhyāḥ ca lokapāḥ dṛṣṭvā ca vijayam viṣṇoḥ stuvanti sma samāgatāḥ devāḥ ūcuḥ natāḥ sma viṣṇum jagat ādi bhūtam sura asura indram jagatām prapālakam yad nābhi padmāt kila padmayoniḥ babhūva tam namaḥ prakurmaḥ ca nṛsiṃha rūpiṇe tathā punar vāmana rūpiṇe namaḥ namaḥ stute kṣatra vināśanāya rāmāya rāmāya daśa āsya nāśine mlecchām takāya apica kalki nāmne namaḥ punar kroḍa vapuḥ dharāya niṣūditaḥ ayam hi adhunā kila tvayā daityaḥ hiraṇyākṣa eti pragalbhaḥ pātā tvam eva asya yuge yuge ca rūpāṇi dhatse su manoharāṇi tvam eva kāla agni haraḥ ca bhūtvā a viśvaṅkṣayam ta kāle atas bhavān eva ca viśva kāraṇam nate param jīvam ajīvam īśa yatiṅ ka ca bhūtam ca bhaviṣya rūpam pravarttamānam ca tathā eva rūpam sarvam tvam eva asi carācara ākhyam nabha ati viśvam tvat ṛte cakim cit tvayi eva bhātam sat asat svarūpam ṛte bhavat pāda parāyaṇam janam tena āgatā asmaḥ śaraṇam śaraṇyam vyāsaḥ uvāca tatas viṣṇuḥ prasanna ātmā uvāca tridivaukasaḥ tuṣṭaḥ asmi deva abhadram vaḥ yuṣmat stotreṇa sāmpratam tat phalam samavāpnoti kīrtanāt śravaṇāt naraḥ atas param mahā jñānam na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe devāsurasaṅgrāmasamāptauvijayastotram nāma saptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sam jayaḥ uvāca ye asurāḥ ca mukhe vimukhe api vā gatim teṣām aham brahman śrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ adya api āsan gatāḥ kutra etat mā īśam sabhā guro vyāsaḥ uvāca sam mukheśūrāt aityānām pravara araṇe svayam bhogyam aśnanti śāśvatam prāsādāḥ yatra sauvarṇa a nānā ratnā vibhūṣitāḥ sarva kāma pradāḥ vṛkṣāḥ svarṇadī toyasam yutāḥ dadhi dugdha ājya khaṇḍaiḥ ca yutā puṣkariṇī śubhā atīva rūpa sampannāḥ sa daiva nava yauvanāḥ evam janma aṣṭakam prāpya dhaninā adhyakṣa mantriṇaḥ mukha gātreṇa divam aśnanti śāśvatam vimukhāḥ kātara abhīta aye ca māyāvinaḥ raṇe haṃ tāraḥ nirayam yānti uvācakāḥ para nyāsa apahartāraḥ vimukhāḥ santi tattvataḥ rātrauvā vipina naṣṭe corāḥ sāhasa kāriṇaḥ sarva bhakṣa rata amūḍha mleccha go brahma ghātakāḥ uvācakāḥ pare mlecchāḥ ete ye kūṭa yonayaḥ teṣām paiśācikī bhāṣā loka ācāraḥ ūna vidyate na asti śaucam tapaḥ jñānam na deva pitṛ tarpaṇam dāna śrāddha ādikam yajṣa isurāṇām ca prapūjanam pitṝṇām cana śuśrūṣā dvija deva tapasvinām jñāna lopāt atas teṣām mala śaucam na vidyate mātaram bhaginīm ca anyām gṛhiṇīm kāmayanti ca ca anyeṣām gotra vāsinām kula jātāḥ sadā daityāya eṣām puṇyam akāraṇam durgatim ca mṛta āyānti dvija strī śiśu ghātinaḥ gavāśinaḥ durātmānaḥ hi abhakṣya bhakṣaṇa īratāḥ kīṭa yonim vrajam ca pipīlikāḥ agrajaḥ sahajaḥ teṣām sadṛś na u grāmya vṛttayaḥ lomakeśa praṇetāraḥ kravyabhakṣa ratā bhuvi sāhasam ca vratam dānam snānam yajṣa ādikam matsya mām sādi iṣu prīta a mṛṣā vacana bhāṣiṇaḥ sadā kāmāḥ sadā lobhāḥ sadā krodha mada anvitāḥ ku bhṛtyāḥ ku jana prītāḥ pūti gandha ratāḥ narāḥ na deveṣu na vijṣeṣu na dharma śravaṇeṣu ca stotra mantra ādike puṇye yathā kāryeṣu aniḥ ca yāḥ bahu roga adhiroṣāḥ ca bahu rūpa paricchadāḥ nara jātiṣu daityānām cihnāni etāni bhū tale na jānanti param lokam na gurum svam na ca aparam svapna idānam na jānanti bhakṣaṇa anna paricchadam gopāyanti dhanam yasmāt te yakṣa anara rūpiṇaḥ pra ca rājani teyakṣa a durgati sthāḥ ca parārtha ibhāra vāhakāḥ pretānām lakṣaṇam yat vā sarva loka vigarhitam strīṇām ca puruṣāṇām ca śṛṇuṣva ekamanā amama mala paṅka dharāḥ nityam satya śauca vivarjitāḥ takum tala vastrāṇām vapuṣaḥ umalasam cayāḥ gṛha pīṭha ādi pātrāṇām sakṛt śaucam na rocate na paśyanti sukham strīṇām viśanti kānane drutam vighasa ucchiṣṭa pūtīnām bhakṣaṇebhiḥ kadācid svastha tā nāsti kvacid vā aśuci tā tanau lakṣaṇam nara lokeṣu pretānām īdṛśam kila hita ahitam na jānanti mitra amitram guṇa aguṇam pāpa puṇya ādikam sthānam snānam deva dvija arcanam ari mitram udāsīnam navim danti svabhāvataḥ martya sthāḥ paśavaḥ te ca jṣāyam te buddhi sam mataiḥ buddhyā a nānātva bhāvāḥ ca bhramanti ca mṛṣā bhuvi yakṣa rūpāḥ narāḥ te ca sarva karma bahiṣkṛtāḥ eṣām bhedam pravakṣyāmi lakṣaṇam dharaṇī tale vijāta amartya lokeṣu pāpasya eva anurūpataḥ malīmasa bhuvi prastham nāgaram chadma rūpiṇam vighasa ādi prabho kta araṅkākam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ abhakṣye nirataḥ pāpaḥ kukuraḥ pūti pravṛttaḥ sarva gṛhyeṣu bhakṣya abhakṣya sa jīvanaḥ bhūmyām paśu ādi yonīnām kuleṣu sambhavāḥ śunaḥ vigṛhya hastena mlecchānām bhakṣaṇa priyāḥ viśeṣāt sūkarāṇām ca tathā caraṇa yodhinām poṣaṇe bhakṣaṇe prītāḥ pūti garhyeṣu a sādhuṣu parvate karaṇāt vahneḥ kāṣṭha sam caya saṅgrahe vijṣeyāḥ te sadā mlecchāḥ kṣatriyāṇām bhaya ākulāḥ lokānām naṣṭa dharma ica sat āśauca vivarjite kulīnānām tadā mlecchāḥ bhaviṣyanti cadasyavaḥ tasmin kāle janāḥ sarve duḥkha roga pratāpitāḥ durbhikṣa anna parāmūḍhāḥ sadā rāja prapīḍitāḥ tatra asatya īrata amartyāḥ sarva śauca vivarjitāḥ tejanaiḥ eva purāṇa āgama sam hitāḥ sa priyāḥ pāpāḥ sarva bhakṣāḥ su dāruṇāḥ dāruṇa ācāra niratāḥ nityam chala parāyaṇāḥ na puṣṇanti sutāḥ tātam prasuvam ca gurūn api na śuśrūṣanti vaibhṛtyāḥ svāminam guṇa śālinam bhartāram na striyaḥ kāścid śvaśurau ca sva mātaraḥ nitya kaṣṭa anarāḥ tatra kalahaḥ ca gṛhe gṛhe nṛpa a mlecchāḥ surāpāḥ ca tathā a mantri purohitāḥ manuṣyaiḥ ca baliḥ teṣām matsyaiḥ mām saiḥ nirāmiṣaḥ pāṣaṇḍa āyāsa yogebhyaḥ pradhāna a guṇa vārtayoḥ tatas nyonyam priyā mūḍhau aneva anagareṣu ca bhakṣya ābha samaśnanti matsya mām sa ādikam narāḥ vane dvijātayaḥ ca anyebhum tam paśum tya punarbhavam pātayanti pitṝn pāpāḥ sarve te pūrvadevakāḥ piśāca arākṣasāya ica murtyaka aguhyaka adhruvam ete ca avinaya prītān a deva an ca mānuṣāḥ sam jayaḥ uvāca katham ca martya bhāveṣu lakṣam jānanti tāttvikāḥ etam me saṃśayam nātha dūrīkuru tatas tatas vyāsaḥ uvāca kṛta pāpa anurūpāḥ tu dvijātiṣu anya jātiṣu asura arākṣasāḥ pretāḥ svabhāvam na tyajanti te jātāye ca asura amartye sadāte kalaha utsukāḥ kuhakāḥ kaccarāḥ krūrāḥ vijṣeya rākṣasāḥ bhuvi jana udvigna ādikam dānam tathā deva arcanam bhuvi ugra bhāvāt dhanam labdhvā rājyam bhuṣjanti śāśvatam jayam śaurya ādikam puṇyam punar pāpa kṣayam vrajet evam urvyām tathā anāka nāga lokā iyam ālaye vāsudevam samārādhya prahlādaḥ sura pūjitaḥ tasya eva gaṇa mukhya tvam lebhe bhṛṅgī mahā balaḥ kecid daitya kule jātāḥ pṛthivyām sura sattamāḥ bhāvayanti pitṝn sarvān śata śotha sahasraśas ekena api su p p treṇa kula trāṇam ca dhīmatā ekaḥ upi vaiṣṇavaḥ putraḥ kula koṭim samuddharet ekorakṣati dharma ātmā puregrāmam janaṅkulam vijṣātṛmeduram ca āsīt brāhmaṇānām puram mahat tatra sarve dvijāḥ śaśvat sam dhyā upāsana tatparāḥ veda pāṭha rata adhīrāḥ deva atithi dvija arcakāḥ yajṣa vrata agnikarmāṇaḥ ṣaṭkarma pariniḥ ca yāḥ atikṛcchrecateṣām kurvanti satatam vīrāvratam yajṣam sanātanam tad projjhi tuṅgataḥ sopi rakṣā artham sthāpya ceṭikām tasyāḥ tu anavadhānena aśunā ācājyam ca bhakṣitam svīya mūtreṇa sambhṛtam ca ryam ca tatas vahnau lakṣitam tena tad kṣaṇāt kūṭam hema mayam sākṣāt svarṇam jām būnada prabham gṛhītvā tat mudā vipraḥ pāpa yogam cakāra ha mudā tatra yathāvṛttam kathitam tuta yā dvija kṛtaṅkarma durācāram śrutvā lobhāt asādhubhiḥ guru lobhāt ca su mahat svām viśati api paṅkāt deva bhayāt mohāt mati bhram śobhavat tatas striyaḥ duṣṭāḥ jana aduṣṭāḥ sarve pāpa balāt tadā tasya bhāryā tadā sādhvī puru duḥkhena sam yutā bhartāram kṛcchrasantaptā pura kāryam jagāda sā brāhmaṇī uvāca kaṣṭam tvām duḥkha sam yutam grāma ācāram imam yat vā api aparam kartum arhasi ete viprādurācārāḥ sa dārāḥ sa paricchadāḥ atipātaka yogāt ca mahāpātakasam matāḥ te apunarbhavam prāpya aparādha antaḥ na vidyate aham ekaḥ utra tiṣṭhāmi sva puṇya parirakṣaṇāt yat iyāsyāmi icān yatra itas uham tad kṣaṇāt priye kṣipram sacatayā sārdham yayau sīmām taram dvijaḥ sthitvā apaśyat purītā vat sthirā atiṣṭhati pūrvavat patim sādhvī purīcā iyam nanaśyati vimṛśyatām uvāca idam vipra varyaḥ su vismitaḥ vicārya sādhavam tyau upānahau tatra dhārayiṣyāmi kim nu vai evam uktvā apatim patyuḥ abhyāśataḥ udṛṣṭam puram tatas vipra ādayaḥ varṇāḥ kaccarāḥ pura vāsinaḥ kṛcchāt yama puram yānti nāsti teṣām ca niṣkṛtiḥ pūrvavat bhakṣaṇe prītaḥ hi adya pāpam karoti ca steya śīlaḥ niśā cārī budhaiḥ savam abudhaḥ sarva kāryeṣu ajṣātaḥ sarva karmasu samayā ācāra hīnaḥ tu paśuḥ eva sa bāliśaḥ evam uṣṭra ādayaḥ santi bhakṣa ādi nakula ādayaḥ vighasa ādi priyaḥ nityam naraḥ śvā kīrtitaḥ budhaiḥ calaḥ plavagaḥ kānana prītaḥ naraḥ śākhāmṛgaḥ bhuvi ca balavān krām ta śīlaḥ ca satatam ca anapatrapaḥ pūti mām haḥ samudāhṛtaḥ tad svanāt eva sīdanti bhītāḥ anyevṛka ādayaḥ te dūra darśinaḥ evamādi krameṇa eva vijānīyāt nareṣu ca surāṇām lakṣaṇam brūmaḥ nara rūpam vyavasthitam dvija deva atithīnām ca guru sādhu tapasvinām pūjā tapaḥ rataḥ nityam dharma śāstreṣu nītiṣu indrayaḥ sa akṣaraḥ ca api vidvān ca gīta nṛtya artha tattva vid ātma vidyā ādi kāryeṣu sarvatam trī svareṣu ca haviṣyeṣu ca sarveṣu gavyeṣu ca nirāmiṣe gandha mālyeṣu vastreṣu śāstreṣu ābharaṇeṣu ca samprītaḥ ca atithau dāne pārvaṇa ādiṣu karmasu snāna dāna ādibhiḥ kārye vrataiḥ yajṣaiḥ sura arcanaiḥ ca na klībam vāsaram bhavet ayam eva manuṣyāṇām sat ācāraḥ taram gaṃ bhīraḥ sarvadā devaḥ sadā eva mānavaḥ mṛduḥ prīti bhāvam param saukhyam sauhṛdam sukṛtam śubham preta ādīnām ca preteṣu paśau prītiḥ paśoḥ api kāka ādayaḥ sva jātau ca tathā anye ca sva jātiṣu prītāḥ bhavanti ca aprīta avidyā teṣām ca lakṣaṇam evam puṇya viśeṣeṇa sa viśeṣāsu jātiṣu priya apriyam vijānīyāt puṇya apuṇyam guṇa aguṇam patyoḥ na sukham kim cit jāti bhedāt nṛṇām bhuvi atipuṇyān labhet āyuḥ śobhanāḥ puṇya kāriṇaḥ pāpa ātmānaḥ labham te antam ye ca daitya ādayaḥ narāḥ kṛte jātāḥ surā bhūmauna daityāḥ ca anya jātayaḥ tretāyām eka pādam ca dvi padam dvāpare yuge sam dhyāyām ca saṅkulam deva ādīnām bhavet jātam bhāratam yat pravartitam aśvatthāmā haraḥ sākṣāt hariḥ naṃ da kula udbhavaḥ pañca indrāḥ pāṇḍavāḥ jātāḥ viduraḥ dharmaḥ eva ca gām dhārī draupadī kum tī caitā devyaḥ dharā tale deva daityāḥ kaleḥ madhye daityāḥ śeṣe ca mānavāḥ utpatsyam te sadā pretāḥ kravyādāḥ paśu pakṣiṇaḥ teṣām ca kulaṭā dāsī nitya kaṣṭa ayavīyasī nityam dvam dveṣu vaiśam pāyanaḥ uvāca daitya ādīnām mṛṣābhāvāt sura tvam na sura ālayam rājyam āyuḥ tathā a kīrtiḥ abhīṣṭam dayitam balam nīti vidyā ādikam bhāvyam janma vṛddham sanātanam dāna adhyayana karmāṇi yajṣa ādi ca katham prabho etat āptāya śiṣyāya mahyam bho vaktum arhasi vyāsaḥ uvāca daityānām sāhasāt deva tapaḥ bhavati niścitam viguṇaiḥ etaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ pūtaḥ sa bhavet sura lakṣaṇaḥ purāṇa āgama karmāṇi nākeṣu svayam ācarate puṇyam sa dharā uddharaṇa kṣamaḥ viśeṣāt vaiṣṇavam dṛṣṭvā prīyate pūjayet cayaḥ ṣaṭkarma nirataḥ vipraḥ sarva yajṣa rataḥ sadā viśvāsa ghātinaḥ ye ca kṛtaghnāḥ vrata lopinaḥ dvijadeveṣu vidviṣṭāḥ śātayanti dharām narāḥ pāpa ādyūta karma ratāḥ tathā pāṣaṇḍa patita ālāpāḥ śātayanti dharām narāḥ smṛti śāstra arthaka udvignāḥ śātayanti dharām narāḥ dāra tā dveṣāt śātayanti dharām narāḥ dīna anāthān pīḍayanti śātayanti dharām narāḥ ete ca anye ca bahavaḥ pāpa karma kṛtaḥ narāḥ puruṣān pātayitvā atuśātayanti dharām narāḥ yā edam śṛṇuyāt ramyam guhyāt guhyam param hitam na akāle maraṇam tasya na ca pāpaiḥ pralipyate kalpam kalpam divam bhuktvā a mokṣa mārgam vrajati asau iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe puṇyavyaktiḥ nāma ṣaṭsaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vaiśam pāyanaḥ uvāca kaḥ yat kaḥ vā aprabhāvaḥ sya kutra jātaḥ ghṛṇi īśvaraḥ kiṅkaraḥ oti hi kāryam nikhilaiḥ mānuṣaiḥ pūjyaḥ sa daiva brāhmaṇa ādibhiḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca sākṣāt brahma mayam viddhi dharma kāma artha mokṣa dam mayūkhaiḥ nirmalaiḥ kūṭam ati caṇḍam su duḥsaham dṛṣṭvā pradudruvuḥ lokāḥ karaiḥ ca ṇḍaiḥ prapīḍitāḥ tatas ca sāgarāḥ sarve vara nadyaḥ nada ādayaḥ śuṣyanti jam tavaḥ tatra mriyam atha śakra ādayaḥ devāḥ brahmāṇam samupāgatāḥ ayam rajaḥ mayaḥ sākṣāt sudhām śuḥ tanu madhya gaḥ etābhyām pālita ālokāḥ trailokye sacarācarāḥ divya upapādakāt eva atra eva jarāyu jāḥ aṇḍa jāḥ sveda jāḥ ca eva ye vā atra eva udbhid ja ādayaḥ anena rakṣitā ālokāḥ janitāḥ pālitāḥ dhruvam asya eva sadṛśaḥ ūna asti sarveṣām parirakṣaṇāt yam ca dṛṣṭvā pi uṣaḥkāle pāpa rāśiḥ pralīyate tam ārādhya jana amokṣam sādhayanti dvijātayaḥ asya eva maṇḍala sthām ca devīm sam dhyā svarūpiṇīm dharāyām patita ucchiṣṭāḥ pūtāḥ te ca āsya raśmibhiḥ sam dhyā upāsana mātreṇa akalmaṣāt pūta tām vrajet dṛṣṭvā cāṇḍāla kaṅgoghnam patita kuṣṭha saṅga tam mahā pātaka saṅkīrṇam upapātaka sam vṛtam paśyanti yenarāḥ sūram na ca dāridryam na duḥkham na ca śocya tām ca deva hari hara ādayaḥ dhyāna rūpa pragamyāḥ te dṛṣṭaḥ devaḥ hi ayam smṛtaḥ devāḥ ūcuḥ astu prasādana ārādhyaḥ ca astu upāsana pūjanam sarvenara ādayaḥ sattva amṛta avasthā aṅga tā bhuvi asya tejaḥ prabhāveṇa praṇaṣṭāḥ sāgara ādayaḥ na samarthau ayam soḍhum katham anye pṛthagjanāḥ tasmāt tava prasādāt ca pūjayāmaḥ yathā aravim devānām vacanam śrutvā gataḥ brahma khageśvaram brahma rūpa dharaḥ sākṣāt duṣprekṣyaḥ pralaya analaḥ tvat ṛte sarva lokānām dina ekam prabhuḥ tvam sarva lokānām trātā goptā pitā prasūḥ cara acarāṇām sarveṣām tvad prasādāt hṛtam jagat rūpa gandha ādi kārī tvam rasānām svādu tā tvayā evam viśveśvaraḥ sūraḥ nikhila sthiti kārakaḥ tīrthānām puṇya kṣetrāṇām makhānām jagataḥ prabho tvam sarva sākṣī guṇa ākaraḥ sarva dhvām ca dāridrya duḥkha nāśanaḥ ādityaḥ uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājṣa viśvendra viśvabhāvaka brūhi śīghram param vidhe mayūkhaḥ tu ati caṇḍaḥ ca lokānām ati duḥsahaḥ ādityaḥ uvāca kiraṇāḥ koṭi koṭiḥ meloka nāśa karāḥ parāḥ na ca abhīṣṭa kara āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka āloka ravi vākya vaśāt dhruvam āhūya viśvakarmāṇam kṛtvā vajra mayīm bhrami amogham yama daṇḍam caśūlam paśupateḥ tathā kālasya ca paraḥ khaḍgaḥ śaktiḥ guru pramodinī caṇḍikāyāḥ param śastram vicitram śūlakam tathā cakre brahmā ajṣayā aśīghram tena eva viśvakarmaṇā sahasrakiraṇam śiṣṭam anyat ca eva praśātitam ayam carati viśvām temeru śṛṅgam bhramati api sūraḥ sam carata imāsān dvādaśa dvādaśa ātmakaḥ tis sarvaiḥ eva pratīyate tāsu yat vā aphalam brūmaḥ lokānām nikhilam mune dhanuḥ mithuna mīneṣu kanyāyām ṣaṣ aśītayaḥ vṛṣa vṛścika kum bheṣu sim he viṣṇupadī smṛtā tarpaṇam ca akṣayam viddhi dānam deva arcanam tathā bhavet viṣṇupadyām tulakṣam viṣṇupadyām tu yat dānam akṣayam parikīrtitam śītetūla paṭī dāna anna duḥkham jāyate tanau tulā dāne talpa dāne dvayoḥ eva akṣayam phalam sarva upakaraṇām śayyām yaḥ dadāti vimatsaraḥ varṇa mukhya āya vipra āyasa rāja padavīm labhet tathā eva agnim jalam da tvā nadī tīre pathi prage būla mūrvyāḥ adhipatiḥ bhavet satya bhāvāt dvijam natvā adhanīca akṣaya tām vrajet māghe māsya site pakṣe paṣcadaśyām ahar mukhe sulakṣaṇām cagām maṇiprabhām raupya khura pradeśām catathākām sya su dohanām etām nṛpaḥ da tvāt na ābharaṇam rājā āmaṇḍaleśa udhani īśvaraḥ bhojya annam brāhmaṇa id atvā akṣayam svargam aśnute dhānyam vastram tathā ābhṛti aṅgṛha pīṭha ādikam yaḥ dadāti dvijāgrya āyatam ca lakṣmīḥ namum ca ti cit dīyate dānam su alpam yad vā adeva arcanam stotram dharma ākhyāna pratiśravaḥ tṛtīyā māgha māsasya sitā manvam tarā smṛtā tasyām yat dīyate dānam sarvam akṣayam ucyate dhanam bhogyam tathā arājyam tara sthitam tasmāt dānam satām pūjā pretya ananta phala pradā manvam tarā tum aghesyāt saptamīyā aśiti itarā tithiḥ puṇyatamā proktā purāṇaiḥ akṣitā māgha māse site pakṣe saptamī koṭi bhāskarā tām upoṣya naraḥ puṇyām mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ sūrya grahaṇa tulya ahi śukla amā aghasya saptamī aruṇa udaya velāyām tasyām snānam mahā phalam tat merogam ca śokam tu saptamī jananī sarva bhūtānām saptamī saptasaptike arka patram yavāḥ puṣpam sugandham badarī phalam tad patre tāmra pātra iva āyuktam ānīya taṇḍulam yajṣa sūtram sasim dūram da tvā ācārgham su śobhanam sarva pāpaṅkṣayam yāti sapta janma kṛtam narakaiḥ pīḍyate etāvat rogaiḥ pāpaiḥ ca duḥkha daiḥ haviṣyam bhojayet annam śuddham ātapa taṇḍulaiḥ varjayet ca śilā ghṛṣṭam śṛṅgaberam tuśākakam koradūṣaka patram caram bhā chāgī ghṛtam tathā keśa kīṭa ādikam varjyam uṣṇa uda snānam eva ca anyat cana ācaret tatra dharmacim tām vinā avratī sauravratam mahā puṇyam purāṇaiḥ varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi varṣa koṭi śatāni ca bhogyam bhogyam evam svarga kṣayāt eva rājā abhūmau mahā dhanī tathā svayam sukham bhogyam ārogyam sampadam janmī bhāskarasya prasādataḥ mahā jayā iti vikhyātā yatra vijayā smṛtā vijayā koṭi lakṣam syāt anantam syāt mahājayā eṣām bhedam uttama ābharaṇaiḥ yuktam sat vāham yaḥ dadāti ha samudraiḥ saptabhiḥ juṣṭām bhūmim etya ari varjitām aśva hīnam capatra aṅgam vṛṣabhaiḥ vā api alaṅkṛtam hema māṣam dvi māṣam vā a dakṣiṇā vihita a budhaiḥ ratna bhāṇḍam mahā artham ca haimaiḥ eva kṛtam cayat svarṇam vā akevalam da tvā atri viṣṭapa dhana īśvaraḥ lakṣmīḥ vi mum arogī su prasanna ātma adasyu jetā apratāpavān yāvat prabhāsatebhānuḥ tāvat pūjya tamaḥ hisaḥ māgha ādau dvādaśīm māyām saptamīm kārayet satu iha abhīṣṭa phalam bhuktvā asuraiḥ ca eva prapūjyate arka aṅga saptamī vratam kṛtvā aca vidhivat budhaḥ pāpāt pūta eha abhīṣṭam samprāpya muktim āpnuyāt lakṣaṇam ca pravakṣyāmi māsi māsi cayaḥ vidhiḥ vratasya āsya prasādāt ca surāṇām pum nāmadheya nakṣatre gṛhṇīyāt saptamīvratam pum nāmadheya nakṣatrāṇi etāni āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ paṣcamyām eka bhaktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam prakīrtitam saptamyām upavāsam ca aṣṭamyām pāraṇam bhavet arka agram śuci gomayam yam phalam ca aśnu naktam upoṣaṇam ca vidhivat kṛtvā eka bhaktam tathā kṣīram vā api aśanam ghṛta aktam iti ca proktāḥ krameṇa amunā kṛtvā vāsarasaptamīm dinakṛtaḥ prāpnoti abhīṣṭam phalam arka agram grāmāt pūrvottara diś gata arka viṭa pasya śākhā agra sthitam viśiṣṭam sūkṣma patra dvayam sa toyam dantaiḥ a spṛṣṭam pātavyam śuci gomayam bhūmau apatitam madya aṅguṣṭhābhyām pala mātram dantaiḥ a spṛṣṭam sa toyam pātavyam su maricam avraṇam apurātanam sthūlam avaśuṣkam ekam dantaiḥ a spṛṣṭam sa toyam pātavyam toyam brahma pitṛ aṅgulī mūla prasaram pātavyam phalaṅkharjūra nārikelānām anyatamam taiḥ a spṛṣṭam pātavyam ghṛta aktam iti ca āhāram mayūraḍim bha parimāṇam ātmanā dviguṇām chāyām yadā kurvīta bhāskaraḥ tadā naktam vijānīyāt na naktam niśibhojanam anna dānan tatas kuryāt vidhi ukta parimāṇakam sarva lakṣaṇa sampūrṇam sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitam ādityam ciṃ tayet devam pūjā kāle viśeṣataḥ atha mantraḥ ca ayam japyaḥ eṣa paraḥ proktaḥ saptamyām vijaya āvahaḥ paścāt ca pāraṇā kāryā tathā aṣṭamyām viśeṣataḥ aṣṭamyām eva kartavyam navamyām na eva pāraṇam vrate phalam na ca āpnoti navamyām pāraṇe kṛte pāraṇam tu aparāhṇa itu kaṭu tikta amla varjitam taṇḍulam śodhayet yatnāt tṛṇa bīja ādikam tyajet mudga māṣa tila ādīni ghṛtam ca parivarjayet brāhmaṇān bhojayet bhaktyā aśaktaḥ kṣīra ādi havyakaiḥ yathāśakti anna pānaiḥ ca janaiḥ ca nirāmiṣaiḥ viprāya dakṣiṇām dadyāt vibhajya ca anurūpatas imām ananta phala dām yaḥ kuryāt saptamīm naraḥ māsi māsi dvijaśreṣṭha vratam kṛtvā arka tuṣṭaye yaḥ kuryāt pāraṇam bhaktyā sūrya lokam sa gacchati kalpa koṭim idam eva param guhyam bhāṣitam śam bhunā purā śravaṇāt satatam tasya vratasya paripālanāt śrāvayet vā api lokasya phalam tulyam prakīrtitam iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe arkāṅgasaptamīvratam nāma vaiśam mpāyanaḥ uvāca bhagavan stvad prasādāt ca śrutam mepāvanam vratam vyāsaḥ uvāca kailāsa śikhare ramye sukha āsīnam maheśvaram praṇamya śirasā bhūmauskam vāra ādeḥ yat phalam nātha śrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ īśvaraḥ uvāca nakta āhāram haviṣyām nnam kṛtvā svarga anna hīyate saptamyāḥ ca sat ācāram sarvam eva arkavāsare kurvataḥ prītim āpnoti sa gaṇaḥ parameśvaraḥ śūrasya sadṛśam yāti tithi vārasya pālanāt sarva kāma pradam puṇyam aiśvaryam roga nāśanam svarga dam mokṣa dam puṇyam raveḥ vārevratam hitam ravi vāra eṇa saṅkrām tyā saptamyā tad dineśive vrata pūjā ādikam ca āpyam sarvam ca akṣaya tām vrajet prāṇāt ahata vaktreṇa niḥsārya maṇḍale nyaset sarva rakta ābharaṇam dhyātvā a hastābhyām puṣpam vidhṛta saṅghrāya aiśānyām kṣipet ādityāya vidmahe bhāskarāya dhīmahi vilepanām tecapradīpakam tatas japyam stutim mudrām namaskāram tu kārayet aṃ jaliḥ prathamā mudrā dvitīyā dhenukā smṛtā evam yaḥ pūjayet arkam ravi sāyujyam āvrajet raveḥ tasya prasādāt tumuktam vārāṇasī taṭe skam daḥ uvāca tvam devānām guruḥ ekaḥ tvam vyāpta rūpī maheśvaraḥ sarva jṣaḥ vara daḥ nityam sarveṣām prāṇinām prabhuḥ duṣkṛtam te kutas nātha tathā krodhaḥ viśeṣataḥ śivaḥ uvāca lokānām ca hita arthāya pṛthak bhūtā a yuge yuge sarvam kurmaḥ vayam putra brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ na asmākam bandha mokṣau cana akāryam kāryam eva vā ekaḥ usau bahudhā bhūtvā kāla bhedāt anim ditaḥ vrajet mitraḥ mārgaśire māsi paupe viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ varuṇaḥ māgha māsa itu sūryaḥ vai phālguna itathā caitre māsi tapet bhānuḥ vaiśākhe tāpanaḥ smṛtaḥ jyeṣṭha māse tapet indraḥ āṣāḍhe tapateḥ raviḥ gabhastiḥ śrāvaṇe māsi yamaḥ bhādrapade tathā iti ete dvādaśa ādityām āsi māsi prakīrtitāḥ ururūpā mahā tejā āyuṅgām ta anala varcasaḥ akṣayam labhate svargam sukham rājyam yaśaḥ kramāt ūm ṃ namaḥ sahasrabāhave ādityāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ timira nāśāya śrī sūryāya namaḥ namaḥ tvam ca brahmā tvam ca viṣṇuḥ rudraḥ tvam ca namaḥ namaḥ sarvagaḥ sarva bhūteṣu na hi kim cit tvayā avinā ādityaḥ bhāskaraḥ sūryaḥ arkaḥ bhānuḥ divākaraḥ suvarṇaretāḥ amitraḥ ca pūṣā tvaṣṭā acatedaśa svayam bhūḥ timira āśaḥ ca dvādaśaḥ parikīrtitaḥ nāmāni etāni sūryasya aśuciḥ yaḥ tu paṭhet naraḥ sarva pāpāt ca rogāt ca muktaḥ yāti parām gatim sadūra aruṇa vigrahāḥ yāni nāmāni mukhyāni tat śṛṇuṣva ṣaḍānana loka sākṣī tri lokeṣu vyoma adhipaḥ divākaraḥ agni garbhaḥ mahā vipraḥ svargaḥ sapta aśva vāhanaḥ kālapriyam puṇḍarīkam mūlasthānam ca bhāvitam śṛṇu kārtika yatnena sarva pāpa haram śubham ūm ṃ indrāya namaḥ ūm ṃ viṣṇave namaḥ tikaraḥ ca eva sarva vighna vināśanaḥ nāśayet sarva rogān ca lūtā visphoṭaka ādikān kāmalā ādika rogān ca ye rogāḥ ca eva dāruṇāḥ tryahikam ca jvaram cāturthikam tathā kuṣṭham rogam kṣayam rogam kukṣi rogam jvaram tathā aśmarī mūtraṅkṛcchrān ca nānā roga āmayān stathā sambhavāḥ mardayantaḥ mahā rogāḥ amardita avedanā ātmakāḥ mūlamantram pravakṣyāmi sarva kāma artha sādhakam mantraḥ ca ayam aum hrāṃ hrīṃ saḥ sūryāya namaḥ bhayam bhavet sūryāvarta udakam yaḥ tu gṛhītvā tu krameṇa tu abhakteṣu anapatyeṣu pāṣaṇḍa laukikeṣu ca japyam ānetum naśyanti rogāḥ krūra grahāḥ tathā sarvaśām tis iyam vatsa sarva artha pratisādhakā dake prātar utthāya yoni tyam kīrtayiṣyati mānavaḥ śarīra ārogya kṛt ca eva dhana vṛddhi yaśaskaraḥ jāyate na atrasam dehaḥ yasya tuṣyet divākaraḥ eka kālam dvi kālam vā a tri kālam nityam eva ca yaḥ paṭhet ravi sānnidhye saḥ abhīṣṭam phalam āpnuyāt putra arthī labhate putram kanyā arthī kanyakām labhet vidyā arthī labhate vidyām dhana arthī labhate dhanam śṛṇuyāt sam yutaḥ bhaktyā śuddha ācāra samanvitaḥ puṇya sthāneṣu tīrtheṣu paṭhet koṭi guṇam bhavet grahe bhojyeṣu pūjāyām brahma bhojye dvija agrataḥ tapasvinām ca viprāṇām devānām agratas sudhīḥ yaḥ paṭhet pāṭhayet vā api sura loke mahīyate iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe sūryaśām ti rnāma aṣṭasaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekonāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca madhyadeśe svarāj samrāj bhadreśvara eti śrutaḥ devām stu pūjayet nityam subhāvena sadā khalu tatas bhiṣaj prayogāt ca lakṣaṇam dṛśyate purā ca mantriṇaḥ saḥ bravīt vacaḥ rājā uvāca kilbiṣam eka revi prāduḥsaham loka garhitam tasmāt puṇyam mahā kṣetram yatra ājṣāpayata dharma jṣāḥ paraloka hitāya vai vaṃśa hīnasya mevīrāḥ pretya amutra hitam cayat dvijāḥ ūcuḥ parityakte tvayā arāṣṭre dharma śīlena dhīmatā naṣṭam jagat idam rājam s tasmāt naḥ vaktum arhasi sūram mantraiḥ mahā devam yatnāt ārādhaya prabho rājā uvāca kena upāyena vipra indrāḥ toṣayiṣyāmi bhāskaram amedhyena atha kuṣṭhena loka an aṅgarhitena ca adṛśyaḥ sarva bhūtānām garhitaḥ asmi dvijātayaḥ kim kariṣyāmi rājyam ca kim syāt ārādhanena tu dvijāḥ ūcuḥ ākārṣīt tasya sūryasya parama ārādhanam cayat phalaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ arghaiḥ akṣata ātapa taṇḍulaiḥ japā puṣpa arka parṇaiḥ ca karavīra karam jakaiḥ arghyam audum mahiṣībhiḥ tathā ca arghaḥ bhoginībhiḥ samam tatas sarvaiḥ aṃ taḥpura sthaiḥ ca sa patnīkaiḥ ca rakṣibhiḥ arka śām tibhiḥ ati ugraiḥ stotra mantra ādibhiḥ paraiḥ tathā arkāṅgavratam ca anyat kṛtam taiḥ su samāhitaiḥ kramāt samām samāsādya rogasyām taṅgataḥ nṛpaḥ bāṇaiḥ jāyābhiḥ ālabhyam arka parṇa anya puṣpakam evam evam ahar puṇyam kṛtvā sarva jana priyam sam tuṣṭaḥ ubhūpam āgamya kṛpayā ācā abravīt vacaḥ varam varayaca abhīṣṭam yaḥ te manasi vartate sarveṣām vohita artha āyasa anugaḥpura vāsinām rājā uvāca sarveṣām naḥ param svargam tvad sakāśe bhavatu iti sūryaḥ uvāca amātyāḥ te dvijāḥ viprāḥ sa dārāḥ sa paricchadāḥ samplavam sura drumaiḥ su sampūrṇaiḥ prāsādaiḥ druma kalpakaiḥ pramadābhiḥ mahā bhāga nṛtya gīta ādibhiḥ paraiḥ paṣca kalpām tareḥ ājām anu ādautvam bhaviṣyasi ca purodhasaḥ tathā a janapada sthāḥ ca vidvān saḥ dhaninaḥ narāḥ tatra kīṭa ādayaḥ ye ca te pītāḥ sa suta ādayaḥ evam eva nṛpa viprā munayaḥ śam sita vratāḥ sūra svargam yayuḥ drutam kaiścid abhyarthitam vittam putra dārāḥ tathā aparaiḥ sukham svargam tathā ārogyam bhāskarasya prasādataḥ puṇya kūṭam idam bhadram yaḥ paṭhet mānavaḥ śuciḥ śṛṇoti saṃyataḥ martyaḥ saḥ ubhīṣṭam phalam āpnuyāt pāragaḥ sarva pāpānām bhāskarasya eva saṃsadi vāvadūkaḥ bhavet nityam śravaṇāt puṇyavān dhanī idam guhya ati guhyam ca bhāskareṇa pracāritam idam yamāya kathitam kṣitau vyāsena kīrtitam iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe bhadreśvara ākhyānam nāma ekonāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vaiśam pāyanaḥ uvāca ravi ādīnām grahāṇām ca sādhanam naḥ uvadat vija keteravi ādayaḥ teṣām ṣaḥ katham priyam kāle deśe tu samprāpte darśanam tat śiva aśivam vyāsaḥ uvāca śiva aśivam cakurvanti viśva karma kṣayāya vai sūraḥ kālaḥ om ca graheṣu ca udumbara palāśābhyām pallavābhyām juhoti yaḥ ākṛṣṇena iti mantreṇa mūlakena atha śām taye juhuyāt ājya yuktābhyām abhīṣṭa phala hetave śām taye sarva rogāṇām vadha bandha vimocane śitam ca chāgalam dadyāt sūrāya āditya vāsare saptamyām ca site pakṣe paṣcadaśyām tathā eva ca paramam ca amaram sattvam ābrahmastam bamātrake sambhāvayiṣyate sam taṅkramāt sarvam utpatti sthiti kāraṇāt prāṇa sargejanānām sa pātā viśvacaraḥ tanau śīrṣa anta sthaḥ sadā candraḥ dvis aṣṭa kalayā yutaḥ aharniśam sudhā vṛṣṭim dehe varṣati adhomukhaḥ mahā sattva anumātrakāḥ urvyām sasyāni puṣṇāti tathā sthāvara jaṅgamān etābhyām puṣpavadbhyām ca dhāritam janitam jagat tayoḥ ārādhanāt puṣṭiḥ sadā puṇyā aparārdhikā sādhayet sarva kāryāṇi sādhakaḥ sarvadā aśuciḥ na pūjayati yaḥ mohāt sudhām śum mānava adhamaḥ āyuḥ tasya kṣayam yāti narakam ca adhigacchati niṣkalaṅka kalā ādhāra gaṅgādhara śiromaṇe prakaroti naraḥ yaḥ tu saḥ abhīṣṭam phalam āpnuyāt śuklapakṣe tathā akṛṣṇe triyāmāyām viduḥ budhāḥ ūm ṃ somāya namaḥ iti japya mantraḥ prabhātejapanīyaḥ evam yaḥ pūjayet somam śrāvayet ca śṛṇoti vā iti soma pūjā sye dadhipūrṇe ghṛte śive svarṇe vā rājate vāre saumye kṛṣṇa bhave budham param bhavati saubhāgyam pīyūṣāt adhikam bhṛśam strīṇām ca puruṣāṇām cana daurbhāgyam kadācana rūpa saubhāgya kāma ūham dadhi pūrṇam ca bhājanam sya pātra stham dehi saubhāgya rūpakam dvijāya vākya pūrveṇa dadyāt vimatsaraḥ naraḥ śaktitaḥ dakṣiṇā deyā a tathā vastra ādikam navam bhojya annam sarva sampūrṇam tām būlam su manoharam puṣpa mālā ādikam dadyāt rūpa saubhāgya hetave evam yaḥ kuruta idānam soma uddiṣṭam dvijātaye iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe soma arcanam nāma aśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vaiśam pāyanaḥ uvāca udbhavam ṣam tu janeṣu ca prabhāvam vaibhavam tejaḥ śrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca sambhavaḥ devaḥ kujātaḥ pṛthivīsutaḥ sattva sthaḥ satva sampūrṇaḥ śūraḥ śakti dharaḥ bhuvi tīkṣṇaḥ krūragrahaḥ devaḥ lohitāṅgaḥ pratāpavān anena bharjitāḥ daityāḥ kravyādāya suradviṣaḥ daśā yogāt ca manujāḥ udbhijjāḥ paśu pakṣiṇaḥ vaiśam pāyanaḥ uvāca śam bhoḥ eṣa katham jātaḥ katham jātaḥ mahīsutaḥ guro mayī āpta bhāva itu vat aniḥsaṃśayam mukhāt vyāsaḥ uvāca hiraṇyākṣa kula idhīmān asurāṇām ca pārthivaḥ aṃ dhaka iti samākhyātaḥ daityaḥ sarva surām jātaḥ viṣṇu varā deva jātaḥ viṣṇu parākramaḥ tena eva nirjitāḥ devāḥ sa indrāḥ kratu bhujaḥ kramāt andhakena eva ca asmākam hṛtam rājyam sukham makhaḥ tasmāt tasya vadha upāyā ucyatām tat vidhīyatām na asti viṣṇu varā deva pīyūṣasya ca bhakṣaṇāt kurve loka hita arthāya śraddhām kāma samanvitām tyaktvā ekām pārvatīm durgām sthiram tatas kruddhaḥ jagatsvāmī tam cavaiḥ ūpya tām nayet evam uktvā prajādhyakṣaḥ śraddhām kāma samanvitām vicikitsām sva māyām ca preṣayāmāsatam prati tatas viceṣṭitaḥ kāmāt yoṣā anveṣaṇa tatparaḥ sva dārān para yoṣām cana apaśyat vicikitsayā dṛṣṭam ca himavat pṛṣṭheḥ strī ratnam ca ati śobhanam dṛṣṭvā ca pārvatīm daityaḥ kāmasya vaśagaḥ bhavat jñāna lopāt tatas durgām grahītum tām sacā icchati umā ca koṭavī rūpam kṛtvā dehasya ca ātmanaḥ īśvarasya anti tām sa sārasaḥ tatas kāma vicetāḥ ca unmattīkṛta cetanaḥ na jahāti śivām dhātrīm pārvatīm daitya puṅgavaḥ tatas dhyānāt samāgamya militaḥ pārvatīm dhavaḥ dṛṣṭvā tam ca sa daitya indraḥ pragataḥ tu svam ālayam ca śam bhum jetum samutsukaḥ gaurīm eva samānetum kāma mohāt acetanaḥ etat śrutvā tu tridaśāḥ gatvā tam dina īritāḥ daityān raṇa īmṛtān tatra daitya ācāryaḥ hi ajīvayat krodhāt śam bhuḥ tadā avākyam naṃ dinam nijagāda aha gaccha daitya ālayam vīra drutam evam amājṣayā paśyatām sarva daityānām daitya indrasya acasam sadi gṛhītvā ācikure atyartham bhārgavam tam durātmakam labdhvā āca asmad sakāśam vaivihvalam ca anaya kṣaṇāt tatas ūnam kāvyam taṅkum tale dhṛtvā daityānām puratas balāt ānayam tam ca tam daityāḥ jaghnuḥ praharaṇaiḥ śaraiḥ naśekuḥ te rujām kartum devānām agratas ūnam cakum tale gṛhītvā ā bhārga vaṃśam bhura surāṇām aṅgurum ruṣā dudrāva śaṅkaram tatra ghoraiḥ praharaṇa ādibhiḥ tridaśāḥ ca tathā ākruddhāḥ tatas vidyādhara ādayaḥ prayayuḥ samaram tatra daityānām ca bhṛśam ruṣā śātakumbha maya aṅgaiḥ teśaraiḥ vajra samānakaiḥ dīpayanti bhṛśaṅkām taiḥ tad gātra āṇi nabhām sica hatvā ācapātayāmāsuḥ kāśyapāḥ sura sattamāḥ jagat vyāptam mahā sainyam vṛtam nītam kṣayam suraiḥ sarvaiḥ śastraiḥ pratyayitaiḥ kṣaṇāt śūla uddhṛtaḥ upi su ciram a vinaṣṭaḥ atha namra dhīḥ nītvā a kṛtaḥ bhṛṅgīḥ iṭiḥ dvija tatas devān samābhāṣya śukram udgīrṇavān śivaḥ śukraḥ śivam samābhāṣya gataḥ daityān mudā anvitaḥ evam bhaumaḥ samutpannaḥ uharām śobhū samudbhavaḥ daśa ādi ariṣṭe ca tathā gocare niṣṭa rāśi ge trikoṇe maṇḍale ca eva rakta puṣpa anulepanaiḥ putrān sukham yaśaḥ ca eva kim bhūyas śrotum icchasi vyāsaḥ uvāca etat vaḥ kathitam śiṣya adharma ākhyānam śubha āvaham dvijātīnām puṇya dam ca sam sevyam ca śubha īpsubhiḥ yathāsukham evam viśrāvya bhagavān vyāsaḥ satyavatī sutaḥ nirṇīya dharmam vividham śamyāprāsam agāt suta tvam yathāsukham viharasva ayathākālam gāyamānaḥ harim mudā lokān dharmam ca upadiśan prīṇayan jagatām gurum nārāyaṇam muni varam draṣṭum badarikāśrame iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe bhauma utpatti pūjanam nāma ekāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvyaśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhīṣmaḥ uvāca ca pūjanam kathaya adhunā saumyaḥ krūraḥ grahaḥ jṣeyaḥ śubha aśubha pradaḥ nṛṇām śara ākāram maṇḍalam harinmaṇi samaiḥ varṇaiḥ cūrṇaiḥ kuryāt tu maṇḍalam pūjayet tatra gandha ādyaiḥ puṣpaiḥ dhūpaiḥ su śobhanaiḥ dānam ca vidhivat kuryāt daśāriṣṭe ca gocare karpūrāḥ ca eva mudgāḥ ca harit vastram harinmaṇiḥ suvarṇam ca yathāśakti dadyāt bodhana tuṣṭaye somaputra mahā prājṣa veda vedāṅga pāraga iti stutvā mahā rāja budham bhaktyā samāhitaḥ prāpnuyāt nikhilān kāmān somasūnu prasādataḥ guroḥ ca pūjanam proktam paṭṭa sa ākāra maṇḍale pīta varṇaiḥ su niṣpannaiḥ cūrṇaiḥ ājan su śobhanaiḥ daśa agocarayoḥ dauṣṭye dānam dadyāt ca śaktitaḥ caṇaka dvi dalam ca eva pīta vastram suvarṇakam puṣya rāgam tuvi prāya dadyāt ca ariṣṭaśām taye bṛhaspate sura ācārya sarva śāstra viśārada dānena anenasam evaṅkṛta itu rāja indra sva anukūlaḥ bhavet guruḥ bhārgavasya api vakṣyāmi pūjanam nṛpate adhunā yat kṛtvā sarva kāma āptiḥ samyak pum sām prajāyate paṣca koṇam samuddiṣṭam maṇḍalam bhārgavasya tu cūrṇakaiḥ śveta varṇaiḥ ca vidhinā a su dhiyā kṛtam pūjayet bhārgavam bhaktyā naraḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ raupyam ca dakṣiṇā dānam yathāśakti prakīrtitam daśa ādi ariṣṭa ica utpanna isitam aśvam pradāpayet taṇḍulāḥ śveta vastram ca raupyam danam eva ca karpūram ca su gandha āḍhyam deyam dānam dvijātaye bhṛguputra mahābhāga dānavānām purohita dānena anenasam tuṣṭaḥ bhava sarva asura arcita tasya tuṣṭaḥ bhavati āśu bhārgavaḥ dana śanais ca rasya pūjā artham maṇḍalam canara ākṛti kṛtvā ācūrṇaiḥ kṛṣṇa varṇaiḥpūjayet tatra bhaktitaḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ gandhaiḥ ca puṣpaiḥ ca vastraiḥ ca api tathāvidhaiḥ loham ca dakṣiṇā dānam piṇyākam ca tilasya ca dānam śanais ca suvarṇam ca yathāśakti dadyāt nīlamaṇim tathā sūrya sūno mahā bhāga chāyā putra mahā bala adhas dṛṣṭebhava śane prasannaḥ asmāt pradānataḥ evam stutvā aśanim bhaktyā ayaḥ ca dadyāt dvijātaye rāhoḥ varṇa ādikam sarvam śani vat maṇḍalam tathā sūrya ākāram samuddiṣṭam tatra pūjā arka sūnu vat gomedam sarṣapāḥ ca eva tilāmāṣāḥ ca kṛṣṇakāḥ rāhoḥ prakīrtitam bhavatuṣṭaḥ mahā bhāga dānena anena suvrata ketoḥ maṇḍala kaṅkuryāt dhvaja ākṛti su śobhanam śani vat sakalam pūjā varṇa ādikam nṛpa saptadhānyam samuddiṣṭam sa svarṇam ketu dānakam evaṅkṛte sva anukūlau bhavetām ca nṛṇām nṛpa pradadyātām dhanam putrān sukham saubhāgyam eva ca ākṛṣṇa iti raveḥ mantraiḥ emam devāḥ tathāvidhoḥ śaneḥ ca ketoḥ ketum iti smṛtaḥ ete mantrāḥ samuddiṣṭāḥ a grahaṇām pūjanejape evaṅkṛte nṛpa śreṣṭha anukūlāḥ akhila āgrahāḥ etat mahā rāja maya asamastam tubhyam samuddiṣṭam ihakrameṇa śrutvā naraḥ sarva śruta artha sāram eti īśvarasya eva ca sannidhānam idam pavitram yaśasaḥ nidhānam idam pitṝṇām ativallabham syāt idam ca deveṣu pātakinām sām iti paṭhati yaśasyam yaḥ śṛṇoti iha bhaktyā madhu murana kāreḥ arcanam vā atha paśyet yā edam śṛṇuyāt nityam ṛṣīṇām caritam śubham santi tretāyām jñānam eva ca abhayam sarva bhūtānām nāstidānam atas param dānam pradhānam śūdrasya tu iti āha bhagavān prabhuḥ dānena sarva kāma āptiḥ tasya sam jāyate tapaḥ puṇyam pavitram āyuṣyam sarva pāpa vināśanam purāṇam etat kathitam tīrtha śrāddha anuvarṇanam śṛṇoti yaḥ paṭhet vāpī śrī mānsam jāyate naraḥ idam mahā rāja agādi tubhyam puṇyam mahā pātaka nāśanam ca sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam idam rājan mayā tubhyam prakīrtitam purāṇasya ādi bhūtam ca navadhā sṛṣṭi pauṣkaram dvijebhyaḥ śrāvayet vidvān yaḥ ca vai śṛṇuyāt paṭhet iti śrī pādma purāṇe sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe purāṇāvatāre graha arcana varṇanam nāma dvyaśītimaḥ adhyāyaḥ sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam samāptam śubham bhavatu atha śrī pādme mahā purāṇe dvitīyam bhūmi khaṇḍam prārabhyate ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ śṛṇu sūta mahā bhāga sarva tattva artha kovida sandeham āgatam vidvan dāruṇam buddhi nāśanam kecid paṭhanti prahlādam purāṇeṣu dvijottamāḥ paṣca varṣa anvitena api keśavaḥ paritoṣitaḥ nihataḥ vāsudevena praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavīm tanum sūtaḥ uvāca kaśyapena purā jṣātam kṛtam vyāsena dhīmatā brahmaṇā kathitam pūrvam vyāsasya agre svayam prabhoḥ tam evam hi pravakṣyāmi bhavatām agratas dvijāḥ sandeha kāraṇam jātam chinnam devena vedhasā vyāsaḥ uvāca śṛṇu sūta mahā bhāga brahmaṇā paribhāṣitam jāta mātraḥ sarva sukham vaiṣṇavam mārgam āśritaḥ mahā bhāgavata śreṣṭhaḥ prahlādaḥ deva pūjitaḥ viṣṇunā saha yuddhāya sa putraḥ saṅga raṅgataḥ nihataḥ vāsudevena praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavīm tanum sṛṣṭi bhāvam śṛṇuṣva tvam asya eva ca mahātmanaḥ saṅgaram prāpya putra ādyaiḥ viṣṇunā saha vīryavān praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavam tejaḥ samprāpya svena tejasā purākalpe mahā bhāga yathā jātaḥ sa vīryavān vṛttām tam tasya vīrasya pravakṣyāmi samāsatas paścime sāgarasya ante dvārakā nāma vai purī śivaśarmā iti vikhyātaḥ veda śāstra artha kovidaḥ tasya api paṣca putrāḥ tu babhūvuḥ śāstra kovidāḥ yajṣaśarmā vedaśarmā dharmaśarmā tathā eva ca viṣṇuśarmā mahā bhāgaḥ nūnam tad karma kovidaḥ paṣcamaḥ somaśarmā iti pitṛ bhakti parāyaṇaḥ na vidanti mahātmānaḥ tad bhāvena tu bhāvitāḥ teṣām tu bhaktim sampaśyan śivaśarmā dvijottamaḥ cintayāmāsa medhāvī niṣkarṣiṣye sura uttamān pitṛ bhakteṣu yaḥ bhāvaḥ na eteṣām manasi sthitaḥ yathā jānāmi aham ca atha kariṣye buddhi pūrvakam sat bhāvam cintayāmāsa aṣjana artham dvijottamāḥ upāyam brāhmaṇa śreṣṭhaḥ tapasaḥ tejasaḥ kila cakāra saḥ api upājṣaḥ māyayā brahma vittamaḥ teṣām agre tatas vyājam śivaśarmā avyadarśayat mahatā a jvara rogeṇa mṛtā mātā vidarśitā taiḥ tu dṛṣṭa amṛtā mātā pitaram vākyam abruvan śivaśarmā uparibhavam putram bhakti parāyaṇam yajṣaśarmāṇam āhūya eti uvāca dvijottamaḥ śivaśarmā uvāca anena api su tīkṣṇena śastreṇa niśitena vai tat kṛtam tena putreṇa yathā deśaḥ śrutaḥ pituḥ samāyātaḥ punar paścāt pitaram vākyam abravīt yathā ādiṣṭam tvayā atāta tat sarvam kṛtavān aham samādiśam amānyat cakārya kāraṇam adya ca tam ājṣāya mahā bhāgam pitṛ bhaktam saca dvijaḥ niścayam paramam jṣātvā advitīyasya vicintayan vedaśarmāṇam āhūya gacchatvam mama śāsanāt darpa mohitaḥ māyayā ādarśita anārī sarva saubhāgyasam padā enām ānaya vat sattvam mama arthekṛta niścayaḥ pitaram tam namaskṛtya tām uvāca gataḥ tatas tvām devi yācateta atas kāma bāṇa prapīḍitaḥ evam ākarṇitam tasya māyayā āvedaśarmaṇaḥ jarayā āpīḍitasya api na eva icchāmi kadācana bhavam tam rūpa saubhāgyaiḥ guṇa ratnaiḥ alaṅkṛtam kim kariṣyasi tā tena vṛddhena śṛṇu mānada vedaśarmā uvāca na īdṛśam mām vadeḥ devi pitṛ bhaktim anāgasam pituḥ artham samāyātaḥ tvām aham prārthayeḥ śubhe drāṃ stvam samaheśvarān kim mahā bhāga darśaya sva tvam ātmanaḥ vedaśarmā uvāca mayā āhūtāḥ samāyātāḥ aindra ādyāḥ sura sattamāḥ vedaśarmā uvāca yadi devāḥ prasād nāme prasāda sumukhāḥ yadi dadam bhaktim pādayoḥ pituḥ eva me evam astu surāḥ sarve yathāyātāḥ tathāgatāḥ tam uvāca tathā a dṛṣṭvā a dṛṣṭam te tapasaḥ balam vedaśarmā uvāca dhanyaḥ ūha madyasam jātaḥ muktaḥ ca eva ṛṇa trayāt sva śiraḥ devi dāsyāmi gṛhyatām gṛhyatām śubhe śitena tīkṣṇa dhāreṇa śastreṇa dvija sattamaḥ tava arthe preṣitam vipra putreṇa vedaśarmaṇā etat śiraḥ saṅgṛhāṇa nikṛttam ca ātmanā ātmanaḥ tava arthe dvija śārdūla mām eva tasya taiḥ bhrātṛbhiḥ dṛṣṭam sāhasam vedaśarmaṇaḥ vepita aṅga tvam āpannāḥ te babhūvuḥ parasparam mṛta anaḥ dharma sādhvī sāmātā satya samādhinā ayam eva mahā bhāgaḥ pituḥ artha imṛtaḥ śubhaḥ dhanyaḥ yam dhanya tām prāptaḥ pituḥ arthekṛtam śubham evam sambhāṣitam taiḥ tu bhrātṛbhiḥ puṇya cāribhiḥ samākarṇya dvijaḥ vākyam jṣātvā abhakti parāyaṇam nikṛttam ca śiraḥ tena putreṇa vedaśarmaṇā dharmaśarmāṇam āha athaśiraḥ etat pragṛhyatām iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarmacarite prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca tat ādāya mahātmā sauniḥ jagāma tvarā anvitaḥ dharmam ākṛṣṭavān ca eva dharma śarmā tatas tadā samākṛṣṭaḥ tu vaidharmaḥ tapasā tasya dhīmataḥ dharmaśarmāṇam āyātā idam vacanam abravīt kasmāt tvayā a samāhūtaḥ dharmaśarman samāgataḥ tapaḥ pitṛ bhaktyātavabhrātā vedaśarmā mahā bhujaḥ tapasā anena tuṣṭaḥ smi pitṛ bhaktyā mahā mate evam ākarṇitam tena su vākyam dharmaśarmaṇā vaivasvatam mahātmānam sam uvāca mahā yaśāḥ dehim etu acalām bhaktim pituḥ pāda arhaṇe punar prasupta vat mahā prājṣaḥ dharmaśarmāṇam abravīt kvasā devī gatā bhrātar kva sa tātaḥ bhavet iti samāsena samākhyātam yathā pitrā aniyojitaḥ samājṣāya tatas hṛṣṭaḥ dharmaśarmātam abravīt mama adya eva mahā bhāga śirasā jīvitena ca sam mukhībhava vaibhrātar kaḥ nyomā tvādṛśaḥ bhuvi bhrātaram ca evam ābhāṣya autsukaḥ pitaram prati gamanāya matim cakre bhrātrā ca dharmaśarmaṇā dvau etau tu gatau tatra pitaram hṛṣṭa mānasau dvābhyām tatra samāsthāya śivaśarmāṇam uttamam dharmaśarmā atadā uvāca pitaram dīpti sam yutam vedaśarmā samānītaḥ tam putram pragṛhāṇa bhoḥ śivaśarmā atataḥ hṛṣṭaḥ bhaktim vijṣāyatasya ca nakir cit abravīt tam tupunaścim tām upeyivān viṣṇuśarmāṇam ābhāṣīt vatsam eva indra lokam vrajasva adyatasmāt ānaya ca amṛtam anayā akāntayā sārddham sthātum icchāmi sām pratam sāgarāt yat samutpannam amṛtam vyādhi nāśanam sādhunā icchati imām eṣā ayathā enām tulabhāmi aham tathā kuruṣva aśīghram tvam anyathā anyam prayāsyati vṛddham jṣātvā avamanyeta eyam bālā asurūpiṇī evam ākarṇya tat vākyam pituḥ tasya mahātmanaḥ viṣṇuśarmā atadā uvāca pitaram dīpta tejasam evam ābhāṣya dharma ātmā a viṣṇuśarmā a mahā matiḥ pitaram tam namaskṛtya punar kṛtvā apradakṣiṇam am tarikṣa gataḥ ca āsīt gacchamānasya dhīmataḥ iti śrī padma purāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarmacarite dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca prasthitaḥ tena mārgeṇa praviṣṭaḥ gaganām tare sa dṛṣṭaḥ devadevena sahasrākṣeṇa dhīmatā udyamam tasya vaijṣātvā cakre vighnam sura adhirāj menikām tām mama śāsanāt samācarasva asya śīghram gatvā avighnam sumadhyame tathā kuruṣva bhadram te yathā an āyāti me gṛham evam ākarṇya tad vākyam menikā prasthitā tvarāt sūtaḥ uvāca rūpa audārya guṇa upetā sarva alaṅkāra bhūṣitā danasya vanasyām tedolāyām samupasthitā su svareṇapragāyam tīgītam vīṇā svara upamam tena dṛṣṭā viśāla akṣī caturā cāru locanā indreṇa preṣitā ca eṣā an ca bhadra karā bhavet evam jṣātvā jagāma atha sa tvareṇa dvijottamaḥ tayā adṛṣṭaḥ tathā pṛṣṭaḥ kva yāsi asi mahā mate menikā viṣṇuśarmāṇam prati uvāca priyam punar kāma bāṇaiḥ prabhinnā aham tvām adya śaraṇaṅgatā yāvat hi tvam mayā adṛṣṭaḥ kāma ākulita cetasā dagdhā atāvat eva na saṃśayaḥ tapta a prasāda su mukhaḥ bhava viṣṇuśarmā uvāca bhavatyāḥ ca prajānāminā aham ca etādṛśaḥ śubhe śivaśarmaṇaḥ kāma ādayaḥ mahā doṣāḥ ādau eva vinirjitāḥ anyam bhaja viśāla akṣi indra lokam vrajāmi aham niṣphalā menakā jātā pṛṣṭā devena vajriṇā vibhīṣām darśayāmāsa nānā rūpām punar punar yathā anala inasam dagdhāḥ tṛṇānām sam cayā dvijāḥ bhasmībhūtā abhavam pralayaṅgata astu ghora tā dāruṇa abhīṣika abhīṣika advijāḥ sa vighnān darśayāmāsa sahasrākṣaḥ punar punar tejasā anāśayat vipraḥ svakīyena mahā yaśāḥ evam vighnān bahūm indrasya api mahātmanaḥ nāśayāmāsa medhāvī tapasaḥ tejasā api vā naṣṭeṣu teṣu vighneṣu dāruṇeṣu mahatsu ca kṛtān vighnān dāruṇān bhīṣaṇa ākṛtīn atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ viṣṇuśarmā dvijottamaḥ indram indra lokāt aham ca indram pātayiṣyāmi nā anyathā evam anyam kariṣyāmi devānām pālakam punar tāvat eva samāyātaḥ deva indraḥ pākaśāsanaḥ damena satya śaucābhyām tvad samaḥ na asti ca aparaḥ mama aparādham tvam tum arhasi sattama viṣṇuśarmā atadā uvāca devarājam tathāgatam tejaḥ bhaṅgaḥ ūna karttavyaḥ brāhmaṇānām mahātmanām nāśayam tenasam dehaḥ yadi ruṣṭāḥ dvijottamāḥ ātma tapaḥ prabhāveṇa anyasmai tvam mahātmane dātu kāmaḥ tusam jātaḥ roṣa pūrṇena cakṣuṣā amṛtam dehi deva indra pitṛ bhaktim tathā acalām evaṃvidham varam dehi yadi tuṣṭa asi śatru han evam dadāmi puṇyam tevaram ca amṛtasam yutam evam ābhāṣya tam vipram amṛtam dattavān svayam sa kumbham dattavān stasmai prīyamāṇena ca ātmanā evam vipram su duḥsaham viṣṇuśarmā atataḥ gatvā pitaram vākyam abravīt tāta aindrāt samānītam amṛtam vyādhi nāśanam etat vākyam mahat śrutvā śivaśarmā sutasya hi sutān sarvān samāhūya prīyamāṇena cetasā pitṛ bhaktāḥ suta yūyam mad vākya paripālakāḥ varam vṛṇudhvam su prītāḥ putraka a durlabham bhuvi evam ābhāṣitam tasya śuśruvuḥ matāḥ asmākam diram nīrujā bhavanāt devī prasādāt tava suvratā bhavān pitā iyam mātā janma janmām tarepitaḥ śivaśarmā uvāca adya eva apimṛta amātā bhavatām putra vatsalā jīvamānā suhṛṣṭā sā eṣyate na atra saṃśayaḥ evam ukte śubhe vākye ṛṣiṇā aśivaśarmaṇā teṣām mātā samāyātā a prahṛṣṭā vākyam abravīt striyaḥ loke mahā bhāgāḥ su puṇyāḥ puṇya vatsalāḥ puṇyān putrān prasūyeta sā nārī puṇya bhāginī kula ācāram kula ādhāram pitṛ mātṛ pratārakam vinā apuṇyaiḥ katham nārī sam prāpnoti suta uttamam puṇyaiḥ eṣa bhartā asu puṇya bhāj yasya vīryāt mayā aprāptāḥ yūyam putrāḥ tatas adhikāḥ evam puṇya prabhāvoyam bhavam puṇya vatsalāḥ jātāḥ pitṛ bhakti parāyaṇāḥ yajvānaḥ puṇya śīlāḥ ca tapaḥ tejaḥ parākramāḥ evam sam vardhitāḥ te tu tayā mātrā punar punar harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭāḥ praṇemuḥ mātaram sutāḥ putrāḥ ūcuḥ su puṇyaiḥ bhavatī puṇya kṛt mātā anobhāgyaiḥ tu pravartitā yasya a garbha udaram prāpya su puṇyaiḥ ca pravarddhitāḥ śṛṇudhvam māmakāḥ putrāḥ suvaram puṇya dāyakam mayi tuṣṭe sutā bhogān anubhum jam tucā akṣayān putrāḥ ūcuḥ asmān preṣaya go lokam vaiṣṇavam dāha varjitam gacchadhvam vaiṣṇavam lokam yūyam vigata kalmaṣāḥ mad prasādāt tapobhiḥ ca pitṛ bhaktyā anayā svayā eva mukte tu tena api su vākye ṛṣiṇā tatas śaṅkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ garuḍa ārūḍhaḥ āgataḥ sa putram śivaśarmāṇam iti uvāca punar punar putraiḥ sārddham samāgaccha caturbhiḥ puṇya kāribhiḥ anayā a bhāryayā a sārddham puṇyayā a pati kāmyayā śivaśarmā uvāca amīgaccham tuputrām eva iṣṇavam lokam uttamam kam cit kālam tu nā iṣyāmi bhūmau vai bhāryayā saha tyena somaśarmaṇā evam ukte śubhe vākye ṛṣiṇā asatya bhāṣiṇā tān uvāca atha deveśaḥ su putrān śivaśarmaṇaḥ viṣṇu rūpa dharāḥ sarve babhūvuḥ tad kṣaṇāt api indranīla samā varṇaiḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharāḥ sarva ābharaṇa saubhāgya a viṣṇu rūpa a mahā ojasaḥ hāra kaṅkaṇa śobhā āḍhyā ratna mālā abhiśobhitāḥ sūrya tejaḥ pratīkāśāḥ tejaḥ jvālābhiḥ āvṛtāḥ praviṣṭā avaiṣṇavaṅkāyam paśyataḥ śivaśarmaṇaḥ dīpam dīpāyathā āyānti tad vat līnām aha mate gatāḥ te vaiṣṇavam dhāma pitṛ bhaktyā dvijottamāḥ prabhāvam su satyam somaśarmaṇaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarma upākhyāne tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca gata iṣu teṣu go lokam vaiṣṇavam tamasaḥ param kaniṣṭham vākyam abravīt brāhmaṇaḥ uvāca amṛtasya mahā kumbham rakṣa dattam mayā adhunā tīrtha yātrām prayāsyāmi anayā bhāryayā saha evam astu mahā bhāga kariṣyerakṣaṇam śubham daśa varṣa pramāṇam tutapaḥ tepeniram taram kumbham rakṣati dharma ātmā divārātra matam punar sahi samāyātaḥ śivaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ māyām kṛtvā mahā prājṣaḥ bhāryayā sahatam sutam kuṣṭha roga āturaḥ bhūtvā tasya bhāryā ca tādṛśī mām sapiṇḍa upamau jātau dvau etau māyayā kṛtau samāgatau hitau dṛṣṭvā sarvatas hi su duḥkhitau kṛpayā aparayā āviṣṭaḥ somaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ tayoḥ pādam namaskṛtya bhaktyā anamitakam dharaḥ bhavādṛśaun apaśyāmi tapasā abhisamanvitam guṇa vrātaiḥ su puṇyaiḥ ca kim idam vartitam tvayi dāsavat devatāḥ sarva āvartam ādeśam prāpya vipra indra ākṛṣṭāḥ tejasā tava tava aṅga ekena pāpena gadaḥ yam vedanā anvitaḥ sam iyam sā katham duḥkham āpnoti kim na asti tapasaḥ phalam tam deva vat guru vatsalā sā akatham duḥkham āpnoti kuṣṭha rogam su duḥkha dam śivaśarmā uvāca śuśrūṣaṇam mahā bhāga yat ipuṇyam iha icchasi evam ukte śubhe vākye somaśarmā mahā yaśāḥ śuśrūṣām vā akariṣyāmi yuvayoḥ puṇya yuktayoḥ mayā apāpena duṣṭena kṛpaṇena dvijottama evam ābhāṣya duḥkhāt vātayoḥ duḥkhena duḥkhitaḥ śleṣma mūtra purīṣam ca ubhayoḥ paryaśodhayat pāda prakṣālanam cakre aṅgasam vāhanam tathā dvau etauhi guru vipraḥ saumaśarmā mahā yaśāḥ tīrtham nayati dharma ātma askam dham āropya sattamaḥ tarpaṇam ca pitṝṇām tu devatānām tu pūjanam dvābhyām api sadharmā ātmā asa kārayati nityaśas sam jṣāpayati su prītau dvau etauca mahā gurū prasvāpayati nityaśas vastra puṣpa ādikam sarvam tābhyām nityam prayacchati bhāgaḥ tābhyām api ca pūrayet mūlam payaḥ subhakṣya ādyam nityam eva dadāti asau tayoḥ tuvām chitam nityam somaśarmāṇam āhūya pitā akutsa tiniṣṭhuraḥ na kṛtam śobhanam mahyam sana evam nānāvidhaiḥ vākyaiḥ niṣṭhuraiḥ duḥkha dāyakaiḥ atāḍayat daṇḍa ghātaiḥ śivaśarmā asat āturaḥ sam tuṣṭaḥ sarva dāsaḥ pipitaram paripūjayet svīyam īkṣate amṛtam mad kṛte ca api ānītam viṣṇuśarmaṇā puṇya yuktaḥ sadharma ātma apitṛ bhakti paraḥ sadā śivaśarmāpitasya eva bhaktim mayā avaipūrvam iti uktam su putram yajṣasam jṣakam mātṛ khaṇḍān imān putra yatra tatra kṣipasva hi mad vākyam pālitam sāhasam tu kṛtam tena putreṇa vedaśarmaṇā nimeṣa mātram eva api sāhasam kārayet punar aparam satyasam pannam prabhāvam tapasaḥ punar nityam samārādhane pi adhikam tasmāt asya kṛtā bhakti bhāvāt tathā asatyāt na eva putraḥ praṇaśyati māyayā ca nija aṅge api kuṣṭha rogaḥ nidarśitaḥ śleṣma mūtra malānām ca ghṛṇām na eva karoti ca vraṇān viśodhayet nityam sva hastena mahā yaśāḥ pādasam vāhanam dadyāt śaucam ca eva mahā matiḥ duḥsaham vacanam mahyam dāruṇam sahatesadā bhartsane tāḍane ca eva sadā abhīṣṭa pravācakaḥ evam duḥkha samācāraḥ mama putraḥ mahā matiḥ duḥkhānām sāgaram manye bahu kleśaiḥ tu kleśitaḥ apaneṣyāmi aham duḥkham viṣṇoḥ ca eva prasādataḥ vicārya manasā vipraḥ śivaśarmā mahā matiḥ punar māyām cakāra atha kumbhāt apahṛtam payaḥ paścāt tam ca samāhūya somaśarmāṇam abravīt tava haste mayā adattam amṛtam vyādhi nāśanam yena nīruj bhavāmi adya prasādāt viṣṇuśarmaṇaḥ evam uktā itadā vākye ṛṣiṇā aśivaśarmaṇā samutthāya tvarā yuktaḥ somaśarmā kamaṇḍalum tam ca riktam tatas dṛṣṭvā hi amṛtena vinākṛtam iti cim tāparaḥ bhūtvā soma śarmā su duḥkhitaḥ pituḥ agreca vṛttām tam kathayiṣyāmi aham yadā tatas kopam prayāsyeta guruḥ mevyādhi pīḍitaḥ su ciram matiḥ yadi me satyam asti iti guru śuśrūṣaṇam yadi tapaḥ taptam mayā apūrvam nirvyalīkena cetasā tadā ghaṭaḥ amṛta yutaḥ bhavatu eṣa na saṃśayaḥ tāvat ca amṛta pūrṇaḥ tu punar eva abhavat ghaṭaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā aharṣasam yuktaḥ somaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ gṛhāṇa tvam pitar ca imam payaḥ kumbham samāgatam pānaṅkuru mahā bhāga gadān muktaḥ bhava aciram etat vākyam mahā puṇyam satya dharma arthakam punar śivaśarmā sutasya api śrutvā ācamadhura akṣaram harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭā idam vacanam abravīt iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarma upākhyāne caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ paṣcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śivaśarmā uvāca tapasā a dama śaucābhyām guru śuśrūṣayā tathā tyajām iva aikṛtam rūpam mattaḥ sukham avāpnuhi evam ukvāsutam vipraḥ darśayāmāsatām tanum yathāpūrvam dīptimam tau mahātmānau sūryabim ba upamau ubhau tatas sutam samāmam viṣṇoḥ prasādāt dharma ātmā bhāryayā asaha keśavam jagāma nija puṇyaiḥ ca yoga abhyāsena sattamaḥ praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavam dhāmasa muniḥ durlabham padam viṣṇoḥ tu cintanaiḥ nyāsa dhyāna jñānaiḥ stavaiḥ tathā na dānaiḥ tīrtha yātrābhiḥ dṛśyate madhusūdanaḥ samādhi jñāna yogena dṛśyate paramam padam mahā yogaiḥ yathā vipraḥ praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavīm tanum sūtaḥ uvāca aśma loṣṭa samam menekām canam bhūṣaṇam punar jita āhāraḥ sadharma ātmā anidrayā aparivarjitaḥ sa sarvān viṣayām tam apisevate yoga āsana samārūḍhaḥ niḥ āśā ūniḥ parigrahaḥ tasya prāpta amṛtyu kālasya vā etadā somaśarmāṇam anti ke mṛtyu kāletusam
