sūnunā atha devāḥ samāgatya nāgāhvayam pura uttamam abhyaṣim cat mahātmānam nahuṣam vīra mardanam munibhiḥ ca su siddhaiḥ ca āyunā tena bhūbhujā sametam śiva kanyayā bhāryā yuktaḥ divam jagāma dharma ātmā devaiḥ siddhaiḥ su pūjitaḥ puruṣaiḥ puṇya karma ākhyaiḥ īdṛśam puṇyam uttamam janitavyam mahā bhāga kim anyaiḥ śoka kārakaiḥ yathā jātaḥ sa dharma ātmā anahuṣaḥ pitṛ tārakaḥ kulasya dharttā sarvasya nahuṣaḥ jñāna paṇḍitaḥ āyoḥ sutasya apiśṛṇoti martyaḥ bhogān sa bhuktvā eti padam murāreḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne guru tīrtha māhātmye cyavana caritre nahuṣa ākhyāne saptadaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aṣṭādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ jaṅgā mukhepurā tāta rodamānā avara aṅganā netrābhyām aśrubim ca mahā jale puṣpāṇi divya rūpāṇi saugam dhāni mahā nti ca davaḥ asthi carma avaśeṣaḥ tu jaṭā cīra dharaḥ punar hema varṇāni divyāni nītvā śivam samarcayet mate arcayitvā aśivam saḥ utha kasmāt paścāt pradevati śṛṇuvat sa pravakṣyāmi vṛttām tam devanirmitam caritram sarva pāpa ghnam viṣṇoḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ yaḥ sauhuṇḍaḥ mahā vīryaḥ nahuṣeṇa hataḥ raṇe nihatam pitaram śrutvā a sa amātyam sa paricchadam āyu putreṇa vīreṇa nahuṣeṇa balīyasā jānanti devatāḥ sarva aduḥsaham samara aṅgaṇe huṇḍa ātmajaḥ vihuṇḍaḥ tu trailokyam haṃ tumudyataḥ pituḥ vairam kariṣyāmi haniṣye mānavān surān evam samudyataḥ pāpī deva brāhmaṇakam ṭakaḥ upadravam samārebhe prajāḥ pīḍayatecasaḥ tasya eva tejasā dagdhāḥ devāḥ ca indra purogamāḥ śaraṇam devadevasya jagmuḥ viṣṇoḥ mahātmanaḥ ūcuḥ capāhinaḥ nityam vihuṇḍasya mahā bhayāt śrī viṣṇuḥ uvāca tu devatāḥ sarvāḥ su sukhena mahā īśvarāḥ vihuṇḍam nāśayiṣyāmi pāpiṣṭham devakam ṭakam evam ābhāṣya tān devān māyām kṛtvā janārdanaḥ māyā mayam cakāra atha strī rūpaḥ ca guṇa anvitam cakāra rūpam atulam viṣṇoḥ māyā pramohinī vihuṇḍasya vadha arthāya rūpa lāvaṇya śālinī sa devānām vadha arthāya divya mārgam jagāmaha nam tetatomāyām apaśyat ditija īśvaraḥ tayā a vimohitaḥ daityaḥ kāma bāṇa kṛtām taraḥ ātma nāśam na jānāti kāla rūpām vara striyam tām dṛṣṭvā anava hema ābhām rūpa draviṇa śālinīm lubdhaḥ vihuṇḍaḥ uvāca vara aṅganām māyā uvāca sapta koṭi mitaiḥ ca iva puṣpaiḥ pūjaya śaṅkaram teṣām puṣpa kṛtām mālām mamakam tadā aham supriyā bhāryā bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ vihuṇḍaḥ uvāca mahā janāḥ pṛcchamānaḥ sa duṣṭa ātma a kāma bāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ kāmodakam drumam brūhikām tam puṣpa samanvitam śukraḥ uvāca kāmodaḥ tad hāsāt jajṣire daitya sugam dhī nivarāṇi api sumāni etāni divyāni kāmodāyāḥ na saṃśayaḥ hṛdyāni pīta puṣpāṇi saurabheṇa yutāni ca tena api ekena puṣpeṇa yaḥ samarcati śaṅkaram tasya īpsitam mahā kāmam sam pūrayatiśaṅkaraḥ tādṛśāni eva puṣpāṇi lohitāni mahā nti ca sparśam na kārayet evam ākarṇitam tena vākyam śukrasya bhāṣitam dana śukraḥ uvāca gaṅgādvāre mahā puṇye mahā pātaka nāśane kāmoda ākhyam puram tatra nirmitam viśvakarmaṇā kāmoda pattanena arī divya bhogaiḥ alaṅkṛtā tathā ca ābharaṇaiḥ bhāti sarva devaiḥ su pūjitā tavyam pūjitavyā avara apsarāḥ upāyena apipuṇyena tām prahāsaya dānava evam uktvā atuyogīm draḥ sa śukra udānavam prati virarāma mahā tejāḥ sva kāryāya udyataḥ abhavat iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāne aṣṭādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekonaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yasyāḥ prahasanāt tāta suhṛdyāni bhavanti vai puṣpāṇi divya gam dhīni durlabhāni sura asuraiḥ kasmāt tu devatāḥ sarvāḥ pravām chanti mahā mate śaṅkaraḥ sukha māyā ati hāsya puṣpaiḥ supūjitaḥ putrī vara aṅganā hāsyāt tasyām ca kaḥ guṇaḥ tad kathām brūhi sakalām vistareṇa ca thuḥ sāgaram kṣīram amṛta artham samudyatāḥ mathanāt deva daityānām kanyā ratna catuṣṭayam varuṇena darśitam pūrvam somena eva tathā punar paścāt sam darśitam puṇyam amṛtam kalaśe sthitam kanyā catuṣṭayam pūrvam devānām hitam icchati sulakṣmīḥ nāmasā ca ekā dvitīyā vāruṇī tathā jyeṣṭhā a tathā ākhyāta a kāma uda anya a pracakṣate tāsām madhyevarā śreṣṭhā pūrvam tasmāt jyeṣṭhā iti vikhyātā loke pūjyā sadā eva hi vāruṇī pāna rūpā ca payaḥ phena samudbhavā amṛtasya taraṅgāt cakāma udākhyā babhūva ha somaḥ rājā tathā alakṣmīḥ jajṣāte amṛtāt api trailokya bhūṣaṇaḥ sa umaḥ sam jātaḥ śaṅkara priyaḥ mṛtyu roga harā jātā asurāṇām vāruṇī tathā hitam icchatām amṛtāt utthitā devī kāmodā nāma puṇya dā viṣṇoḥ prītyai bhaviṣyetu vṛkṣa rūpam prayāsyati viṣṇu prīti karī sātu bhaviṣyati sadā eva hi tulasī nāma sā apuṇyā bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tayā saha jagat nāthoḥ amiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tulasyāḥ patram ekam yonītvā kṛṣṇāya dāsyati mene tasya upakārāṇām kim asmai ca dadāmi aham evaṅkāmā uda nāmā asaupūrvam jātā a samudra jā yadā asā a sate devī harṣa gadgada bhāṣiṇī sauhṛdya anisugam patanti vai amlānāni su puṣpāṇi yaḥ gṛhṇāti samudyataḥ pūjayet śaṅkaram devam brahmāṇam mādhavam tathā roditi eṣā yadā sācakena duḥkhena duḥkhitā tāni ca eva mahā bhāga hṛdyāni su mahat ca pūjayati śaṅkaram tasya duḥkham tāpaḥ jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ puṣpaiḥ tu tādṛśaiḥ devān sakṛt arcati pāpa dhīḥ etat te sarvam atha kṛṣṇaḥ vicim tya eva dṛṣṭvā vikrama sāhasam vihuṇḍasya apipāpasya udyamam sāhasam tadā nāradam preṣayāmāsa mohaya enam durāsadam nāradaḥ tu athasam śrutya vākyam viṣṇoḥ mahātmanaḥ gacchamānam durātmānam kāmodām pratidānavam sām brahma ātmajam namaskṛtya prati uvāca kṛtām jaliḥ vipra varyam punar prāha kārya kāraṇam ātmanaḥ nam danasya vana uddeśa ikācid nārī vara ānanā tasya adarśana mātreṇa gataḥ ahaṅkāma vaśya tām pūjayasva mahā devam puṣpaiḥ tu sapta koṭibhiḥ tatas te supriyā bhāryā bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ tām aham kāmayiṣyāmi sim dhujām śuṇusām pratam manaḥ ullāsaiḥ mahā hāsaiḥ hāsayiṣyāmi aham punar prītā asatī mahā bhāgā hasiṣyati punar punar tasmāt hāsyāt patiṣyanti divyāni kusumāni ca taiḥ tu devam umākām tam pūjayiṣyāmi sām tena pūjā pradānena tuṣṭaḥ dāsyati me phalam īśvaraḥ sarva bhūta īśaḥ śaṅkaraḥ loka bhāvanaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca yena upāyena puṣpāṇi kāmoda ākhyāni dānava gaṅgā toya iṣu divyāni patiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ tāni tvam tu pratigṛhāṇa suhṛdyāni maha anti ca gṛhītvā atāni puṣpāṇi sādhayasva manīpsitam nārada udānava śreṣṭham mohayitvā tatas punar tatas ca satu dharma ātmā ācintayāmāsa vaipunaḥ katham aśrūṇi sā amum ced kena upāyena duḥkhitā tatas buddhiḥ samutpannā a kāma uda ākhyam puraṅgataḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāne ekonaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ viṃ śa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kāmoda ākhyam puram divyam sarva deva samākulam kāmodāya a gṛham prāpya praviveśa dvijottamaḥ kāmodām tayā āsam pūjitaḥ vipraḥ su vākyaiḥ svāgata ādibhiḥ divya āsane samārūḍhaḥ tām papraccha dvijottamaḥ anāmayam capapraccha āśīrbhiḥ abhinam kāmodā uvāca prasādāt bhavatām viṣṇoḥ sukhena vartayāmi aham kathayasva mahā prājṣa tvam praśna uttara kāraṇam vyāpakaḥ sarva lokānām mama aṅgemati nāśakaḥ supta yātu mayā adṛṣṭaḥ svapnaḥ vaidāruṇaḥ mune avyaktaḥ a sauhṛṣīkeśaḥ sam sāram sagamiṣyati tadā prabhṛti duḥkhena vyāpitā aham mahā mate tat me tvam kāraṇam brūhi bhavān jñānavatām varaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca vātikaḥ paittikaḥ ca eva kapha jaḥ sānnipātikaḥ āditya udaya velāyām dṛśyate svapnauttamaḥ sat svapnaḥ mānavānām hi puṇyasya phala dāyakaḥ anyat evam pravakṣyāmi svapnasya kāraṇam śubhe mahā vātām dolanaiḥ ca calam sūkṣmāḥ tasmāt udaka sam cayāt śubhe punar layam prayām vai ātmā aśuddhaḥ viraktaḥ tu rāga dveṣa vivarjitaḥ paṣcabhūta ātmakānām ca muṣitvā eva su niścalaḥ ṣaḍviṃśati suta tvānām madhye ca eṣa virājate śuddha ātmā akevalaḥ nityaḥ prakṛteḥ tad bhāvaiḥ vāyu rūpaiḥ ca calate sthāna toya dā aṃ tara ātma aśubham nāma tasya tyam bukaṇāḥ śubhe sahi pṛthvī sava evāyuḥ sacā api ākāśaḥ eva hi sa vaitoyam sa dīpyeta ete paṣca purākṛtāḥ ātmanaḥ tejasaḥ bhūta amala rūpa a mahātmanaḥ tasya api saṅgatim prāptāḥ ekatvam hi prayānti te sva ātma bhāva pradoṣeṇa nāśayanti varānane tatim paḍam anyam icchanti vāram vāram varānane teṣām krīḍā vihāraḥ yam sṛṣṭi sambandha kāraṇam punar bhūtiḥ punar hāniḥ tādṛśasya punar punar apām rūpasya dṛṣṭām tam tadvat eṣām na saṃśayaḥ tya apaḥ eva ca ātma ādayaḥ hi amībhadre nitya rūpāḥ na saṃśayaḥ piṇḍaḥ eva praṇaśyeta teṣām sam jātaḥ eva ca viṣayāṇām su doṣaiḥ sa rāga dveṣa ādibhiḥ hataḥ prāṇāḥ prayānti vaipiṇḍāt paṣcapam ca ātmakāt vija piṇḍām ca am sphuliṅgaḥ tu prakāśate tathā prakāśa māyā ati dṛśya adṛśyaḥ prajāyate śuddha ātmā ca param brahma sadā jāgarti nityaśas aṃ tara ātmā aprabaddhaḥ tu prakṛteḥ ca mahā guṇaiḥ tara ātma asukham vrajet paścāt sam jāyatenidrā tāmasī layava ṛddhinī sūryaḥ merumullam tadā rātriḥ prajāyeta yāvat na udayate raviḥ dhakāraiḥ muktaḥ tuaṃ tara ātmā prakāśate bhāvaiḥ tattva ātmakānām tu paṣca tattvaiḥ prapoṣitaiḥ pūrva janma sthitaiḥ piṇḍaiḥ am sam sam tara ātma a vaidoṣaiḥ baddhaḥ praṇīyate kāyam rakṣati jīva ātmā paścāt tiṣṭhati madhya gaḥ śuṣka abhastrā yathā śvāsam kurutā iva āyu pūritā evaṅkāyaḥ pramugdhaḥ tu mṛta kalpaḥ prajāyate tatas nidrā mahā māyātasya aṅga iṣu prayāti sā hṛdikam tathā ca āsye nāsikā agre pratiṣṭhati sthet hṛd gataḥ nābhi maṇḍale ātmanaḥ tu prabhāvāt ca audānaḥ nāma mārutaḥ prajāyate mahā tathā ca ātma āsusam lagnaḥ prāṇa vāyuḥ na saṃśayaḥ aṃ śubha ānane pūrva janma arjitān vāsān smṛtvā tatra pradhāvati tatrasam sthaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ sva icchayā aramate punar evam nānāvidhān svapnān tarā ātmā a prapaśyati uttamām śca viruddhām śca karma yuktān prapaśyati girīm śca auccāvacān prapaśyati jalam nadīm taḍāgam ca payaḥ sthānā nipaśyati tat bhāvyam ca varārohe viṣṇoḥ ca eva bhaviṣyati tad nimittam tvayā dṛṣṭaḥ duḥsvapnaḥ sa tu prekṣitaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe viṃśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kāmodā uvāca na viduḥ devatāḥ sarvāḥ ayasyām tam rūpam eva ca sāraḥ śṛṇu nārada kasmāt prayāti sam sāram mama svāmī jagat patiḥ nāradaḥ uvāca śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi yat kṛtam tena cakriṇā bhṛgoḥ agre pratijṣātam yajṣa rakṣām karomi aham āgatyadhvam sitaḥ sarvaḥ sa yajṣaḥ pāpa cetanaiḥ sa yogīm śaśāpa bhṛgurevatam daśa janmāni bhuṅkṣva tvam mad śāpa kaluṣīkṛtaḥ tad nimittam tvayā devi duḥsvapnaḥ parivīkṣitaḥ iti uktvā tāṅgataḥ vipraḥ brahma lokam sa nāradaḥ kṛṣṇasya api su duḥkhena duḥkhitā sā bhavat tadā ruroda karuṇam bāla ahāha iti vadatīm uhur gaṅgā tīra upaviṣṭā āsā jalām su netrābhyām tathā aśrūṇi duḥkhena apipramum cati tāni aśrūṇi pramuktāni gaṅgā toyepatam ti api gaṅgā toye praphullāni vāhitāni prayānti vai dadṛśe dānava śreṣṭhaḥ viṣṇu māyā pramohitaḥ duḥkha jānina jānāti muninā a kathitāni api harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ parijagrāha saḥ asuraḥ sapta koṭibhiḥ daityeṃ viṣṇu māyā pramohitaḥ atha kruddhā jagaddhātrī śaṅkaram vākyam abravīt śoka utpannāni padmāni gaṅgā toya gatāni vai ayam eṣa pragṛhṇāti kāma ākulita cetanaḥ pūjayet ca api duṣṭa ātma aśoka sam tāpa kārakaiḥ duḥkha jaiḥ śoka jaiḥ puṣpaiḥ taiḥ su śreyaḥ katham bhavet yādṛśena apibhāvena amām eva paripūjayet tādṛśena api bhāvena asya siddhiḥ bhaviṣyati satya dhyāna vihīnaḥ uyam kāma udā nyasta mānasaḥ sam jātaḥ evam ākarṇya tat vākyam śam bhoḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ asya eva saṅkṣayam śam evam uktvā atatas devī tasya api vadha kāṅkṣayā kṛtvā a māyā mayam rūpam brāhmaṇasya mahātmanaḥ pūjayet śaṅkaram nātham su puṣpaiḥ pārijāta jaiḥ sametya dānavaḥ pāpaḥ divyām pūjām vināśayet kāma ākulaḥ su duḥkha ārtaḥ tad gataḥ bhāva tatparaḥ viṣṇoḥ ca eva mahā māyām pūrva dṛṣṭām sa dānavaḥ sasmāra dānavaḥ pāpaḥ kāma bāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ tasyāḥ darpeṇa balīyasā kāla ākṛṣṭaḥ sa duṣṭa ātma aśoka jāta anita anisaḥ parigṛhya samāyātaḥ pūjana arthī maheśvaram devyā kṛtām hi pūjām ca su puṣpaiḥ pārijāta jaiḥ tām nirṇāśya su lobhena śoka jaiḥ paripūjayet netrābhyām tasya duṣṭasya bim davaḥ te aśru sambhavāḥ devī brāhmaṇa rūpeṇa tam uvāca mahā mate kaḥ bhavān pūjayet devam śoka ākula manāḥ sadā patam mastake śoka jānite apavitrāṇi me brūhi etam artham mama agratas vihuṇḍaḥ uvāca pūrvam padā sarvalakṣaṇasam panna akāmasya āyatanam mahat tasyām ohenasam dagdhaḥ kāmena ākula tā aṅgataḥ teṣām puṣpa kṛtām mālām mamakam ṭhe parikṣipa koṭibhiḥ sapta saṅkhyātaiḥ pūjayasva maheśvaram tad artham pūjayāmi eva īśvaram phala dāyakam śrī devī uvāca durātmanaḥ rūpam kīdṛśam vadasām kva labdhāni su puṣpāṇi tasya āhāsya udbhavāni ca vihuṇḍaḥ uvāca bhāvam dhyānam gaṅgā toya gatāni eva parigṛhṇāmi nityaśas taiḥ aham pūjayāmi ekam śaṅkaram pravadāmi aham mama agre kathitam vipra śukreṇa api mahātmanā etat te sarvam ākhyātam śrī devī uvāca kāma udāra rodanāt jātaiḥ puṣpaiḥ taiḥ duḥkha sambhavaiḥ yādṛśena api bhāvena puṣpaiḥ ca yādṛśaiḥ tvayā arcitaḥ devadeveśaḥ tādṛśam phalam āpnuhi divya pūjām vināśya evam śoka puṣpaiḥ prapūjasi asau doṣaḥ tava eva adya samutpannaḥ su dāruṇaḥ tasmāt daṇḍam pradāsyāmi bhuṅkṣva sva karma jam phalam tasya avākyam samākarṇya kāla kṛṣṭaḥ ubabhāṣatām rere duṣṭa durācāra mama karma pradūṣaka hanmi tvām iha khaḍgena anena api na saṃśayaḥ iti uktvā a brāhmaṇam tam sa niśitam khaḍgam ādade ham tu kāmaḥ sa duṣṭa ātmā abhyadhāvata dānavaḥ sā devī vipra rūpeṇa saṅkruddhā parameśvarī hanmi tvām iha khaḍgena anena api na saṃśayaḥ sva sthānam āgatam dṛṣṭvā a huṅkāram visasarja ha tena huṅkāra nādena patitaḥ dānava adhamaḥ niśceṣṭaḥ lokāḥ svāsthi aṅga tāḥ sarve duḥkha tāpa vivarjitāḥ etasmāt kāraṇāt vatsa sa astrī vaiparidevati gaṅgā tīre varārohā duḥkha vyākula mānasā viṣṇuḥ uvāca evam uktvā asu putram virarāma mahā prājṣaḥ kiṣcid nā uvāca bhūpate iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre kāmoda ākhyāne ekaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvāviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ viṣṇuḥ uvāca virarāma mahā prājṣaḥ kim cit nā uvāca tān prati vaṭā adhas sthaḥ dvijaśreṣṭhaḥ tam uvāca mahā śukam kim vā adevaḥ atha gandharvaḥ kim vā a vidyādharaḥ bhavān kasya śāpāt imām prāptaḥ yoniṅkīrasya pātakīm kasmāt te īdṛśam jñānam vartate atīm driyam śuka kim vā ācchannena rūpeṇa anena api mahā mate vidyām tapaḥ prabhāvam ca yasmāt bhramasi medinīm upaviśya āsanepuṇya ichāyām āśraya śītalām na aham devaḥ ūna gandharvaḥ na aham vidyādharaḥ punar vipra pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu kaśyapasya kule jātaḥ kaścid brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ vidyādhara iti vikhyātaḥ kula śīla guṇaiḥ yutaḥ rājamānaḥ śriyā vipraḥ ācāraiḥ tapasā tadā vasuśarma anāmaśarma adharmaśarma acatetrayaḥ teṣām aham ācāreṇa su sam pannaḥ vidyā ādi su guṇaiḥ punar prājṣaḥ tadvat ca āsīt guṇa adhikaḥ aham ekaḥ mahā mūrkhaḥ sam jātaḥ śṛṇu sattama vidyānām uttamam vipra bhāvam artham śubhaṅkadā sam jātaḥ iti sam ciṃ uvāca su duḥkhitaḥ evam ākarṇya tat tasya pituḥ vākyam mayā aśubham na aham tāta gamiṣyāmi guroḥ geham su duḥkha dam yatravaitāḍanam nityam bhrū bhaṅga ādi ca krośanam annam na dṛśyate tatra karmaṇā śṛṇu sattama tasmāt duḥkham ayam diram vidyā kāryam kariṣye na krīḍā artham aham utsukaḥ bhokṣye svapsye prasādāt te kariṣye krīḍanam pitar ḍiṃ bhaiḥ sārddham sukhena api divārātram atam mām uvāca sadharma ātmā amūḍham mā a putra sāhasam kārṣīḥ vidyā artham udyamam kuru yaśaḥ kīrtiḥ tathā atulā jñānam svargaḥ ca mokṣaḥ ca tasmāt vidyām prasādhaya pūrvam su duḥkha mūlā atu paścāt vidyā sukha pradā tasmāt sādhaya putra tvam vidyām guru gṛham vraja mama lajjā samutpannā jīva nāśa karī tadā tāparaḥ jātaḥ duḥkha śoka samākulaḥ katham vidyām aham jāne katham dāmi aham guṇān katham mā ijāyate svargaḥ katham mokṣam vrajāmi aham devatāyatane duḥkhī upaviṣṭaḥ tu aham kadā mad bhāgyaiḥ preritaḥ kaścid siddha ekaḥ samāgataḥ nirāśraya ujita āhāraḥ sa dānam spṛhaḥ para brahmaṇisam līnaḥ jñāna dhyāna samādhimān tam aham sam śritaḥ viprajñāna rūpam mahā matim dīna rūpaḥ hi aham dabhāgyaḥ tathā punar pūrva vṛttām tam eva hi tam evam śrāvitam sarvam sarvajṣa tvam katham vrajet etad artham mahā duḥkhībhavān mama agatiḥ sadā sacā uvāca mahātmā ame sarvam jñānasya kāraṇam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre dvāviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ trayoviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi jñāna rūpam tava agratas jñānasya nāsā karṇau na jñānasya na asti ca eva asthi saṅgrahaḥ kena dṛṣṭam vai divā prakāśakaḥ sūryaḥ rātrau prakāśayet śaśī gṛham prakāśayet dīpaḥ loka madhye sthitāḥ amī tad pad aṅkena vaidhāmnā dṛśyate śṛṇu sattama navim danti hi mūḍhāḥ te mohita a viṣṇu māyayā kāya madhye sthitam jñānam dhyāna dīptam anaupamam tat padam dra sūrya ādibhiḥ na ca hasta pādau vinā ajñānam acakṣuḥ karṇa varjitam sarvam āghrāti vipra indra śṛṇoti evam na saṃśayaḥ sarvām dhakāra nāśane svarge bhūmau ca pātāle sthāne sthāne ca dṛśyate kāya madhye sthitam jñānam navim danti ku buddhayaḥ jñāna sthānam pravakṣyāmi yasmāt jñānam prajāyate prāṇinām hṛdaye nityam nihitam sarvadā dvija kāma ādīn su mahā bhogān mahā moha ādikām tattva mūlam idam jñānam nirmalam sarva darśakam niḥ saṅgaḥ niḥ spṛhaḥ bhūtvā ekām tasthau amāśritaḥ sarva vṛttām tam vetsyasi tvam tumat prasādāt na saṃśayaḥ prakāśitam etat te sarvam ākhyātam ātma vṛttām tam eva hi kīra yonim katham prāptaḥ bhavān jñānavatām varaḥ tat me tvam kāraṇam brūhi sarva sandeha nāśanam sam sargāt jāyate pāpam sam sargāt puṇyam eva hi lubdhakena api pāpena kena api ekaḥ śukaḥ śiśuḥ cāṭukām rasu rūpam tam paṭu vākyam samīkṣya ca gṛhītaḥ brāhmaṇa ekena mama prītyā samarpitaḥ mām eva ṃ vadate ityādi cāṭukaiḥ vākyaiḥ mām eva paribhāṣayet nītaḥ śukaḥ biḍālena mama duḥkhasya hetave biḍālena hataḥ pakṣītena eva bhakṣitaḥ hisaḥ śrutvā amṛtyuṅgatam vipra śukam tam cāṭu kārakam mahatā a duḥkha bhāvena asukhena ati duḥkhitaḥ tasya duḥkhena mugdhaḥ asmi tīvreṇa api su pīḍitaḥ prālapam rāmacam dreti śuka rāja iti paṇḍita śloka rāja ititam vipramohāt calita mānasaḥ tatas aham duḥkha sam taptaḥ sam jātaḥ svena karmaṇā viyogena api vipra indra śukasya vismṛtam tat mayā ajñānam siddhena apiprakāśitam sam taptaḥ tam śukam cāṭu kārakam gadya padya mayaiḥ vākyaiḥ sam skṛta akṣara sam yutaiḥ tvām vinākaḥ camām vatsa bodhayiṣyati sām pratam kathābhiḥ tu vicitrābhiḥ pakṣirāja prasādī mām evamādi pralapya aham śokena api su pīḍitaḥ maraṇe yādṛśaḥ bhāvaḥ matiḥ ca āsīt ca yādṛśī tādṛśena api bhāvena jātaḥ aham dvija sattama garbha vāsaḥ mayā prāptaḥ jñāna smṛti vidhāyakaḥ smṛtam pūrva kṛtaṅkarma svayam eva viceṣṭitam mayā apāpena mūḍhena kim kṛtam hi akṛtātmanā tena me nirmalam jñānam jātam vaisarva darśakam sa bāhyābhyam taram viprakṣālitam nirmalaṅkṛtam tasmin kāle mṛtaḥ vipra tad bhāvena api bhāvitaḥ tādṛśaḥ asmi punar jātaḥ śuka rūpaḥ mahī tale maraṇe yādṛśaḥ bhāvaḥ prāṇinām parijāyate tādṛśāḥ syuḥ tu satvāḥ te tad rūpāḥ tad parāyaṇāḥ tad guṇāḥ tad svarūpāḥ hi mṛtya kālasya vipra indra bhāvena api na saṃśayaḥ atulam prāptavāḥ jñānam aham atra mahā mate vartamānam sarvam vidāmi aham hi atrasam sthitaḥ api na saṃśayaḥ tāraṇāya manuṣyāṇām sam etat te sarvam ākhyātam śṛṇu bhārgavanam dana sthala jāt ca udakāt sarvam bāhyam malam praṇaśyati tara kṛtān pāpān guru tīrtham praṇāśayet sam sāra tāraṇāya eva jaṅgamam tīrtham uttamam viṣṇuḥ uvāca śukaḥ evam mahā prājṣaḥ cyavanāya mahātmane tattvam na aham rājyasya prakāmaye viṣṇuḥ uvāca go bhū svarṇa ambu dhānyānām aṅkuru dānam mahā mate tasmāt dānam prakartavyam mām uddiśya ca bhūpate yādṛśena api bhāvena mām uddiśya dadāti yaḥ tādṛśam tasya vaibhāvam satyam eva ṛṣīṇām darśanāt sparśāt bhraṣṭaḥ tepa āpasam cayaḥ āgamiṣyasi yajṣām tā imam adeham na saṃśayaḥ evam ābhāṣya tam venamam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmya sam pūrti varṇane caturviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca aṃ harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ cintayitvā nṛpa uttamaḥ samāhūya nṛpa śreṣṭham tam pṛthum madhura akṣaraiḥ tam uvāca mahātmānam harṣeṇa mahatā tadā tvayā a putreṇa bhūrloke tāritaḥ asmi su pātakāt śomesām pṛtho mayā a vināśita udoṣaiḥ tvayā a guṇaiḥ prakāśitaḥ yaja iham aśvamedhena dāsya idānāni anekaśas viṣṇu lokam vrajāmi adya sa kāyaḥ te prasādataḥ sambharasva mahā bhāga sambhārān stvam nṛpa uttama āmam traya mahā bhāga brāhmaṇān vedapāragān evam pṛthuḥ samādiṣṭaḥ venena api mahātmanā prati uvāca mahātmā āsavenam pitaram ādarāt kuru rājyam mahā rāja bhuṅkṣva bhogān manonugān divyān vā amānuṣān puṇyān yajṣaiḥ yaja janārdanam dhanuḥ ādāya pṛthvīśaḥ sa bāṇam yatna pūrvakam ādideśa bhaṭān sarvān ghoṣadhvam bhū tale mama kariṣyanti cayat pāpam ājṣām venasya bhūpateḥ ullaṅghya vadhya tām yajadhvam mānavāḥ sarva etad manaskāḥ a vimatsarāḥ evam śikṣām prada tva a saurājyam bhṛtya iṣu vena jaḥ śata varṣa pra ṇam vainirāhāraḥ babhūva ha tapasā tasya uvācaha pṛthuḥ uvāca samācarati yaḥ pāpam asya śiraḥ chettā bhavatu eṣa tasya devaḥ janārdanaḥ adṛṣṭaiḥ ca mahā cakraiḥ hariḥ śāstā bhavet svayam manasā a karmaṇā a vācā a kartum vām chatipātakam teṣām sirām sitruṭyam tuphalam pakvam yathā drumāt etat eva varam manyet vattaḥ śṛṇu sureśvara prajānām tathā akuruṣva deveśa varam dātum yadi icchasi evam astu mahā bhāga pitāte pūta tā aṅgataḥ viṣṇunā śāsitaḥ vatsa putreṇa api tvayā a pṛtho evam pṛthum samuddiśya varam da tvā āgataḥ vibhuḥ pṛthuḥ eva samāyātaḥ rājya karmaṇi sam sthitaḥ vainyasya rājye vipra indrāḥ pāpam kaścid na ca ācaret iti ājṣā avartata etasya vainyasya api mahātmanaḥ sarva lokāḥ samācāraiḥ parivartanti nityaśas dāna bhogaiḥ te sarva dharma parāyaṇāḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne caturviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ paṣcaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca venasya ajṣām susam prāpya pṛthuḥ parama dhārmikaḥ sambhārān nānā puṇyān nṛpa ātmajaḥ nimam trya brāhmaṇān sarvān nānā deśa udbhavān api athavā inaiyāja asau aśvamedhena bhūpatiḥ dānāni adāt brāhmaṇebhyaḥ nānā rūpāṇi anekaśas jagāma vaiṣṇavam lokam sa kāyaḥ jagatīpatiḥ etat vaḥ sarvam ākhyātam caritram tasya bhūpateḥ sarva pāpa praśamanam sarva duḥkha vināśanam pṛthuḥ eva sadharma ātmā a rājā a pṛthvīm praśāsati etat te sarvam ākhyātam bhūmikham ṇḍam anuttamam prathamam sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam tu dvitīyam bhūmi khaṇḍakam bhūmikhaṇḍasya māhātmyam kathayiṣyāmi aham punar asya khaṇḍasya vaiślokam yaḥ śṛṇoti nara uttamaḥ yuktaḥ adhyāyam sam śṛṇute sudhīḥ tasya puṇyam pravakṣyāmi śrūyatām dvijasattamāḥ asya padmapurāṇasya paṭhamānasya nityaśas vyāsaḥ uvāca kasmāt kalauna jāyam te śṛṇvānasya ca padmaja narasya puṇya yuktasya nānā vighnāḥ su dāruṇāḥ tad phalam dṛśyate tātapurāṇe padmasam jṣake purāṇam ca api yat tadvat aśvamedha samam kila nabhum janti narāḥ pāpāḥ pāpa mārga iṣu sam sthitāḥ aśvamedha samam puṇyam nabhum janti kalaunarāḥ yena śrutam idam puṇyam purāṇam padmasam aśvamedha ādayaḥ yajṣāḥ tasmāt naṣṭāḥ mahā mate kalau yuge gatāḥ svarge sa vedāḥ sa aṅga sa svarāḥ yaḥ pannaḥ śraddhāvān bhagavat paraḥ śravaṇa artham mahā śraddhā pūrvam tasya prajāyate śṛṇvānasya narasya api mahā vighna ūnasam caret aśraddhā jāyate pūrvam pāṭhakasya narasya ca lobhaḥ ca jāyata etasya śṛṇvānasya dvijottama preṣitaḥ viṣṇudevena mahā mohaḥ sa dāruṇaḥ akarot sa vināśam tu śṛṇvataḥ ca asi anityaśas dūṣakāḥ kutsakāḥ pāpāḥ sambhavanti dine dine jṣātavyam tu subuddhena vighna rūpam mama adhunā sam jātam samācaret vaiṣṇavaiḥ ca mahā maṃ traiḥ viṣṇusūktaiḥ su puṇya daiḥ viṣṇoḥ arāṭamam treṇa sahasra śīrṣakeṇa ca idam viṣṇu sumam treṇa ābrahmeṇa punar punar bṛhatsāmnā a sumam treṇa dvādaśa akṣarakeṇa ca aṣṭa uttara tila ājyaiḥ ca pālāśaiḥ samidhaiḥ api grahāṇām api karttavyam sthāpanam pūjanam dvija vighneśam pūjayet tatra śāradām ca sureśvarīm jātavedām mahā māyām caṇḍikām kṣetranāyakam tilaiḥ ca tam trasa mudyataiḥ yathā sambhāvikām tāta dakṣiṇām dhenu sam yutām tatas vighnāḥ praṇaśyanti purāṇam siddhim āpnuyāt tasya aṅge jāyate rogaḥ bahu pīḍā pradāyakaḥ bhāryā śokaḥ putra śokaḥ dhana hāniḥ prajāyate nānāvidhān mahā rogān bhum jatena atra saṃśayaḥ ekādaśīm susam prāpya pūjayet madhusūdanam ṣoḍaśaiḥ ca upacāraiḥ ca bhāva yuktena cetasā brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt yathā vitta anusārataḥ keśava āyata toda tvāsaṅkalpam haviṣā anvitam svayam kuryāt tatas prājṣaḥ bhojanam dhavaiḥ purāṇa sam hita apūrṇa aśrotavya adharma tatparaiḥ sa pādam lakṣam ekam tu brahma ākhyam puṣkaram śṛṇu śṛṇvanti manujāḥ dvija lakṣasya arddham tatas kṛtsnam purāṇam padmasam ślokānām tu sahasrābhyām dvābhyām eva tathā adhikam tretā yuge tathā aprāptā yadā āśroṣyanti mānavāḥ dvāviṃśati sahasrāṇi sam hitā padma sam jṣitā dvāpare kathita a vipra brahmaṇā paramātmanā dvādaśa aiva sahasrāṇām hitā kalau yuge paṭhiṣyanti mānava a viṣṇu tatparāḥ sam hitāsu eva vipra indra śeṣa ākhyāna pravistaraḥ dvādaśa eva sahasrāṇi nāśam yāsyanti sattama bhūmikhaṇḍam naraḥ śrutvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate śrotavyam hi prayatnena padma ākhyam pāpa nāśanam prathamam sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam tu dvitīyam bhūmi khaṇḍakam tṛtīyam svargakhaṇḍam ca pātālam tu caturthakam paṣcamam ca uttaraṅkhaṇḍam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam yaḥ śṛṇoti naraḥ bhaktyā paṣca khaṇḍāni anukramāt mahā bhāgyena labhyam te paṣca khaṇḍāni bhūsurāḥ satyam satyam na saṃśayaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe paṣcapaṣcāśat sahasra sam hitāyām vena upākhyāne paṣcaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ samāptaḥ ayam bhūmikhaṇḍaḥ dvitīyaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe dvitīyam bhūmikhaṇḍam samāptam atha śrī pādme mahā purāṇe tṛtīyam svarga khaṇḍam prārabhyate jagat janānām hṛdi saṃniviṣṭam tri kāla jṣā mahātmānaḥ nānā puṇya samāśrayāḥ ye arbuda araṇya niratāḥ puṣkara araṇya vāsinaḥ śrī śaila niratāya ica kurukṣetra nivāsinaḥ dharmāraṇya ratāḥ ye ca daṇḍaka araṇya vāsinaḥ jam ete ca anye ca bahavaḥ sa śiṣyā munayaḥ amalāḥ naimiṣam samupāyātāḥ śaunakan draṣṭum utsukāḥ tam pūjayitvā a vidhivat tena te ca su pūjitāḥ āsaneṣu vicitreṣu bṛsī ādiṣu yathākramam śaunakena pradatteṣu āsīnāḥ te tapodhanāḥ kṛṣṇa āśritāḥ kathāḥ puṇyāḥ parasparam atha abruvan kathām teṣu tatas teṣām munīnām bhāvitātmanām ājagāma mahā tejāḥ sūtaḥ tatra mahā dyutiḥ vyāsaśiṣyaḥ purāṇa jṣaḥ romaharṣaṇa sam jṣakaḥ tān praṇamya yathā anayā ayam ca iva abhipūjitaḥ upaviṣṭam yathāyogyam śaunaka ādyāḥ mahā ṛṣayaḥ vyāsa śiṣyam sukha āsīnam sūtam vairomaharṣaṇam tam papracchuḥ mahā bhāgāḥ śaunaka ādyāḥ tapodhanāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ tvattaḥ śrutāmahāḥ puṇyāḥ purā paurāṇikīḥ kathāḥ sām ca pravṛttāḥ sma kathāyām punar purāṇam ācakṣva hari vārtā samanvitam hareḥ anyā kathā sūta śmaśāna sadṛśī smṛtā tīrthānām puṇya dātṝṇām nāmāni kila kīrtaya kṣetrāṇi kāni puṇyāni ke ca pūjyāḥ śiloccayāḥ nadyaḥ ca kāḥ parāḥ puṇyāḥ nṛṇām pāpa harāḥ śubhāḥ sūtaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā bhāgāḥ sādhu pṛṣṭam tapodhanāḥ tam praṇamya pravakṣyāmi purāṇam padmasam pārāśaryam parama puruṣam viśva vedya eka yonim śaśvat śāntam sva mati viṣayam śuddha tejaḥ viśālam veda vyāsam vitata yaśasam sarva dā aham namāmi yasya prasādāt vakṣyāmi nārāyaṇa kathām imām pravakṣyāmi mahā puṇyam purāṇam padmasam jṣitam sahasram paṣcapaṣcāśat ṣaḍbhiḥ khaṇḍaiḥ samanvitam tatra ādau ādikhaṇḍam syāt bhūmikhaṇḍam tatas param brahmakhaṇḍam ca tat paścāt tatas pātālakhaṇḍakam kriyākhaṇḍam tatas khyātam uttaram khaṇḍam anti mam tad vṛttām tasmāt pādmam iti ucyate budhaiḥ etat purāṇam amalam viṣṇu māhātmyam uttamam brahmā a tat nāradāya āha nāradaḥ asmad guroḥ puras vyāsaḥ sarva purāṇa anisa itihāsa anisam hitāḥ adhyāpayāmāsa muhur mām ati priyam ātmanaḥ sarva tīrtha abhiṣekam śraddhayā aparayā abhaktyā a śruta mātreṇa mukti daḥ aśraddhayā apiśṛṇute labhate puṇya sam cayam tatra ādi khaṇḍam vakṣyāmi puṇyam pāpa vināśanam śṛṇvantu munayaḥ sarve sa śiṣyāḥ tu a traye sthitāḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca ādisargam aham tāvat kathayāmi dvijottamāḥ jṣāyate yena bhagavān paramātmā asanātanaḥ sṛṣṭa iṣu pralayāt ūrdhvam nityam niram janam śām tam nirmalam nitya nirmalam su accham yat kāṅkṣanti mumukṣavaḥ sarvajṣam jñāna rūpa tvāt anam tam ajam avyayam avināśi sadā asvaccham acyutam vyāpakam mahat sarga kāla itusam jñāna rūpakam ātma līnam vikāram catat sraṣṭum upacakrame tasmāt pradhānam udbhūtam tatas ca api mahā nabhūt sātvikaḥ rājasaḥ ca eva tāmasaḥ ca pradhānena āvṛtaḥ hi eva tvacā bījam iva āvṛtam vaikārikaḥ taijasaḥ ca bhūtādiḥ ca eva tāmasaḥ yathā pradhānena mahān mahatā sa tathā vṛtaḥ bhūtādiḥ tu vikurvāṇaḥ śabda tanmātrakam tatas sasarja śabda tanmātrāt ākāśam śabda lakṣaṇam śabda mātram tathā ākāśam bhūtādiḥ samam āvṛṇot śabda mātram tathā ākāśam sparśa mātram sasarja ha ākāśam śabda mātram tu sparśa mātram samāvṛṇot tatas vāyu vikurvāṇaḥ rūpa mātram sasarja ha sparśa mātra stuvai vāyu rūpa mātram samāvṛṇot jyotiḥ ca apivikurvāṇam rasa mātram sasarja ha sambhavanti bhām rasa mātra aṇicām bhām si rūpa mātram samāvṛṇot vikurvāṇa anicām bhām sigandha mātram sasarjire tasmāt jātāmahī ca iyam sarva bhūta guṇa adhikā tasmin tasmin tu tanmātrāt tena tanmātra tā smṛtā tanmātrāṇi aviśeṣāṇi viśeṣāḥ kramaśas uparāḥ bhūta tanmātra sargaḥ yam ahaṅkārāt tu tāmasāt taijasānīm driyāṇi āhuḥ deva avaikārikāḥ daśa ekādaśam manaḥ ca atra kīrtitam tat tvacim takaiḥ ca tāni vakṣyāmi teṣām ca karmāṇi kula pāvanāḥ śravaṇam tvac cakṣuḥ jihvā nāsikā ca eva paṣcamī pāyu upastham hasta pādau kīrtitā vāc ca paṣcamī ākāśa vāyu tejāṃsi salilam pṛthivī tathā śabda ādibhiḥ guṇaiḥ viprāḥ saṃyuktāḥ uttara uttaraiḥ nānā vīryāḥ pṛthak bhūtāḥ tatas te saṃhatim vinā na aśaknuvan prajāḥ sraṣṭum a samāgatya kṛtsnaśas eka saṅghāḥ sa lakṣyāḥ ca sam prāpya aikyam aśeṣatas puruṣa dhiṣṭhita tvāt ca pradhāna anugraheṇa ca mahat ādayaḥ viśeṣām tā aṇḍam utpādayanti te bhūtebhyaḥ ṇḍam mahā prājṣā vṛddham tat udakeśayam prākṛtam brahma rūpasya viṣṇoḥ sthānam anuttamam tatra avyakta svarūpaḥ sauviṣṇuḥ viśveśvaraḥ prabhuḥ sveda ja aṇḍam abhūt tasya jarāyuḥ ca mahīdharāḥ garbha udakam samudrāḥ ca tasya abhūt mahat ātmanaḥ tasmin aṇḍe bhavat sarvam sa deva asura mānuṣam yat padmam tat haima maṇḍam abhūt śrī keśava icchayā brahma rūpam samāsthāya jagat sruṣṭum pravartate sṛṣṭam capāti anuyugam yāvat kalpa vikalpanā nārasim ha ādi rūpeṇa rudra rupeṇa sam haret iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svargakhaṇḍe dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ nadīnām ca nāmadheyāni sarvaśas tathā janapadānām ca ye ca anye bhūmim āśritāḥ pramāṇam ca pramāṇa jṣa pṛthivyāḥ kila sarvatas sūtaḥ uvāca paṣca imāni mahā prājṣa mahā bhūtāni saṅgrahāt jagatī sthāni sarvāṇi samāni āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ bhūmiḥ āpaḥ tathā vāyuḥ agniḥ ākāśam eva ca guṇa uttarāṇi sarvāṇi teṣām bhūmiḥ pradhānataḥ śabda sparśaḥ ca ca paṣcamaḥ bhūmeḥ ete guṇāḥ proktāḥ ṛṣibhiḥ tattva vedibhiḥ śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca vāyoḥ tu ākāśe śabdaḥ eva ca ete paṣcaguṇāḥ vipra mahā bhūteṣu paṣcasu te sarva lokeṣu ye iṣu bhūtāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ anyonyam na ativartam yadā tu viṣamībhāvam āviśanti parasparam ānupūrvyā a vinaśyanti jāyante ca anupūrvaśas sarvāṇi aparimeyāṇi tat eṣām rūpam aiśvaram yatra yatra hi dṛśyam tedhāvanti cabhautikāḥ teṣām manuṣyāḥ tarkeṇa pramāṇāni pracakṣate a cim tyāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ tān na tarkeṇa sādhayet sudarśanam pravakṣyāmi dvīpam tu muni puṅgavāḥ parimaṇḍalaḥ mahā bhāgāḥ dvīpaḥ asau cakra saṃsthitaḥ vṛkṣaiḥ puṣpa phala upetaiḥ sam pannaḥ dhana dhānyavān lavaṇena samudreṇa samam tāt parivāritaḥ yathā hi puruṣaḥ paśyet ādarśe mukham ātmanaḥ evam sudarśanaḥ dvīpaḥ dṛśyate ca kramaṇḍalaḥ dviram sarva oṣadhim samādāya sarvatas parivāritaḥ āpaḥ tatas saṅkṣepa ucyate ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ yāvān bhūmi avakāśaḥ yam dṛśyate śaśalakṣaṇe evam taiḥ kila pṛṣṭaḥ sa sūtaḥ uvākyam atha abravīt sūtaḥ uvāca prāc āyatāmahā prājṣāḥ ṣaṭ ete ratnaparvatāḥ samudrau pūrva paścimau himavān himakūṭaḥ ca niṣadhaḥ ca naga uttamaḥ nīlaḥ ca vaiḍūrya mayaḥ śvetaḥ ca śaśi sannibhaḥ sarva dhātu pinaddhaḥ ca śṛṅgavān nāma parvataḥ siddha cāraṇa sevitāḥ teṣām antara viṣkumbhau yojanāni sahasraśas tatra puṇyā janapadāḥ tāni varṣāṇi sattamāḥ vasanti teṣām sattvāni nānā jātīni sarvaśas idam tu bhāratam varṣam tatas haimavatam param hemakūṭāt param ca eva hari varṣam pracakṣate prāc āyataḥ mahā bhāgāḥ mālyavān nāma parvataḥ tatas param mālyavataḥ parvataḥ gandha mādanaḥ yojanānām sahasrāṇi caturaśītiḥ ucchritaḥ adhastāt caturaśītiḥ yojanānām dvijottamāḥ ūrdhvam adhas ca tiryak ca lokān āvṛtya tiṣṭhati tasya pārśveṣu amī dvīpāḥ catvāraḥ saṃsthitāḥ dvijāḥ bhadrāśvaḥ ketumālaḥ ca jambūdvīpaḥ ca sattamāḥ uttarāḥ ca eva kuruvaḥ kṛta puṇya pratiśrayāḥ sa vai vicintayāmāsa sauvarṇān prekṣya vāyasān meruḥ uttama madhyānām adhamānām ca pakṣiṇām tam ādityaḥ anuparyeti satatam jyotiṣām varaḥ candramāḥ ca sa nakṣatraḥ vāyuḥ ca eva pradakṣiṇaḥ sa parvataḥ mahā prājṣā divya puṣpa samanvitaḥ bhavanaiḥ āvṛtaiḥ sarvaiḥ jāmbūnada mayaiḥ śubhaiḥ tatra deva gaṇa a viprāḥ gandharva asura rākṣasāḥ apsaraḥ gaṇa saṃyuktāḥ śaile krīḍanti sarvadā tatra brahmā aca rudraḥ ca śakraḥ ca api sura īśvaraḥ tumburuḥ nāradaḥ ca eva viśvāvasuḥ hāhā hūhūḥ abhigamya amara śreṣṭham stuvanti vividhaiḥ stavaiḥ saptarṣayaḥ mahātmānaḥ kaśyapaḥ ca prajāpatiḥ tasmāt kuberaḥ ubhagavān ca turtham bhāgam aśnute tatas kalām śam vittasya manuṣyebhyaḥ prayacchati karṇikāra vanam ramyam śilā jāla samucchritam tatra sākṣāt paśupatiḥ divya bhūtaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ umāsahāyaḥ bhagavān ramate bhūtabhāvanaḥ karṇikāra mayīm mālām bibhrat āpādalam tam ugra tapasaḥ siddhāḥ suvratāḥ satya vādinaḥ paśyanti na hi durvṛttaiḥ śakyaḥ udraṣṭum maheśvaraḥ tasya śailasya śikharāt kṣīra dhārā dvijottamāḥ viśvarūpāt paramitā abhīma nirghāta nisvanā puṇya a puṇyatamaiḥ juṣṭā gaṅgā bhāgīrathī śubhā tayā ahi utpāditaḥ puṇyaḥ sa hradaḥ sāgara upamaḥ tām dhārayāmāsa tadā adurddharām parvataiḥ api śatam varṣa sahasrāṇi śirasā eva pinākadhṛk meroḥ tu paścime pārśve ketumālaḥ dvijottamāḥ jaṃ būkhaṇḍe tu tatra eva mahā janapadaḥ dvijāḥ āyuḥ daśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām tatra sattamāḥ suvarṇa varṇāḥ ca nara astriyaḥ ca apsarasām samāḥ anāmaya avīta śoka anityam mudita mānasāḥ gandhamādana śṛṅga iṣu kuberaḥ saha rākṣasaiḥ sam vṛta upsarasām saṅghaiḥ modate guhyaka adhipaḥ gandhamādana pārśva itu pare vigata pātakāḥ ekādaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām parama āyuṣaḥ tatra kṛṣṇa nara a viprāḥ tejoyukta mahā balāḥ striyaḥ ca utpala patra ābhāḥ sarvāḥ su priya darśanāḥ nīlotpala dharam śvetam śvetāt hairaṇyakam varam varṣam airāvatam vipra a nānā janapada āvṛtam śanu khaṇḍeḥ mahā bhāgāt veva ṛṣe dakṣaṇ ilāvṛttam madhyagam ca eva hi āyuḥ pramāṇam ārogyam dharmataḥ kāmataḥ arthataḥ samanvitāni bhūtāni teṣu sarveṣu sattamāḥ evam eṣām mahā bhāgāḥ parvataiḥ pṛthivī citā hemakūṭaḥ tu su mahā n kailāsaḥ nāma parvataḥ hiraṇyaśṛṅgaḥ su mahā ndivyaḥ maṇi mayaḥ giriḥ tasya pārśve mahat divyam śubhram kāṣcana vālukam ramyam viṣṇusaraḥ nāmayatra rāja ābhagīrathaḥ dṛṣṭvā bhāgīrathīm gaṅgām uvāsa bahulāḥ samāḥ yūpāḥ maṇi mayāḥ tatra kṣetrāḥ ca api hiraṇmayāḥ tatra iṣṭvā atu gataḥ siddhim sahasrākṣaḥ mahā yaśāḥ sraṣṭā abhūti patiḥ yatra sarva lokaiḥ sanātanaḥ jāyatrabhūtaḥ samam tatas nara nārāyaṇau brahmā manuḥ sthāṇuḥ ca paṣcamaḥ brahma lokāt apākrām tā saptadhā pratipadyate vaṭoda kāsā analinī pārvatī ca sarasvatī jam būnadīca sītāca gaṅgā sindhuḥ ca saptamī acim jṣā sā prabhāvaiḥ ca samanvitā dṛśyā adṛśyā ca bhavati tatra tatra sarasvatī sapta gaṅgāḥ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutāḥ rakṣām sivaiḥ himavatī hemakūṭa ica guhyakāḥ sarpa anāgāḥ ca niṣadhe gokarṇam ca tapovanam deva asurāṇām sarveṣām śvetaḥparvatam ucyate śṛṅgavān stu mahā bhāgā devānām pratisam caraḥ iti etāni mahā bhāgāḥ sapta varṣāṇi bhāgaśas bhūtāni upaniviṣṭāni gatimanti dhruvāṇi ca teṣām mṛddhiḥ bahuvidhā dṛśyate deva mānuṣā aśakyam parisaṅkhyātum śraddheyā ātu vibhūṣitā yām tupṛcchathamām vipra a divyam enām śaśa ākṛtim pārśve śa śa sya dve varṣe ukteye dakṣiṇa uttare karṇetu nāgadvīpaḥ ca kāśyapadvīpaḥ eva ca etat dvitīyam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svargakhaṇḍe tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ meroḥ atha uttaram paścāt pūrvam ācakṣvasū tatas sūtaḥ uvāca dakṣiṇena tu nīlasya meroḥ pārśve tathā uttare uttarāḥ kuravaḥ viprāḥ puṇyāḥ siddha niṣevitāḥ tatravṛkṣa a madhuphala a nitya puṣpa phala upagāḥ apare kṣīriṇaḥ nāma vṛkṣāḥ tatra dvijottamāḥ prakṣaranti sadā kṣīram tatra sarve amṛta upamam vastrāṇicaprasūyam ca sūkṣma kāṣcana vālukā sarva ṛtu sukha sam sparśa a niṣphalāḥ ca tapodhanāḥ deva loka cyutāḥ sarve jāyante tatra mānavāḥ śukla abhijanasam pannāḥ sarva su priya darśanāḥ mithunāni ca jāyante striyaḥ ca apsarasā upamāḥ teṣām pibanti amṛta saṃnibham ekam eva anurūpa paṣca cakravāka samam dvijāḥ nirāmayāḥ ca te loka anityam mudita mānasāḥ daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi daśa varṣa śatāni ca jīvanti te mahā bhāgān aca anyonyam jahati uta bhāruḍāḥ nāma śakunāḥ tīkṣṇatuṇḍā mahā balāḥ tān nirharam ca uttarāḥ kuravaḥ viprāḥ vyākhyātāḥ te samāsatas meru pārśvam aham pūrvam pravakṣyāmi yathātatham tasya mūrddha abhiṣekaḥ tu bhadrāśvasya tapodhanāḥ bhadraśāla vanam yatrakāla āmrāḥ ca mahā drumāḥ kāla āmrāḥ tu mahā bhāgāḥ nityam puṣpa phalāḥ śubhāḥ drumāḥ ca yojana utsedhāḥ siddha cāraṇa sevitāḥ tatra te puruṣāḥ śvetāḥ tejaḥ yukta mahā balāḥ striyaḥ kumuda varṇāḥ ca sundaryaḥ priya darśanāḥ candra varṇāḥ ca tur varṇāḥ pūrṇa candra nibha ānanāḥ candra śītala gātrāḥ ca nṛtya gīta viśāradāḥ daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi tatra āyuḥ dvijasattamāḥ kāla āmra rasa pītāḥ te nityam saṃsthita yauvanāḥ sudarśanaḥ nāma mahā njam sanātanaḥ sarva kāma phalaḥ puṇyaḥ siddha cāraṇa sevitaḥ būdvīpaḥ sanātanaḥ yojanānām sahasram ca śatam ca dvijasattamāḥ tathā mālyavataḥ śṛṅge pūrve pūrva anugām takāḥ yojanānām sahasrāṇi paṣcāśat mālyavān dvijāḥ mahā rajata saṅkāśāḥ jāyante tatra mānavāḥ rakṣaṇa artham praviśanti divākaram ṣaṣṭiḥ tāni sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭiḥ eva śatāni ca ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭiḥ eva śatāni ca āditya tāpa taptāḥ teviśanti śaśi maṇḍalam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svargakhaṇḍe caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ paṣcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ varṣāṇām ca eva nāmāni parvatānām ca sattama ye ca parvata vāsinaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca varṣam ramaṇakam nāma jāyante tatra mānavāḥ śukla abhijanasam pannāḥ sarve te priya darśanāḥ niḥ sapatnāḥ ca te sarve jāyante tatra mānavāḥ daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi śatāni daśa paṣca ca jīvanti te mahābhāgāḥ nityam mudita mānasāḥ varṣam hiraṇmayam nāma ayatra hairaṇvatīnadī yatra ca ayam mahā prājṣāḥ pakṣirāj pataga uttamaḥ yajṣa anuga vipra vara adhanvinaḥ priya darśanāḥ mahā balāḥ tatrajana a vipra a mudita mānasāḥ ekādaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām te tapodhanāḥ āyuḥ pramāṇam jīvanti śatāni daśa paṣca ca śṛṅgāṇi ca pavitrāṇi trīṇi eva dvija puṅgavāḥ tatra svayam prabhā devī nityam vasati śaṇḍinī uttareṇa tuśṛṅgasya samudrām te dvijottamāḥ varṣam airāvatam nāma tasmāt śṛṅgavataḥ param na tu tatra sūrya gatiḥ jīryam tena ca mānavāḥ candramāḥ ca sa nakṣatraḥ jyotiḥ bhūta eva āvṛtaḥ padma prabhāḥ padma varṇāḥ padma patra nibha īkṣaṇāḥ padma patra sugandhāḥ ca jāyante tatra mānavāḥ aniṣpanna anaṣṭa gandha a nirāhāra ajita indriyāḥ trayodaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām te dvijottamāḥ āyuḥ pramāṇam jīvanti nara adhārmika puṅgavāḥ hariḥ tiṣṭhati vaikuṇṭhaḥ śakaṭe kanaka āmaye aṣṭa cakram bhūta yuktam manojavam agni varṇam mahā tejaḥ jāmbūnada vibhūṣitam sa prabhuḥ sarva bhūtānām vibhuḥ ca dvijasattamāḥ saṅkṣepe vistare ca eva kartā ākārayitā tathā pṛthivī apaḥ tathā ākāśam vāyuḥ tejaḥ ca sattamāḥ sa yajṣaḥ sarva bhūtānām āsyam tasya hutāśanaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svargakhaṇḍe paṣcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ yat idam bhāratam varṣam puṇyam puṇya vidhāyakam tat sarvam naḥ samācakṣva tvam hinaḥ buddhimān mataḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atrate kīrttayiṣyāmi varṣam bhāratam uttamam pṛthoḥ ca prājṣa vainyasya tathā aikṣvākoḥ mahātmanaḥ yayāteḥ iram barīṣasya mām dhātuḥ nahuṣasya ca kuśikasya eva rājarṣeḥ gādheḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ anyeṣām ca mahā bhāgāḥ kṣatriyāṇām balīyasām sarveṣām eva bhūtānām priyam bhāratam uttamam tatas varṣam pravakṣyāmi yathāśruta mahaḥ dvijāḥ mahendraḥ malayaḥ sahyaḥ śuktimān ṛkṣavān api teṣām sahasraśas viprāḥ parvatāḥ te samīpatas avijṣātāḥ sāravam tovipulāḥ citra sānavaḥ anye tu yeparijṣātā hrasva ahrasva upajīvinaḥ ārya mleccha sadharmāṇaḥ te miśrāḥ puruṣāḥ dvijāḥ nadīm pibanti vimalām gaṅgām sindhum sarasvatīm godāvarīm narmadām ca bahūdām ca mahā nadīm śatadrum candrabhāgām ca yamunām ca mahā nadīm dṛṣadvatīm vitastām ca vipāpām svaccha bālukām nadīm vetravatīm ca eva kṛṣṇām veṇīm ca nimnagām irāvatīm vitastām capayoṣṇīm devikām api vedasmṛtim vedaśirām tridivām sindhulā kṛmim karīṣiṇīm citravahām trisenām ca eva nimnagām gomatīm dhūtapāpām cacam danām ca mahā nadīm kauśikīm tridivām hṛdyām nācitām rohita araṇīm rahasyām śatakum bhām ca sarayūm ca dvijottamāḥ carmaṇvatīm vetravatīm hastisomām diśam tathā śarāvatīm payoṣṇīm ca bhīmām bhīmarathīm api kāverīculukām ca apitāpīm śatamalām api nīvārām mahitām ca api suprayogām tathā nadīm sindhum vājinīm pura mālinīm pūrvābhirāmām vīrām ca bhīmām mālāvatīm tathā palāśinīm pāpa harām mahendrām paṭalāvatīm karīṣiṇīm asiknīm cakuśacīrīm mahā nadīm marutām pravarām menām tathā anāvatīm anuṣṇām ca sevyām kāpīm ca sattamāḥ sadāvīrām adhṛṣyām cakuśacīrām mahā nadīm rathacitrām jyotirathām viśvāmitrāṅkapim jalām caṃ drāvahaphalīm ca eva kucīrām ambuvāhinīm vainadīm piṅgalām veṇām tuṅgavegām mahā nadīm vidiśām kṛṣṇaveṇām ca tāmrām ca kapilām api dhenum sa kāmām vedasvām haviḥ srāvām mahā pathām śiprām ca picchalām ca eva bhāradvājīm ca nimnagām kaurṇikīm nimnagām śoṇām bāhudām atha candramām durgāmam taḥśilām ca eva brahmamedhyām dṛṣadvatīm parokṣām atharohīm ca tathā ajam būnadīm api su nāsām tamasām dāsīm sāmānyām varaṇām asim nīlām dhṛtikarīm ca eva parṇāśām ca mahā nadīm mānavīm vṛṣabhām bhāsām brahma medhyām dṛṣadvatīm etāḥ ca anyāḥ ca bahulā mahā nadyāḥ vijarṣabhāḥ sadā nirāmayāṅ kṛṣṇām mam dagām mam da vāhinīm brāhmaṇīm ca mahā gaurīm durgām api ca sattamāḥ citrotpalām citrarathām atulām rohiṇīm tathā dākinīm vaitaraṇīm kokām ca api mahā nadīm śuktimatīm anaṅgām ca tathā eva vṛṣasāhvayām ca tathā eva vṛṣaka tvayām kumārīm ṛṣi tulyām ca māriṣām ca sarasvatīm dākinīm su puṇyām ca sarva aṅgaṅgām ca sattamāḥ viśvasyamātaraḥ sarvāḥ sarvāḥ ca eva mahā phalāḥ tathā nadyaḥ su prakāśāḥ śata śotha sahasraśas iti etāḥ saritaḥ viprāḥ samākhyātāḥ yathāsmṛti cālāḥ śālva mātreya jāṅgalāḥ ca baudhāmālāḥ tathā eva ca matsyāḥ kuśaṭṭāḥ saugandhyāḥ kutsapāḥ kāśi kośalāḥ cedi matsya karuṣāḥ ca bhojāḥ sindhupulim dakāḥ uttamāḥ ca daśa arṇāḥ ca m ekalāḥ ca utkalaiḥ saha paṣcālāḥ kośalāḥ ca eva na eka pṛṣṭha yugandharāḥ bodhā madrāḥ kaliṅgāḥ ca kāśaya uparakāśayaḥ jaṭharāḥ kukurāḥ ca eva su daśārṇāḥ su sattamāḥ kum tayaḥ avam tayaḥ ca eva tathā eva aparakum tayaḥ tāmallakāḥ puṇḍrāḥ vidarbhā nṛpavāhikāḥ aśmakāḥ sottarāḥ ca eva goparāṣṭrāḥ kanīyasaḥ adhirājya kuśaṭṭāḥ ca mallarāṣṭrāḥ ca keralāḥ mālavāḥ ca upavāsyāḥ ca cakrā vakrā ālayāḥ śakāḥ videha amagadhāḥ sadma amalaja avijayāḥ tathā aṅgāḥ avaṅgāḥ kaliṅgāḥ ca yakṛllomānaḥ eva ca mallāḥ sudeṣṇāḥ prahlādāḥ mahiṣāḥ śaśakāḥ tathā bāhlika avāṭadhānāḥ ca ābhīrāḥ kālatoyakāḥ aparām tāḥ parām tāḥ ca paṅkalāḥ ca rmacaṇḍikāḥ aṭavī śekharāḥ ca eva meru bhūtāḥ ca sattamāḥ upāvṛta anupāvṛtāḥ surāṣṭrāḥ kekayāḥ tathā kuṭṭā aparām tām āheyāḥ kakṣāḥ sāmudra niṣkuṭāḥ bahirgiri yoṅga malada amagadha mālava arghaṭāḥ sattvatarāḥ prāvṛṣeyāḥ bhārgavāḥ ca dvijarṣabhāḥ puṇḍra bhārgāḥ kirātāḥ ca sudeṣṇa bhāsurāḥ tathā śaka aniṣāda aniṣadhāḥ tathā eva ānarta naiṛtāḥ ca kum talā kuśakāḥ tathā tarigrahāḥ śūrasena āījikāḥ kalpakāraṇāḥ tila bhāga āma sārāḥ ca dakāḥ kāśmīrāḥ dhārādarśakāḥ tathā ca saurilāḥ bāhlikāḥ tathā darvī camālavā darvā vātajāma rathoragāḥ balaraṭṭāḥ tathā viprāḥ sudāmānaḥ mumallikāḥ ca eva kulim dāgandhikāḥ tathā vanāyavaḥ daśāḥ pārśvaromāṇaḥ kuśabim davaḥ kācchāḥ gopāla kacchāḥ ca jāṅgalāḥ kuru varṇakāḥ kirātāḥ barbarāḥ siddhāḥ vaidehāḥ tāmraliptikāḥ auḍra mlecchāḥ sa sairindrāḥ pārvatīyāḥ ca sattamāḥ atha apare janapadāḥ dakṣiṇāḥ muni puṅgavāḥ draviḍāḥ keralāḥ prācyāḥ mūṣikāḥ bāla mūṣikāḥ karṇāṭakāḥ māhiṣakāḥ vikandhāḥ mūṣikāḥ tathā jhallikāḥ kuntalāḥ ca eva sauhṛdāḥ nala kānanāḥ kaukkuṭakāḥ tathā bolāḥ kokaṇāḥ maṇi vālakāḥ samaṅgā kanakāḥ ca eva kuṅkura aṅgāra māriṣāḥ vyūḍhakāḥ korakāḥ proṣṭāḥ saṅgavega dharāḥ tathā mālava amalarāḥ ca eva tathā eva aparavartakāḥ kulim dāḥ kāladāḥ ca eva caṇḍakāḥ kuraṭāḥ tathā ca jayāḥ ca tapanāḥ sūtapāḥ tathā ṛṣikāḥ ca vidarbhāḥ ca staṅgana aparataṅgakāḥ uttarāḥ ca apare mleccha ajana ahi muni puṅgavāḥ javanāḥ ca bojā dāruṇā mleccha jātayaḥ sakṛghṛhāḥ kulaṭyāḥ ca hūṇā pārasikaiḥ saha tathā eva ramaṇāḥ ca anyāḥ tathā ca daśamālikāḥ kṣatriya upaniveśāḥ ca vaiśya śūdra kulāni ca śūra ābhīrāḥ ca daradāḥ kāśmīrāḥ paśubhiḥ saha khāṇḍīkāḥ ca tuṣārāḥ ca padmagā giri gahvarāḥ ādreyāḥ sabhirāda ājāḥ tathā evastanapoṣakāḥ droṣakāḥ ca kaliṅgāḥ ca kirātānām ca jātayaḥ tomara āhanyamānāḥ ca tathā eva karabham jakāḥ ete ca anye janapadāḥ prācya udīcyāḥ tathā eva ca uddeśa mātreṇa mayā deśāḥ saṅkīrtitāḥ dvijāḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svargakhaṇḍe ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ pramāṇam āyuṣaḥ sūta balam ca api śubha aśubham sūtaḥ uvāca catvāri bhārate varṣe yugāni muni puṅgavāḥ kṛtam tretā dvāparam catiṣyam ca dvija sattaāḥ pūrve kṛta yugam nāma tatas tretā yugam dvijāḥ tad paścāt dvāparam ca atha tatas tiṣyaḥ pravartate catvāri tu sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām muni puṅgavāḥ āyuḥ saṅkhyā kṛta yuge saṅkhyāta ahi tapodhanāḥ tathā trīṇi sahasrāṇi tretāyām āyuṣaḥ viduḥ mahā bala amahā sattvāḥ prajṣā guṇa samanvitāḥ prajāyante ca jātāḥ ca śataśas atha sahasraśas dvijāḥ kṛta yuge viprāḥ abalinaḥ priya darśanāḥ prajāyante ca jātāḥ ca munayaḥ vaitapodhanāḥ mahā utsāha a mahātmānaḥ dhārmikāḥ satya vādinaḥ priya darśā vapuṣmantaḥ mahā vīryyā dhanuḥ dharāḥ kṣatriyāḥ śūrasam matāḥ tretāyām kṣatriyāḥ tāvat sarve vai cakravartinaḥ mahā utsāha a vīryavantaḥ paraspara vadha eṣiṇaḥ tejasām dhena saṃyuktāḥ krodhanāḥ puruṣāḥ kila lubdhāḥ ca ānṛtakāḥ ca eva bho dvijāḥ īrṣyā mānaḥ tathā krodhaḥ umāyā asūyā tathā eva ca bhūtānām rāgaḥ lobhaḥ ca sattamāḥ guṇa uttaram haimavatam har iva ṛṣam tatas param iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ jaṃ būkhaṇḍaḥ tvayā a proktaḥ yathā vadiha sattamaḥ viṣkam bhasya ca prabrūhi parimāṇam hi tattvataḥ śākadvīpaḥ canobrūhi kuśadvīpaḥ cadhārmikam sūtaḥ uvāca viprāḥ su bahavaḥ dvīpāḥ yaiḥ idam sam tatam jagat sapta dvīpān pravakṣyāmi śṛṇudhvam dvija puṅgavāḥ aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi yojanāni dvijottamāḥ ṣaṣ śatāni bhojambu parvataḥ lavaṇasya samudrasya viṣkam bho dviguṇaḥ smṛtaḥ nānā janapada ākīrṇaḥ maṇi vidruma citritaḥ siddha cāraṇasam kīrṇaiḥ sāgaraḥ parimaṇḍalaḥ śākadvīpaḥ ca vakṣyāmi yathā vadiha sattamāḥ śṛṇuta adya yathā nyāyam bruvataḥ mama adhārmikāḥ jambudvīpa pramāṇena dviguṇaḥ sa dvijarṣabhāḥ viṣkam bhena mahā bhāgāḥ sāgaraḥ api vibhāgaśaḥ kṣīrodaḥ muni śārdūla ayena samparivāritaḥ kṣepaḥ yathā vat muni sattamāḥ uktaḥ eṣa mahā bhāgāḥ kim anyat kathayāmi ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ kṣepaḥ yathā uktaḥ tvayā mahā prājṣa vistaram brūhi tattvataḥ sūtaḥ uvāca tathā eva parvata aviprāḥ sapta atra maṇi parvatāḥ ratna ākarāḥ tathā nadyaḥ teṣām nāma a nivarṇaye atīva guṇavat sarvam tattvam pṛcchatha dhārmikāḥ prāc āyataḥ mahā bhāga amalayaḥ nāma parvataḥ tatas varṣam prabhavati varṣā kāle dvijottamāḥ revatī divi nakṣatram pitāmaha kṛtaḥ vidhiḥ uttareṇa tu vipra indrāḥ śyāmaḥ nāma mahā giriḥ nava megha prabhaḥ prām śuḥ śrīmān ujjvala vigrahaḥ yatas śyāma tvam āpannāḥ prajā mudita mānasāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ su mahān sam śayaḥ asmākam prāptaḥ yam sūtayat tvayā prajāḥ katham sūta samyak samprāptāḥ śyāma tām iha sūtaḥ uvāca sarveṣu eva mahā prājṣā dvīpeṣu muni puṅgavāḥ gauraḥ kṛṣṇaḥ ca patagaḥ tayoḥ varṇa antare dvijāḥ śyāmaḥ yasmāt pravṛttaḥ vai tasmāt śyāmagiriḥ smṛtaḥ tatas param muni śreṣṭhāḥ durgaśailaḥ mahodayaḥ teṣām yojana viṣkam bho dviguṇaḥ pravibhāgaśaḥ vipra indrāḥ samproktāni manīṣibhiḥ jaladhāraḥ mahā prājṣaḥ sukumāra eti smṛtaḥ tasya tukaumāraḥ śyāmaḥ ca maṇikāṣcanaḥ keśarasya atha maudākī pareṇa tu mahā n pumān jaṃ būdvīpena saṅkhyātaḥ tasya madhye mahā drumaḥ śākaḥ nāma mahā prājṣāḥ prajāḥ tasya saha anugāḥ tatra puṇyā janapadāḥ pūjyate tatra śaṅkaraḥ tatra gacchanti siddhāḥ ca cāraṇāḥ daivatāni ca dhārmikāḥ ca prajāḥ sarvāḥ catvāraḥ gata matsarāḥ varṇāḥ sva karma niratāḥ an a caḥ stenaḥ atra dṛśyate dīrgha āyuṣaḥ mahā prājṣa ajarā mṛtyu vivarjitāḥ nadyaḥ puṇya jalāḥ tatra gaṅgā ca bahudhā gatā tathā mahā nadīcabhaḥ viprāḥ tathā maṇijalānadī ikṣuvarddhanikā ca eva nadī muni varāḥ smṛtāḥ tatas pravṛttāḥ puṇya udānadyaḥ parama śobhanāḥ sahasrāṇām śatāni eva yataḥ varṣati vāsavaḥ nata āsām tathā eva ca śakyam te parisaṅkhyātum tatas puṇyā janapadāḥ ca tvāraḥ loka viśrutāḥ mṛgāḥ ca maśakāḥ ca eva mānasa amallakāḥ tathā mṛgāḥ ca brahma bhūyiṣṭhāḥ sva karma nirata a dvijāḥ maśakeṣu turājanya adhārmikāḥ sarva kāma dāḥ mānasāḥ ca mahā bhāgāḥ vaiśya dharma upajīvinaḥ sarva kāma samāyuktāḥ śūra adharma artha niścitāḥ śūdrāḥ tumallaka anityam puruṣa adharma śīlinaḥ na tatra rāja a vipra indra ana daṇḍa ūna ca daṇḍikāḥ etāvat eva aśakyam tu tatra iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca uttareṣu śrūyate kathā paraspareṇa dviguṇāḥ sarve dvīpāḥ dvijarṣabhāḥ parvatāḥ ca mahā prājṣāḥ samudraiḥ parivāritāḥ parvataḥ paścime kṛṣṇaḥ nārāyaṇasakhaḥ dvijāḥ tatra ratnāni divyāni svayam rakṣati keśavaḥ sampūjyate śālmaliḥ ca dvīpeśālmalikedvijāḥ mokṣibhiḥ saṅgataḥ nityam prabhuḥ nārāyaṇaḥ hariḥ dyutimān nāma vipra indrāḥ tṛtīyaḥ kumudaḥ giriḥ caturthaḥ puṣpavān nāma paṣca mastu kuśeśayaḥ ṣaṣṭaḥ harigiriḥ nāma ṣaṭ ete parvata uttamāḥ teṣām antar aviṣkam bho dviguṇaḥ pravibhāgaśaḥ audbhidam prathamam varṣam dvitīyam reṇumaṇḍalam tṛtīyam suratham nāma caturtham laṃ banam smṛtam dhṛtimat paṣcamam varṣam ṣaṣṭham varṣam prabhākaram saptamam kāpilam varṣam sapta aitevarṣalam bakāḥ eteṣu deva gandharvāḥ prajāḥ ca mudita advijāḥ gaura prāyojanaḥ su kumāraḥ ca sattamāḥ avaśiṣṭeṣu sarveṣu vakṣyāmi dvija puṅgavāḥ yathā śrutam krauṃ ca dvīpe mahā bhāgāḥ krauṃ ca ūnāma mahā giriḥ aṃ dhakārāt paraḥ viprāḥ mainākaḥ parvata uttamaḥ govindāt paratas ca eva puṇḍarīkaḥ mahā giriḥ puṇḍarīkāt paraḥ ca api dubhisvanaḥ purastāt dviguṇaḥ teṣām viṣkam bho muni puṅgavāḥ deśān tatra pravakṣyāmi tad meni gadataḥ śṛṇu manonugāt paras deśa auṣṇaḥ nāma tapodhanāḥ uṣṇāt paraḥ prāvarakaḥ dhakārakaḥ aṃ dhakāraka deśāt tumuni deśaḥ paraḥ smṛtaḥ siddhacāraṇasam kīrṇaḥ gauraḥ prāyojanaḥ smṛtaḥ ete deśāḥ samākhyātāḥ deva gandharva sevitāḥ paryupāsanti tam nityam devāḥ sarve mahā ṛṣayaḥ vāgbhiḥ manonukūlābhiḥ pūjayanti dvijottamāḥ dvīpeṣu teṣu sarveṣu prajānām muni sattamāḥ ārogya āyuṣpramāṇābhyām dviguṇam dviguṇam tatas ete janapadāḥ viprāḥ dvīpeṣu teṣu sattamāḥ īśvaraḥ daṇḍam udyamya svayam eva prajāpatiḥ dvīpān etān muni vara arakṣam stiṣṭhati sarvadā sa rājā sa śivaḥ viprāḥ sa pitā sa pitāmahaḥ gopāyati dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ prajāḥ sa dvija paṇḍitāḥ tatas param sthitiḥ caturasraḥ mahā prājṣaḥ sarva tas parimaṇḍalaḥ tatra tiṣṭhanti vipra indrāḥ ca tu ārolokasam matāḥ diggaja ahi muniśreṣṭha vāmana airāvatām janāḥ supratīkaḥ tathā viprāḥ prabhinna karaṭāmukhāḥ tasya aham parimāṇam na saṅkhyātum iham utsahe asambandhā muni śreṣṭhāḥ tān nigṛhṇanti te dvijāḥ puṣkaraiḥ padmasam kāśaiḥ vikarṣanti mahā prabhaiḥ śatadhā punar eva āśu tān mum canti nityaśas śvasadbhiḥ mukha nāsābhyām diggajaiḥ iva mārutāḥ āgacchanti dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ tatra tiṣṭhanti vaiprajāḥ yathā uddiṣṭam mayā a proktam sa nirmāṇam idam jagat śrutvā idam pṛthivī mānam puṇya dam ca manonugam siddhārthaḥ sādhusam mataḥ yaḥ śṛṇoti samākhyātum parvaṇi idam dhṛta vrataḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ pṛthivyā ahi parīmāṇam sam sthānam saritaḥ tathā tvattaḥ śrutvā mahā bhāga amṛtam pītam eva ca tatra bhūmauca tīrtha ani pāvana anītinaḥ śrutam ācakṣvata anisarvāṇi yathā phala karāṇi ca sa viśeṣam mahā prājṣa śrotum sūtaḥ uvāca dhanyam puṇyam mahā khyānam pṛṣṭam eva tapodhanāḥ yathā mati pravakṣyāmi yathā yogam yathā śrutam purātanam pravakṣyāmi devarṣeḥ nāradasya hi vādam śṛṇuta dvija sattaāḥ hṛta rājyāḥ pāṇḍu putrāḥ vane tasmin mahā rathāḥ nyavasanti mahā bhāgāḥ draupadyā saha pāṇḍavāḥ athā apaśyat mahātmānam deva ṛṣim tatra nāradam dīpyamānam śriyā abrāhmyā ādīpta agni sama tejasam sa taiḥ parivṛtaḥ śrīmān bhrātṛbhiḥ kuru nandanaḥ yathā ca devān sāvitrī iyājṣasenī tathā patīn pratigṛhya tatas pūjām nāradaḥ bhagavān ṛṣiḥ āśvāsayat dharmaputram yukta rūpa priyeṇa ca uvāca ca mahātmānam dharmarājam yudhiṣṭhiram brūhi dharma bhṛtām śreṣṭha kim prārthyam atha dharmasutaḥ rājā a praṇamya bhrātṛbhiḥ saha uvāca jaliḥ vākyam nāradam devasam mitam tvayi tuṣṭe mahā bhāga sarva loka abhipūjite samdeham me muni śreṣṭha hṛd stham tvam chettum arhasi pradakṣiṇām yaḥ kurute pṛthivīm tīrtha tatparaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājan avahitaḥ dilīpena yathā purā vasiṣṭhasya sakāśāt vai sarvam etat upaśrutam purā bhāgīrathī tīre dilīpo rāja sattamaḥ śubhe deśe mahā rāja puṇye deva ṛṣi pūjite sa pitṝn starpayāmāsa devān ca parama dyutiḥ ṛṣīn ca tarpayāmāsa vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā dadarśa bhūtasam kāśam vasiṣṭham ṛṣim uttamam purohitam satam dṛṣṭvā dīpyamānam iva śriyā upasthitam mahā rāja pūjayāmāsa bhārata sahi dharma bhṛtām śreṣṭhaḥ vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā śirasā āca arghyam ādāya śuciḥ prayata mānasaḥ evam uktvā mahā rāja dilīpaḥ dvipadām varaḥ vāgyataḥ prām jaliḥ bhūtvā tūṣṇīm āsīt yudhiṣṭhira tam dṛṣṭvā niyamena atha svādhyāyena ca karṣitam dilīpam nṛpati śreṣṭham muniḥ prīta manāḥ bhavat iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca satyena ca mahā bhāga tuṣṭaḥ smi tava sarvaśas yasya īdṛśaḥ te dharmaḥ yam pitaraḥ tāritāḥ tvayā tena paśyasi imām putra yājyaḥ ca asi idam anagha dilīpaḥ uvāca kṛtam iti evam anye hi yat aham dṛṣṭavān prabhum tat aham śrotum icchāmi pṛthak saṅkīrtanam tvayā pradakṣiṇām yaḥ pṛthivīm karoti dvija sattaa vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca kathayiṣyāmi tat aham ṛṣīṇām mad parāyaṇam tat ekāgra manāḥ tāta śṛṇu tīrtheṣu yat phalam vidyā tapaḥ ca kīrtiḥ ca sa tīrtha phalam aśnute pratigrahāt upāvṛttaḥ santuṣṭaḥ niyataḥ śuciḥ aham kāra nivṛttaḥ ca sa tīrtha phalam aśnute akrodhanaḥ ca rāja indra satya śīla udṛḍha vrataḥ ātma upamaḥ ca bhūteṣu sa tīrtha phalam aśnute ṛṣibhiḥ kratavaḥ proktāḥ deveṣu api yathā kramam prāptum mahīpate bahu upakaraṇa a yajṣa nānā sambhāra vistarāḥ ṛṣīṇām paramam guhyam idam dharma bhṛtām vara tīrtha abhigamanam puṇyam yajṣaiḥ api viśiṣyate an upoṣya tri rātrāṇi tīrtha abhigamanena ca a dattvā a kāṣcanam gāḥ ca daridraḥ nāma jāyate agniṣṭoma ādibhiḥ yajṣaiḥ iṣṭvā vipula dakṣiṇaiḥ daśa koṭi sahasrāṇi tīrthānām vaimahīpate sānnidhyam puṣkareya iṣām trisamdhyam sūryavam śaja āditya vasavaḥ rudrāḥ sādhyāḥ ca sa marut gaṇāḥ divya yogāḥ mahā rāja puṇyena mahatā dvijāḥ manasā pi abhikāma sya puṣkarāṇi manīṣiṇaḥ pūyam te sarva pāpāni asim mad tīrthe mahā bhāga nitya meva pitāmahaḥ puṣkareṣu mahā bhāga devāḥ sa ṛṣi purogamāḥ siddhim paramikām pāptāḥ puṇyena mahatā anvitāḥ tatra abhiṣekam yaḥ kuryāt pitṛ deva arcaneḥ atas aśvamedhāt daśaguṇam pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ api ekam bhojayet vipram puṣkara araṇyam āśritaḥ tena eti pūjitām llokān brahmaṇaḥ sadane sthitān sāyam prātar smaret yaḥ jaliḥ upaspṛṣṭam bhavet tena sarva tīrtheṣu pārthiva janma prabhṛti yat pāpam striyāḥ u vā a puruṣasya vā yathā surāṇām sarveṣām ādiḥ tu madhusūdanaḥ tathā eva puṣkaraḥ rājan tīrthānām ādiḥ ucyate uṣṭvā dvādaśa ṛṣāṇi puṣkare niyataḥ śuciḥ yaḥ tu varṣa śatam pūrṇam agnihotram upāśnute kārtikīm vā āvaset ekām puṣkare samam eva tat duṣkaram puṣkaregam tum duṣkaram puṣkaretapaḥ duṣkaram puṣkara idānam vastum ca eva su duṣkaram trīṇiśṛm gāṇi śubhrāṇi trīṇiprasravaṇāni ca puṣkarāṇi ādi tīrthāni na vidmaḥ tatra kāraṇam uṣṭvā dvādaśa varṣāṇi niyataḥ niyata aśanaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe puṣkara tīrtha māhātmya varṇanam nāma ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca pradakṣiṇam upāvṛttaḥ ojam bū mārge samāviśet jaṃ bū mārgam samāviśya pitṛ deva ṛṣi pūjitam tatra uṣya rajanīḥ paṣca ṣaṣṭha kāla aśnuvan naraḥ jambumārgāt upāvṛttaḥ gacchet tudulikāśramam agastya āśramam āsādya pitṛ deva arcaneḥ atas śāka vṛttiḥ phalaiḥ vā api kaumāram vindate param kanyāśramam samāsādya śrīpuṣṭam loka pūjitam dharmāraṇyam hi tat puṇyam ādyam ca pārthiva ṛṣabha arcayitvā pitṝn devān prayataḥ niyata aśanaḥ prādakṣiṇyam tatas kṛtvā ayayātipatanam vrajet nāmnā abhadravaṭam nāma triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam mahā deva prasādāt ca gāṇapatyam avāpnuyāt narmadām tu samāsādya nadīm trailokya viśrutām iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca tīrtham uttamam narmadāyāḥ ca māhātmyam vasiṣṭha uktam dvijottama katham eṣām aha puṇyā nadī narmadā nāma vikhyātā tat mama brūhi nārada nāradaḥ uvāca tārayet sarva bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca narmadāyāḥ tu māhātmyam vasiṣṭha uktam mayā aśrutam puṇyākanakhale gaṅgā kurukṣetre sarasvatī sarva tra narmmadā sadyas punāti gām geyam darśanādeva nārmadam kaliṅga deśe paśca arddhe parvate amarakam ṭake ramaṇīyā a manoramā sa deva asura gandharva aṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ tapaḥ taptvā mahā rāja siddhim ca paramām gatāḥ upoṣya rajanīm ekām kulānām tārayet śatam janeśvare naraḥ snātvā piṇḍam dattvā yathā vidhi parva tasya samam tātturudra koṭiḥ pratiṣṭhitā prītā tasya bhavet sarvā rudra koṭiḥ na saṃśayaḥ tatra snātvā śuciḥ bhūtvā brahmacārī jita indriyaḥ pitṛ kāryam tu kurvīta vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā āsaptamam kulam tasya svarga itiṣṭhati pāṇḍava ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi svarga loke mahīyate apsaraḥ gaṇasam kīrṇaḥ divya strī parivāritaḥ divya gandha anuliptaḥ ca divya alam kāra bhūṣitaḥ dhanavān dāna śīlaḥ ca dhārmikaḥ ca eva jāyate yojanānām śatam sāgram śrūyate sarit uttamā ṣaṣṭi tīrtha sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭi koṭyaḥ tathā eva ca sarva hiṃ sā anivṛttaḥ ca sarva bhūta hita īrataḥ evam sarva samācāraḥ kṣetrapālān parivrajet tasya puṇya phalam rājan śṛṇuṣva avahitohime śatam varṣa sahasrāṇām apsaraḥ gaṇasam kīrṇe divya strī paricārite divya gandha anuliptaḥ ca divya alam kāra bhūṣitaḥ tatas svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ rājā abhavati vīryavān gṛham ca eva nānā ratna vibhūṣitam ālekhya sahitam divyam dāsī dāsa samanvitam matta mātam ga śabdaiḥ ca hayānām hreṣitena ca tasmin gṛhe uṣitvā tu krīḍā bhoga samanvitaḥ jīvet varṣa śatam sāgram sarva roga vivarjitaḥ kanyāḥ trīṇi sahasrāṇi ekaikasya api ca apare pṛthivyām āsamudrāyām īdṛśā ūnā eva jāyate yādṛśaḥ yam nara śreṣṭha parvate amarakam ṭake koṭitīrtham tuvijṣeyam parva tasya rudraḥ jāleśvaraḥ nāma triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ tasya piṇḍa pradānena samdhyā upāsana karmaṇā dakṣiṇe narmadāyāḥ tu kapilā ākhyā mahā nadī sarala arjuna sam channānā atidūre vyavasthitā astipuṇyā mahā bhāgā triṣu lokeṣu viśrutā tatra koṭi śatam sāgram tīrthānām tu yudhiṣṭhira purāṇe śrūyate rājan sarvam koṭi guṇam bhavet tasyāḥ tīretuyevṛkṣāḥ patitāḥ kāla paryayāt narmadā toya saṃyuktāḥ te pi yānti parām gatim dvitīyā atu mahā bhāga viśalya karaṇā aśubhā tatra tīre naraḥ snātvā viśalyaḥ bhavati kṣaṇāt yakṣa rākṣasa gandharva ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ śrita apuṇya a viśalyā nāma nāmataḥ utpāditā amahā bhāgā sarva pāpa praṇāśinī upoṣya rajanīm ekām kulānām tārayet śatam kapilāca viśalyāca śrūyate rāja sattama īśvareṇa purāṇa ukta ā lokānām hita kāmyayā anaśanam kuryāt tasmin tīrthe narādhipa narmadāyām tu rāja indra purāṇā iyat śrutam mayā sarasvatyām ca gaṅgāyām narmadāyām yudhiṣṭhira samam dānam ca snānam ca yathā me śaṅkaraḥ abravīt parityajati yaḥ prāṇān parvate amarakam ṭake varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram indra loke mahīyate narmadāyāḥ jalam puṇyam phena ūrmi samalam kṛtam pavitram śirasā avam sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate evam trayāṇām api lokānām punāti eṣām aha nadī vaṭeśvare mahā puṇye gaṅgādvāre tapovane eteṣu sarva sthāneṣu ye irditāḥ saṃśita vratāḥ śrūyate daśaguṇam puṇyam narmadā dvāsa saṅgame iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca narmadā tu na munibhiḥ tu mahā bhāgaiḥ vibhakta adharma kāṅkṣibhiḥ yajṣopavīta mātrāṇi pravibhaktāni pāṇḍava jaleśvaram triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam tasya utpattim kathayataḥ śṛṇu pāṇḍava nandana purā muni gaṇāḥ ca eva marut gaṇāḥ stuvamānāḥ tu samprāptāḥ yatra devaḥ maheśvaraḥ vijṣāpayanti deveśam sa indrāḥ ca eva marut gaṇāḥ īśvaraḥ uvāca svāgatam tu muni śreṣṭhāḥ kimartham iha ca āgatāḥ kim duḥkham kaḥ anusam tāpaḥ kutas vā abhayam āgatam ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ tasmāt bhīta avirūpa akṣa tvām eva śaraṇam gatāḥ trāyasva mahataḥ duḥkhāt deva tvam hi parāgatiḥ evam prasādam deveśa sarveṣām kartum arhasi yena devāḥ su prasannāḥ sukham edhanti śaṅkara etat sarvam kariṣyāmi imāḥ aviṣādam kariṣyatha acireṇa eva kālena kuryām yuṣmad sukha āvaham āśvāsayitvā tān sarvān narmadā taṭam āsthitaḥ tayāmāsa sarva īśaḥ tad vadham pratipāṇḍava evam sam ciṃ tya bhagavān nāradam smarata itadā smaraṇāt deva samprāptaḥ nāradaḥ samupasthitaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca ājṣāpaya mahā deva kim artham sam smṛtaḥ hi aham īśvaraḥ uvāca bāṇasya dānava indrasya śīghram gaccha atha tat kuru bhartāraḥ devatā ābhāḥ ca striyaḥ ca apsarasā upamāḥ strīṇām hṛdaya nāśāya praviṣṭaḥ tam puram prati śobhate etat puram divyam nānā ratna upaśobhitam śata yojana vistīrṇam tatas dviguṇam āyatam mālā kuṇḍala keyūraiḥ mukuṭena virājitam hāra ratnaiḥ ca sam channam lalanāḥ tasya ratna āḍhyāḥ narāḥ kanaka maṇḍitāḥ utthitaḥ nāradam dṛṣṭvā dānava indraḥ mahā balaḥ bāṇaḥ uvāca argham pādyam yathā nyāyam kriyatām dvija sattaa tasya bhāryā mahā devī anaupamyātu nāmataḥ nāradaḥ uvāca sa sāgarā navadvīpā ādattā abhavati medinī sūrya koṭi pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sarva kāmikaiḥ modate ca akṣayam kālam su ciram kṛta śāsanaḥ kadam bacam aneka vividha drumāḥ tathā ubhe sam krām tiḥ viṣuvant ca eva dina chidra mukham tathā puṇyāni etāni sarvāṇi yāḥ striyaḥ tāsām tu dharma yuktānām svarga iva āsaḥ na saṃśayaḥ sarva pāpa vivarjitāḥ upavāsa ratāḥ anāryaḥ na upasarpanti tāpasāḥ evam kartum arhasi nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā rājṣī vacanam abravīt suvarṇa maṇi ratnāni vastrāṇi ābharaṇāni ca pratigṛhṇat vijaśreṣṭha prīyetām hari śaṅkarau nāradaḥ uvāca bhadra ikṣīṇa vṛtiḥ ca yaḥ dvijaḥ evam tāsām manaḥ hṛtvā sarvāsām upadiśya vā jagāma bharata śreṣṭha svakīyam sthānakam punar atra ākṛṣṭa manāḥ tāstuan yatra gata mānasāḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ paṣcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca nāmnā ahareśvaram sthānam triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam gāḍīvam daram kṛtvā aguṇam sthānam viṣṇum kṛtvā śara uttamam agre ca agnim pratiṣṭhāpya mukhe vāyuḥ samarpitaḥ svayam indraḥ ca cāpām sthitaḥ yamastu dakṣiṇehasta vāme kālastu dāruṇaḥ cakrāṇām ārake nyastāḥ gandharva āloka viśrutāḥ prajāpati ratha śreṣṭhe brahmā ca eva evam kṛtvā ātudeva īśaḥ sarva deva mayam ratham saḥ tiṣṭhat sthāṇu bhūta ūhi sahasram par yadā trīṇi sametāni antar ikṣa carāṇi ca tripurāṇi triśalyena tadā tāni bibhedasaḥ bhraṣṭa tejāḥ triyojāta abalam teṣām vyaśīryata utpātāḥ ca pure tasmin prādurbhūtāḥ a sahasraśas tripurasya vināśāya kāla rūpaḥ bhavat tadā canti rūpāḥ kāṣṭa mayāḥ tathā nimeṣa unmeṣaṇam ca eva kurvanti citrakarmaṇā svapne paśyanti ca ātmānam raktām bara vibhūṣitam etān paśyati utpātān tatra teṣām balam ca buddhiḥ ca hara krodhena nāśitam samīrita unala śreṣṭhauttamām geṣu bādhate sarvam tat vyākulībhūtam hāhākāram acetanam tena eva dīpitam sarvam jvalate viśikhaiḥ śikhaiḥ ca samiddhaḥ havyavāhanaḥ tatas śilāḥ diśaḥ daśa vibhāgaśaḥ sarvam kim śuka samprakhyam jvalitam dṛśyate puram gṛhāt gṛha antarena evagam tum dhūmaiḥ ca śakyate hara kopa anala ādagdham kraṃ damānam su duḥkhitam prāsāda śikhara agrāṇi viśīryanti sahasraśas nānā ratna vicitrāṇi vimānāni api anekadhā gṛhāṇi ca eva ramyāṇi dahyam tedīpti vahninā sīdanti ca anala spṛṣṭāḥ kraṃ danti vividhaiḥ svaraiḥ giri kūṭa nibhāḥ tatra dṛśyam agāra rāśayaḥ anyonyam ca pariṣvajya hutāśana prapīḍitāḥ dahyam te dānavāḥ tatra śata śotha sahasraśas haṃ sa kāraṇḍava ākīrṇa analinī sahapam kajā dahyam tenala dagdhā nipura udyānāni dīrghikāḥ amlānaiḥ paṃ kajaiḥ channa a vistīrṇa a yojanaiḥ śataiḥ giri kūṭa nibhāḥ tatra prāsāda aratna bhūṣitāḥ saha strī bāla vṛddheṣu goṣu pakṣiṣu vājiṣu sa patnīkāḥ ca eva suptāḥ sam suptā bahavaḥ janāḥ putram āliṅgyate gāḍham dahyam kācid bālā viśāla akṣī muktā āvali vibhūṣitā dhūmena ākulita a sātu pratibuddha a śikhā ardditā sutam sam cim tya mānāsā patita ādharaṇī tale kācid suvarṇa varṇa ābhā nīla ratnaiḥ vibhūṣitā dhūmena ākulita asātu patita ādharaṇī tale anya a gṛhīta hasta ātu sakhī dahati bālakaiḥ anena divya rūpā anya adṛṣṭa amada vimohitā śirasā a prām jalim kṛtvā vijṣāpayati pāvakam striyaḥ kim aparādhyam jara kokilāḥ śauca varjitaḥ aneka rūpa varṇa āḍhyā upalabhyā vadasvaha kim tvayā an aśrutam loke avadhyāḥ sarva yoṣitaḥ na kāruṇyam dayā vāpi dākṣiṇyam vā a striyā upari mlecchānām api kaṣṭaḥ asi durnivāryaḥ hi acetanaḥ āsām api durācāra strīṇām kim duṣṭa nirghṛṇa nirlajja huta āśamam nirāśaḥ tvam durācāra bālān dahasi nirdaya evam pralapamānāḥ tāḥ jalpamānā bahu svaram anyāḥ krośanti sam kruddhāḥ bāla śokena mohitāḥ puṣkariṇyām jale jvālā kūpeṣu api tathā eva ca asmān samdahya mleccha tvam kām gatim prāpayiṣyasi evam pralapatām tāsām vahniḥ vacanam abravīt vaiśvānaraḥ uvāca vināśam aham aham karttāsmi anugraham atra kodha samāviṣṭaḥ vicarāmi yadṛcchayā tatobāṇaḥ mahā tejāḥ tripuram vīkṣya dīpitam āsana sthaḥ abravīt evam aham devaiḥ vināśitaḥ alpa sāraiḥ durācāraiḥ īśvarasya niveditaḥ a parīkṣya hi aham dagdhaḥ śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā na anyaḥ śatruḥ tu mām ham tum varjjayitvā maheśvaram utthitaḥ śirasā kṛtvā liṅgam tribhuvana īśvaram ratna ani su vicitra āṇi striyaḥ nānāvidhāḥ tathā gṛhītvā a śirasā a liṅgam nyastam nagara maṇḍale tvad prasādāt mahā deva māmeliṅgam vinaśyatu tvayā ayadi apivadhyaḥ ham mām eliṅgam vinaśyatu toṭakaccham stutvā atu parameśvaram om śiva śaṅkara sarva karāya namaḥ bhava bhīma maheśa śivāya namaḥ yaḥ paṭhet toṭakam divyam prayataḥ śuci mānasaḥ imam stavam mahā divyam śrutvā devaḥ maheśvaraḥ īśvaraḥ uvāca putra pautra sapatnīnām bhāryā bhṛtya janaiḥ saha tatas nivārayāmāsa rudraḥ saptaśikham tathā tṛtīyam rakṣitam tasya śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā evam tu tripuram dagdham śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā jvālā mālā pradīptam dharaṇī tale ekam nipātitam tasya śrīśaile tripurāntake dvitīyam pātitam tatra parvate amarakam jvalam tam pātitam tatra tena jvāleśvaraḥ smṛtaḥ ūrdhvena prasthitā tasya divyā jvālā divam gatā narān caturddaśa bhuvanāni su bhuktvā āpāṇḍu nandana varṣa koṭi sahasram tutriṃśat koṭyaḥ tathā parāḥ tatas mahī talam prāpya rājā abhavati dhārmikaḥ atra saṃśayaḥ eṣa puṇyaḥ mahā rāja sarva taḥ amarakam ṭakaḥ aśvamedhāt daśaguṇam pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ svarga lokam avāpnoti dṛṣṭvā tatra maheśvaram puṇḍarīkasya yajṣasya phalam prāpnoti mānavaḥ tatra snātvā divam yānti ye mṛtāḥ te apunarbhavāḥ tu prāṇān parityajet koṭiśa ṛṣi mukhyāḥ te tapaḥ tapyanti suvratāḥ samam tāt yojanam rājan kṣetram ca amarakam śubhe jale iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe paṣcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṛṣiḥ uvāca pṛcchanti te mahātmānaḥ nāradam hi mahā janāḥ yudhiṣṭhira parāḥ sarve ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ ākhyāhi bhagavan stathyam kāverī saṅgame mahat lokānām ca hita arthāya asmākam ca vivṛddhaye tu na rāduṣkṛti kāriṇaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca śṛṇudhvam sahitāḥ sarve yudhiṣṭhira purogamāḥ atra kṛtvā mahā yajṣam kuberaḥ satya vikramaḥ siddhim prāptaḥ mahā rāja tad meni gadataḥ śṛṇu kāverī narmadām yatra saṅga tā loka viśrutām tatra snātvā śuciḥ bhūtvā kuberaḥ satya vikramaḥ brūhi kāryam yathā iṣṭam tu yat vāmanasi varttate ādi kṛt ca eva sarveṣām yakṣāṇām adhipaḥ bhavet kuberasya vacaḥ śrutvā tuṣṭaḥ devaḥ maheśvaraḥ saḥ api labdha varaḥ yakṣaḥ śīghram yakṣa kulam gataḥ kāverīsaṅgamam tatra sarva pāpa praṇāśanam abhijānanti agnipraveśam yaḥ kuryāt yaḥ ca kuryāt anāśanam ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭi koṭyaḥ tathā pare puṇya kṣayāt paribhraṣṭaḥ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ bhogavān dharma śīlaḥ ca ca eva kula udbhavaḥ tatra pītvā jalam drāyaṇa phalam labhet gaṅgā yamunayoḥ madhye yat phalam yānti mānavāḥ kāverīsaṅgame snātvā tad phalam tasya jāyate evam tu tasya rāja indra kāverī saṅgamam mahat iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca paṣca varṣa sahasrāṇi krīḍate kāma rūpadhṛk tatas ūm agāreśvare tīrthe niyataḥ niyama aśanaḥ sarva pāpa viśuddha ātma arudra lokam kām cītīrtham tatas gacchet deva ṛṣi gaṇa sevitam tatra snātvā naraḥ rājan go lokam sam avāpnuyāt tatra devaśikhā ramyā īśvareṇa nipātitā tatas puṣkariṇīm gacchet tatra snānam samācaret narmadā saritām śreṣṭhā rudra dehāt viniḥ sṛtā tārayet sarva bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca sarva deva atidevena īśvareṇa mahātmanā kathitā ṛṣi saṅghebhyaḥ hi asmākam ca viśeṣataḥ munibhiḥ sam stutā ahi eṣā narmadā pravarā nadī rudra dehāt viniṣkrām tāla lokānām hita kāmyayā sarva pāpa hara anityam sarva prāṇi namaskṛtā namaḥ puṇya jale ādye namaḥ sāgaragāmini namaḥ stute ṛṣi gaṇaiḥ śaṅkara deha niḥ sṛte yaḥ ca idam paṭhate stotram nityam vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca eva śubhām gatim smaraṇāt eva nityaśas tena puṇyā nadī jṣeyāḥ brahmahatyā apahāriṇī iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca tadā prabhṛti brahma ādyāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ sevante narmadām rājan kāma krodha vivarjitāḥ tasmin nipatitam dṛṣṭvā śūlam devasya bhū tale tasya puṇyam samākhyātam śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā śūla bheda iti vikhyātam tīrtham puṇyatamam mahat ādityeśvaram mahā puṇyam tathā ājya madhunā saha varuṇeśvaram tatas paśyet nīrājeśvaram uttamam koṭi tīrtham tu vikhyātam asurāḥ yatra yodhitāḥ yatra te nihatāḥ rājan dānavāḥ bala darpitāḥ teṣām śirāṃsi gṛhyam te nihatāḥ te samāgatāḥ taiḥ tu sam sthāpitaḥ devaḥ śūlapāṇiḥ maheśvaraḥ koṭiḥ vinihatā tatra tena koṭīśvaraḥ smṛtaḥ dreṇa kṣudra tvāt vajrakīlena ayam tritaḥ tadā prabhṛti lokānām svargama tvam nivāritam sa ghṛtam śrīphalam dattvā a dattvā ācām te pradakṣiṇam sarva kāmena sampūrṇaḥ rājā bhavati pāṇḍava mahā devam tathā upāḥ yatra yodaśyām himānavaḥ narāṇām pāpa nāśāya agastyeśvaram uttamam kārtikasya tu māsasya kṛṣṇapakṣa caturdaśī bhojanam ca eva viprāṇām sarvam koṭi guṇam bhavet śakrasya viśrutam upoṣya rajanīm ekām snānam tatra samācaret snānam kṛtvā yathā nyāyam arcayet tu janārdanam ṛṣi tīrtham tatas gacchet sarva pāpa haram nṛṇām tatra vāmanakam dṛṣṭvā mucyate brahma hatyayā ṛṣitīrtham tatas gacchet īśāneśam pumān dhruvam vaṭeśvaram tatas dṛṣṭvā paryyāptam janmanaḥ phalam tatra snātvā naraḥ rājan bhaktyā aparamayā āyutaḥ ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi śiva loke mahīyate yaḥ tu prāṇa parityāgam tatra kuryāt narādhipa akṣayam modate kālam yāvat candra divākarau narmadā taṭam āśritya tiṣṭhanti ye tu mānavāḥ te mṛtāḥ svargam āyānti tathā sukṛtinaḥ yathā surabhikeśvaram gacchet nārakam koṭikeśvaram gaṅgā avataraṇe tatra dine puṇya ūna saṃśayaḥ tuṣyata itam tu na dīśaḥ soma loke mahīyate nivartitā a purā tatra vyāsabhītā mahā nadī hum kāritā tu vyāsena dakṣiṇena tatas gatā pradakṣiṇam kuryāt tasmin tīrthe narādhipa sūtreṇa veṣṭayet yaḥ devam sa vedikam krīḍata ihi akṣayam kālam yathā rudraḥ tathā eva saḥ saṅgametu na raḥ snātvā mucyate sarva pātakaiḥ eraṇḍī triṣu lokeṣu vikhyātā a pāpa nāśinī athavā āśvayuje māse śukla pakṣasya ca aṣṭamī śuciḥ bhūtvā naraḥ snātvā sa upavāsa parāyaṇaḥ brāhmaṇam bhojayet ekam koṭiḥ bhavati bhojitā eraṇḍīsaṅgame snātvā jitaḥ śuktikām śirasi sthāpya avagāhya ca vaijalam pradakṣiṇam kuryāt tasmin tīrthe narādhipa pradakṣiṇīkṛtā atena saptadvīpā vasum dharā tatas suvarṇatilake snātvā dattvā acakāṣcanam tatas svarga cyutaḥ kālāt rājā abhavat vīryavān divyam tatra sam nihitaḥ śivaḥ tatra snātvā naraḥ rājan gāṇapatyam ava āpnuyāt datīrtham tatas gacchet sarva pāpa praṇāśanam ājanmanaḥ kṛtam pāpam snāna mātrāt vyapohati āṅgirasam tatas gacchet snānam tatra samācaret gacchet sarva sapta janma kṛtaiḥ pāpaiḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ tatra snātvā naraḥ rājyam labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ bhadratīrtham samāsādya dānam dadyāt tu yonaraḥ tasya tīrtha prabhāveṇa sarvam koṭi guṇam bhavet atha nārī bhavet kā api tatra snānam samācaret gaurī tulyā bhavet sātu indram yāti na saṃśayaḥ aṅgāreśvaram tatas gacchet snānam tatra samācaret aṅgārakyām caturthyām tu snānam tatra samācaret akṣayam modate kālam murāri kṛta śāsanaḥ pāṇḍaveśvarakam gatvā snānam tatra samācaret viṣṇu lokam tatas gatvā krīḍā bhoga samanvitaḥ tatra snātvā naraḥ rājan dānam dattvā ca kāṣcanam athavā nīla varṇa ābham vṛṣabham yaḥ samutsṛjet vṛṣabhasya tu romāṇi tat prasūti kuleṣu ca tatas svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ rājā abhavati vīryavān aśvānām śveta varṇānām sahasreṣu narādhipa tatra snātvā naraḥ rājam starpayet pitṛ devatāḥ upoṣya rajanīm ekām piṇḍam dattvā yathā vidhi kanyā gate yathā adityā iakṣayam sam citam bhavet sampūrṇām pṛthivīm dattvā yat phalam tat avāpnuyāt narmadeśvaram param tīrtham na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati sarva lakṣaṇa sampūrṇaḥ sarva vyādhi vivarjitaḥ nārmadīya uttare kūletīrtham parama śobhanam ādityāyatanam ramyam īśvareṇa tu bhāvitam tatra snātvā tu rāja indra dānam dattvā ca śaktitas tu tu na ca tathā subhaga urūpa sampannaḥ strīṇām bhavati vallabhaḥ idam tīrtham mahā puṇyam mārkaṇḍeyena bhāṣitam ye prayānti na rāja indra vat citāḥ tena saṃśayaḥ tatas samīpatas sthitvā anāgeśvaram tapovanam tatra snātvā tu rāja indra śuciḥ bhūtvā samāhitaḥ bahubhiḥ nāga kanyābhiḥ krīḍate kālam akṣayam kāleśvaram param tīrtham kuberaḥ yatra toṣitaḥ tatra snātvā tu rāja indra śuciḥ bhūtvā samāhitaḥ kāṣcanam tu tatas dadyāt anna śaktyā tu buddhimān kṛṣṇa pakṣe caturdaśyām snānam tatra samācaret caitra māse tu samprāpte śukla pakṣe trayodaśī ayodhyām tu samāsādya tīrtham śakrasya viśrutam yaḥ tu cāndrāyaṇam kuryāt tasmin tīrthe narādhipa asura āyodhitāḥ tatra vāsudevena koṭiśas tatra tīrtham samutpannam viṣṇuḥ prītaḥ bhavet iha paurṇamāsyām amāvāsyām śrāddham kuryāt yathā vidhi tatra snātvā naraḥ rājan pitṛ piṇḍam tu dāpayet gaja rūpāḥ śilāḥ tatra toya madhye pratiṣṭhitāḥ tasmin tu paḍam tṛpyanti pitaraḥ tāvat yāvat tiṣṭhati medinī tatra snātvā tu rāja indra viṣṇu loke mahīyate narmadā dakṣiṇe kūle tīrtham parama śobhanam divyam varṣa sahasram tu śaṅkaram paryupāsate samādhi parva dagdhaḥ tu śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā śveta parva upamaḥ ca eva hutāśaḥ śukla parvaṇi divya varṣa sahasreṇa tuṣṭaḥ teṣām maheśvaraḥ umayā sahitaḥ rudraḥ teṣām tuṣṭaḥ vara pradaḥ vimokṣayitvā tān sarvān narmadā taṭam āsthitān ardha yojana vistīrṇam tīrtham dikṣu samantataḥ tasmin tīrthe naraḥ snātvā upavāsa parāyaṇaḥ snānam dānam ca tatra eva bhojanam piṇḍa pātanam agni veśe jale vā api athavā api anāśane andhona mūle dattvā tu piṇḍam ca eva yathā vidhi puruṣaḥ vā api strī vā api vaset āyatane śuciḥ satām gatim avāpnoti natām sarvaiḥ mahā makhaiḥ kṣetra pālam na paśyet ca daṇḍa pālam mahā balam vṛthā tasya bhavet yātrā a dṛṣṭvā karṇa kuṇḍalam etat tīrtha phalam jṣātvā sarve devāḥ samāgatāḥ muṣcanti puṣpa vṛṣṭim tu stuvanti kusumeśvaram iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ ūnaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca bhārga veśam tatas gacchet bhaktyā yatra ca viṣṇunā huṃ kāritāḥ tu devena dānavāḥ pralayam gatāḥ śukla tīrthasya ca utpattim śṛṇu tvam pāṇḍu nandana taruṇa āditya saṅkāśe tapta kāṣcana saṃnibhe vajra sphaṭika sopāne citra paṭṭa śilā tale tatra āsīnam mahā devam sarva jṣam prabhum avyayam loka anugrāhakam śāntam gaṇa vṛndaiḥ samāvṛtam umayā sahitam devam mārkanḍaḥ paripṛcchati saṃsāra bhava bhītaḥ aham sukha upāyam bravīhi me bhagavan bhūta bhavya īśa sarva pāpa praṇāśanam tīrthānām paramam tīrtham tat vadasva maheśvara īśvaraḥ uvāca śṛṇu vipra mahā bhāga sarva śāstra viśārada snāna ādi kuru gaccha tvam ṛṣi saṅghaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ manu atri yājṣavalkyāḥ ca kāśyapaḥ ca eva aṅgirāḥ yama āpastamba saṃvartāḥ kātyāyana bṛhaspatī nāradaḥ gautamaḥ ca eva pṛcchanti dharma kāṅkṣiṇaḥ gaṅgā kanakhale puṇyā prayāgam puṣkaram gayā kurukṣetram tu puṇyam ca rāhu graste divākare divā avāya divārātrau śukla tīrtham mahā phalam darśanāt sparśanāt ca eva snānāt dhyānāt tapaḥ arjanāt śukla tīrtham mahā puṇyam nadyām tu saṃvyavasthitam cāṇikyaḥ nāma rājarṣiḥ siddhim tatra samāgataḥ śukla tīrtham mahā puṇyam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam pādapa agreṇa dṛṣṭena brahma hatyām vyapohati aham atra ṛṣi śreṣṭha tiṣṭhāmi hi umayā saha vaiśākhe vimale māsi kṛṣṇa pakṣe caturdaśī gaṇāḥ ca apsarasaḥ nāgāḥ sarve devāḥ samāgatāḥ gagana sthāḥ tu tiṣṭhanti vimānaiḥ sarva kāmakaiḥ śuklatīrthe tu rāja indra āgatāḥ dharma kāṅkṣiṇaḥ rajakena yathā vastram śuklam bhavati vāriṇā ājanma saṣcitam pāpam śukla tīrthe vyapohati snānam dānam mahā puṇyam mārkaṇḍe ṛṣi sattama śukla tīrthāt param tīrtham na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati pūrve vayasi karmāṇi kṛtvā pāpāni mānavaḥ tapasā brahmacaryeṇa yajṣaiḥ dānena vā punar deva dānena yā puṣṭiḥ na sā akratu śataiḥ api kārtikasya ca māsasya kṛṣṇa pakṣe caturdaśī śuklatīrtha param tīrtham ṛṣi siddha niṣevitam jāgaram kārayet tatra nṛtya gīta ādi maṅgalaiḥ ācāryam bhojayet paścāt śiva vrata paraḥ śuciḥ bhojanam ca yathā śaktyā vitta śāṭhyam na kārayet pradakṣiṇam tatas kṛtvā śanais deva antikam vrajet evam vai kurute yaḥ tu tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu divya yāna samārūḍhaḥ stūyamānaḥ apsaraḥ gaṇaiḥ śukla tīrthe tu yā nārī dadāti kanakam śubham ghṛtena snāpayet devam kumāram ca abhipūjayet evam yā kurute bhaktyā tasyāḥ puṇya phalam śṛṇu ayane vā caturdaśyām saṅkrāntau viṣuve tathā snātvā tu sa upavāsaḥ sa nirjita ātmā samāhitaḥ dānam dadyāt yathā śaktyā prīyetām hari śaṅkarau śukla tīrtha prabhāveṇa sarvam bhavati ca akṣayam anātham durgatam vipram nāthavantam atha api vā udvāhayati yaḥ tīrthe tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi śiva loke mahīyate iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe ūnaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ viṃśatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca asya tīrthasya māhātmyam śṛṇu tvam pāṇḍu nandana vilayam yānti sarvāṇi rūpavān jāyate naraḥ go tīrtham tu tatas gacchet dṛṣṭvā pāpāt pramucyate jyeṣṭha māse tu samprāpte caturdaśyām viśeṣataḥ sa ghṛtam śrī phalam dattvā kṛtvā ācānte pradakṣiṇam ghaṇṭā ābharaṇa saṃyuktām kapilām yaḥ prayacchati aṅgāraka dine prāpte caturthyām tu viśeṣataḥ snāpayitvā śivam bhaktyā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ tu bhojanam aṅgāraka navamyām tu amāvasyām tathā eva ca puṣpakeṇa vimānena sahasraiḥ parivāritaḥ śaivam padam avāpnoti na atra ca abhigatam bhavet rājā bhavati dharmiṣṭhaḥ rūpavān jāyate balī tṛṇabindu ṛṣiḥ nāma śāpa dagdhaḥ vyavasthitaḥ śrāvaṇe māsi samprāpte kṛṣṇa pakṣe caturdaśīm pitṝṇām tarpaṇam kṛtvā mucyate ca ṛṇa trayāt akāmaḥ vā sa kāmaḥ vā tatra snātvā tu mānavaḥ ājanma janitaiḥ pāpaiḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ pitṝṇām tarpaṇam kṛtvā mucyate ca ṛṇa trayāt prayāge yat phalam dṛṣṭam śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā tat eva nikhilam puṇyam gaṅgā rāhu arka saṅgame tasya evam paścime sthāne samīpe na ati dūratas daśāśvamedhikam nāma triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam upoṣya rajanīm ekām māsi bhādrapade tathā amāvasyām naraḥ snātvā vrajet vai yatra śaṅkaraḥ pitṝṇām tarpaṇam kṛtvā aśvamedha phalam labhet daśāśvamedhāt paścimatas bhṛguḥ brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ divyam varṣa sahasram tu īśvaram paryupāsata valmīka avasthitaḥ ca asau dakṣiṇam ca niketanam āḥ ca ryam ca mahat jātam umāyāḥ śaṅkarasya ca īśvaraḥ uvāca bhṛguḥ nāma dvija śreṣṭhaḥ ṛṣīṇām pravaraḥ muniḥ tatra prahasitā devī īśvaram pratyabhāṣata dhūma āvarta śikhā jātā tatas adya api na tuṣyasi durārādhyaḥ asi tena tvam na atra kāryā vicāraṇā na jṣāyase mahā devi ayam krodhena ceṣṭitaḥ smaraṇāt eva devasya vṛṣaḥ śīghram upasthitaḥ prāha asau mānuṣīm vācam ādeśaḥ dīyatām prabho valmīkaiḥ chāditaḥ vipraḥ enam bhūmau nipātaya tat kṣaṇāt krodha saṃtaptaḥ hastam utkṣiptavān vṛṣam evam sambhāṣamāṇaḥ tu kutra gacchasi bho vṛṣa adya tvām atha pāpmānam pratyakṣam hanami aham vṛṣa dharṣitaḥ tu tadā vipraḥ hi antarīkṣam gatam vṛṣam tṛtīyam locanam dṛṣṭvā vailakṣyāt patitaḥ bhuvi praṇipatya bhūtanātham bhavodbhavam tvām aham divya rūpam tvad guṇa nikarān vaktum kaḥ yama niyama yajṣa dānaiḥ veda abhyāsa avadhāraṇa udyogāt tvad bhakteḥ sarvam idam na arhati kalā sahasrām utkṛṣṭa rasa rasāyana khaḍgām jana pādukā ādi siddhiḥ vā cihna anibhavat praṇatānām dṛśyam para vadana vīkṣaṇa param parameśvara mām paritrāhi alīka abhimāna dagdham kṣaṇabham guru vibhava vilasitam deva krūram kupatha abhimukham patitam mām trāhi deveśa dīna indriya gaṇa sārthaiḥ bandhu janaiḥ eva pūritā āśā tucchā tathā piśaṅkara kim mūḍham mām viḍambayasi tṛṣṇām harasva śīghram lakṣmīm mām dehi hṛdaya vāsinīm nityām chim mahā deva īśvaraḥ uvāca bhṛguḥ uvāca īśvaraḥ uvāca tadā prabhṛti brahma ādyāḥ sarve devāḥ sa kinnarāḥ upāsantaḥ bhṛgoḥ tīrtham tuṣṭaḥ yatra maheśvaraḥ avaśāḥ svavaśāḥ ca api te tatra jam tavaḥ yasya gatiḥ teṣām niḥ sam etat kṣetram su vipulam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam tatra snātvā divam yānti ye mṛtāḥ te apunarbhavāḥ aupānaham tadā āchatram deyam annam sūrya uparāgā iyā udadyāt dānam ca eva yathā icchayā na jānanti narmadāyām sthitam divyam vṛṣatīrtham narādhipa bhṛgutīrthasya māhātmyam yaḥ śṛṇoti naraḥ sakṛt tatra snātvā naraḥ rājan upavāsa parāyaṇaḥ narmadāyām sthitam rājan sarva pātaka nāśanam tasmin tīrthe mahā rāja prāṇatyāgam karoti yaḥ kālena mahatā aprāptaḥ pṛthivyām ekarāj bhavet prayāgā iyat phalam dṛṣṭam mārkaṇḍeyena bhāṣitam māsi bhādrapade ca eva śukla pakṣasya ca aṣṭamīm upoṣya rajanīm ekām tatra snānam samācaret vikhyātam sarva lokeṣu yoginī tatra tiṣṭhati krīḍate yogibhiḥ sārdham śivena saha nṛtyati īśaḥ tatra vinirmuktaḥ gata ūrdhvam na saṃśayaḥ vārāham rūpam āsthāya acim tyaḥ parameśvaraḥ varāha tīrthe naraḥ snātvā dvādaśyām tu viśeṣataḥ paurṇimāsyām viśeṣeṇa tatra snānam samācaret baliḥ tasya prasīdati tasmin sthānenivāsam ca viṣṇuḥ śaṅkaram abravīt snāta mātraḥ naraḥ tatra devyāḥ sthānam avāpnuyāt tatra sarvam koṭi guṇam bhavet aparapakṣe amāvāsyām snānam tatra samācaret brāhmaṇam bhojayet ekam koṭiḥ bhavati bhojitā tatra snāyīta mānavaḥ avatāraḥ kṛtaḥ tena śaṅkareṇa mahātmanā iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe viṃ śatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca subhaga udarśanīyaḥ ca bhogavān jāyate naraḥ pitāmaham tatas gacchet brahmaṇā
