dṛṣṭvā rāmam harim tatra bhoktum aicchat su vigraham harim samprāpya kāmena tatas muktāḥ bhava arṇavāt nidhanam yasya iva kāraṇam harim sametya bhāvena amuktā gopyaḥ suradviṣaḥ janārdanam tasya veṇu dhvanim śrutvā rajanyām ballavām ganāḥ śayanāt utthitāḥ sarva avikīrṇām bara mūrddhajāḥ tyaktvā a patīn sutān badhūm styaktvā a lajjām kulam svakam jagat patim samājagmuḥ kam darpa śara pīḍitāḥ bubhujuḥ ca adharam devyaḥ sudhā amṛtam iva amarāḥ tābhiḥ sarvābhiḥ ātma īśaḥ krīḍayāmāsa govraje tena apitāḥ striyaḥ sarvāḥ pārvatī uvāca rakṣaṇa arthāya jagatyām avatīryasaḥ para dāra abhigamanam katham kuryāt janārdanaḥ sva śarīre pareṣu am ga bheda ūna asti śubha ānane tathā pahṛta pāpma tva sāmarthyāt vyāpinaḥ prabhoḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca evam uktvā atu girijām rudraḥ śrī tripurāntakaḥ kṛṣṇasya aśeṣam caritam ākhyātum sampracakrame gopā mahā utsavam kartum ārabdhāḥ tridaśām pateḥ govarddhana adri rājasya akārayāmāsa vīryavān sapta rātram nirantaram govarddhanam samutpāṭya mahā śailam janārdanaḥ gavām sam rakṣaṇa arthāya dhārayāmāsa līlayā tasya chāyām gireḥ prāpya gopā gopyaḥ ca suvrate tatas śakraḥ sahasra akṣaḥ bhītaḥ sambhrānta cetasā kṛṣṇaḥ api tam mahā śailam yathā pūrvam niveśayat tuṣṭāva aprāṣjaliḥ bhūtvā harṣa gadgadayā girā namaḥ te puṇḍarīkākṣa sarvajṣa ati trivikrama triguṇa atīta sarva īśa viśvasya ātman namaḥ astu te tvam yajṣaḥ tvam vaṣaṭkāraḥ tvam oṅkāraḥ kratuḥ haviḥ tvam eva sarva devānām pṛthivīm dyām imām deva tvam eva dhṛtavān asi ātma daḥ phala daḥ yaḥ ca syāt evam jagat īśvara avāptam tat ca tridaśaiḥ prakāśam jagatām pateḥ amṛtam ca eva mṛtyuḥ ca chāyātava sanātana hemavam taime yasya samudbhūtāḥ a hiraṇmayāḥ yasya tava avyaya yena tvayā a samārūḍhā pṛthivī varddhatā punar yam kram dasi rājamāne tapta bhāse guṇa anvite abhyaikṣetām ca manasā avaśyam śrīḥ ca sarvadā yadā apaḥ bṛhatīḥ viśva brahma māyam janārdanāḥ garbham dadhānāḥ sarge atrajanayam tīragha ogha kṛt paryapaśyat prajāpatim yajṣam dadhānāḥ tatra ādau janayam tīḥ haviḥ pumān yaḥ deveṣu ekaḥ evā āsīt adhidevaḥ parātparaḥ mā anaḥ hiṃsīt janita ayaḥ pṛthivyāḥ avyayaḥ pumān satya dharmā ajajāna avyaya īśvaraḥ etāni viśva jātāni babhūva paritāprabho yajāmaḥ tvām cayatkāmāḥ tat noastu samāsataḥ trayāṇām patayaḥ syām atava kāruṇya vīkṣaṇāt hiraṇmaya ākhyaḥ puruṣaḥ hiraṇya śmaśru keśavān āpraṇakhāt sarvam hiraṇyam savitā atuhiraṇya bhāj sadā adhīmahite rūpam dhiyaḥ yonaḥ prabhāti hi namaḥ te puṇḍarīkākṣa śrīśa sarva īśa keśava sanādeva aparādham mayā akṛtam tat kṣamyatām jagannātha ghṛṇā abdhe puruṣottama devānām hi hitam kṛtvā sukha iva sthāya medinīm mahādevaḥ uvāca sudhā amṛtena abhyaṣim cat divyām bara vibhūṣaṇaiḥ arcayitvā tu deveśam jagāma tridivam punar gopa vṛddhāḥ ca gopyaḥ ca dṛṣṭvā tatra śata kratum ca eva praharṣam atulam yayuḥ rāma kṛṣṇau mahā vīryau divya ābharaṇa bhūṣitau sahasā mathurām gatvā a kaṃsasya anti kam āviśat tatra samāsīnaḥ śubha āsane sarvam vijṣāpayāmāsa ceṣṭitam śārṅgiṇaḥ tadā nidhanam rākṣasānām ca sarpa rāja vivāsanam nivedayitvā kaṃsasya sarvam niravaśeṣataḥ kaṃsaḥ samudvigna manāḥ mantribhiḥ pariveṣṭitaḥ mantrayāmāsa taiḥ sākam ātmanaḥ nidhanam prati tatra buddhimatām śreṣṭham akrūram dharma vatsalam uvāca ātma hitam kāryam dānava indraḥ mahā balaḥ kaṃsaḥ uvāca mad bhayāt tridaśāḥ sarve śatakratu purogamāḥ viṣṇoḥ samīpam āgatya bhaya ārttāḥ śaraṇam gatāḥ sateṣām abhayam da tvā bhagavān bhūtabhāvanaḥ utpannaḥ devakī garbhā imām hantum madhusūdanaḥ vasudevaḥ api duṣṭa ātmā avam niśi bālena eva durādharṣaḥ vijaghāna mahā asurān mām hantum api sam naddhaḥ bhavet evana saṃśayaḥ upāyena eva aham tavyaḥ samānīyam ayā tadā tasmāt tvam govrajam gatvā a kṛṣṇam rāmam caya ādava sarvān gopāla vṛddhān ca nanda gopa purogamān mahādevaḥ uvāca tathā iti uktvā yaduśreṣṭhaḥ ratham āruhya vīryavān prayayau gokulam ramyam kṛṣṇam samdarśana utsukaḥ mahā bhāgavata śreṣṭhaḥ gavām madhye vyavasthitam dadarśa kṛṣṇam akliṣṭam akrūraḥ vinaya anvitaḥ nīla nīradasam kāśam sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitam padma patram viśāla akṣam dīrgha bāhum anāmayam vītam sarva avayava sundaram tulasī vana mālā āḍhyam sakam gopa kanyā parivṛtam dṛṣṭvā tatra janārdanam pulakām go harṣa aśru pluta locanaḥ avaruhya rathāt tasmāt praṇanāmayat ūdvahaḥ harṣāt sametya gopālam pariṇīya praṇamya ca rakta aravim da sadṛśau vajra cakra aṅka cihnitau sva mūrdhni dhṛtvā pāda abjau praṇanāma punar punar kailāsa śikhara ābhāsam nīlām bara dharam prabhum muktā dāma vibhūṣitam balarāmam tatas dṛṣṭvā praṇanāma sa yādavaḥ gṛham ājagmatuḥ vīrau tena akrūreṇa vṛṣṇinā nanda gopa stutam dṛṣṭvā yadu śreṣṭham samāgatam akrūroḥ rāmakṛṣṇābhyām vastrāṇi ābharaṇāni ca pṛṣṭvā akuśalam avyagram āsīnaḥ tu kuśa āsane rāja kāryāṇi sarvāṇi sampṛṣṭaḥ uvāca buddhimān akrūraḥ uvāca eṣa kṛṣṇaḥ mahā tejāḥ sākṣāt nārāyaṇaḥ avyayaḥ devatānām hita arthāya sādhūnām rakṣaṇāya ca bhū bhāraka vināśāya dharma saṃsthāpanāya ca kam sa ādīnām tu daityānām sarveṣām nidhanāya ca devakī jaṭhare jātaḥ prāvṛṣ kāle mahā niśi bhayāt kaṃsasya deveśam ānīya ānakadundubhiḥ kanyām māyām tayā āsam mohitam sarvam idam vraja kulam śubham mūrcchitāya ayaśodāyāḥ śayaneyadu puṅgavam kṛṣṇam nikṣipyatām kanyām ādāya sva gṛham yayau tām tu nikṣipya devakyāḥ śayane bahis āgamat sā āruroda tatas kṣipra devakī śayane sthitā tat śrutvā sahasā kaṃsaḥ kanyām ādāya suvrata bhrāmayitvā śilā pṛṣṭhe cikṣepa utpatya vīryavān samutthāya casāka nyāsa āyudha aṣṭa bhuja anvitā gagana stha aruṣā kaṃsam prāha gambhīrayā girā yaḥ anantaḥ sarva devānām īśvaraḥ puruṣottamaḥ akrūraḥ uvāca iti uktvā sā amahāmāyā himavam tam samāyayau tadā prabhṛti duṣṭa ātmā bhayāt udvigna mānasaḥ dānavān preṣayāmāsa nidhanāya mahātmanaḥ bālena eva hatāḥ sarve līlayā anena dhīmatā ati adbhutāni karmāṇi kṛtavān parameśvaraḥ govarddhana ādi dharaṇam nāga rāja vivāsanam śrutvā deva ṛṣiṇā ākhyātam atīva bhaya pīḍitaḥ itas nītvā mahābāhu rāmakṛṣṇau durāsadau kṛṣṇasya ānayana arthāya prerayāmāsa mām iha vasudevasya aduṣṭa ātma anigraham kṛtavān asau etat sarvam samākhyātam ceṣṭitam su durātmanaḥ tu marhatha sahita rāmakṛṣṇābhyām gopāḥ kam sa śayaḥ parityajya bhayam tasmāt gamiṣyadhvam īśvaraḥ uvāca iti uktvā sa tadā akrūraḥ tūṣṇīm āsīt su buddhimān tasya tat vacanam śrutvā dāruṇam roma harṣaṇam nanda gopa mukhāḥ sarvega upavṛddha abhaya āturāḥ abhāṣire mahā duḥkha sāgara śoka mohitāḥ tān āśvāsya hariḥ tatra dṛṣṭvā kamala locanaḥ na bhīḥ kāryā iti samprāha rākṣasam prativīryavān vināśāya prayāsyāmi kaṃsasya asya durātmanaḥ mathurām saha rāmeṇa bhavadbhiḥ saha saṅgataḥ tatra hatvā durātmānam kaṃsam dānava puṅgavam sarvān ca rākṣasān hatvā apālayiṣyāmi medinīm evam uktāḥ tu hariṇā gopa ānanda purogamāḥ aprameyāni karmāṇi vicārya su mahātmanaḥ akrūra vacanāt ca eva gopāḥ yathā pakva annāni suhṛdyāni svādūni madhurāṇi ca akrūrāya dadau saumyam yaśodā bhojanam bahu sahitaḥ rāma kṛṣṇābhyām nanda ādyaiḥ gopa sattamaiḥ dattam yaśodayā saumyam bhojanam kaluṣa apaham bubhujeyādava śreṣṭhaḥ hi annam roga apaham śubham bhojayitvā yathā nyāyam bhasā sa karpūram sa tāmbūlam dadau tasmai dṛḍha vratā astam yāte dinakare samdhyām anvāsya yādavaḥ sahitaḥ rāmakṛṣṇābhyām bhuktvā akṣīra annam uttamam tābhyām eva tadā akrūraḥ śayanam samupāviśat tasmin stubha vane śreṣṭhe ramye dīpa virājite kenānā puṣpa virājite tasmin aśeta hariḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śeṣe nārāyaṇaḥ yathā tam dṛṣṭvā a sahasā akrūraḥ harṣa aśru pulakām kitaḥ nidrām su śreyaḥ pāda saṃvāhanam viṣṇoḥ cakre bhāgavata uttamaḥ etāvatām esāphalyam jīvitam ca su jīvitam na śakyam manasā a smartum śiva brahma ādi daivataiḥ sanaka ādyaiḥ munīm draiḥ tu vasiṣṭha ādyaiḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ sam dirā alakṣmī ākarābhyām su sukham param diṣṭyā ālabdham mayā a viṣṇoḥ śrī pāda abja yugam śubham saṃstūyamānaḥ bubudhe tasmāt tu śayanāt hariḥ upaspṛśya yathā nyāyam saha rāmeṇa adhīmatā papāta pādayoḥ mātuḥ prayāṇam ca abhyarocayat samutthāpya yaśaḥ dātu duḥkha harṣa sama anvitā aśru pūrṇa mukhī putrau premṇā a sampariṣasvaje āśiṣam pradadau devī tanayābhyām dṛḍha vratā akrūraḥ api yaśodāyai praṇamya prāhasām jaliḥ akrūraḥ uvāca prayāsyāmi mahābhāge prasādam kurume anaghe eṣa kṛṣṇaḥ mahā bāhuḥ kaṃsam hatvā a mahā balam sarvasya jagataḥ rājā bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ īśvaraḥ uvāca iti ukta yātayā akrūraḥ visṛṣṭaḥ yadu sattamaḥ sahitaḥ ūrāma kṛṣṇābhyām āruroha ratha uttamam prayayau mathurām śīghram stūyamānaḥ apsaraḥ gaṇaiḥ punar gṛhītvā dadhi ājyam phalāni vividhāni ca tam prayāntam harim dṛṣṭvā gokulāt gopa yoṣitaḥ nivartayāmāsa hariḥ tāḥ sarva āgopa yoṣitaḥ śoka santapta hṛdayā vilepuḥ kamala īkṣaṇam hā kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa iti govinda iti arudat muhur aśru pūrṇa īkṣaṇa ādīn ārudam tatra saṃsthitāḥ atha akrūraḥ ratham divyam codayāmāsa govrajāt mathurām pratiyādavaḥ uttīrya yamunām śīghram kūle sthāpya ratha uttamam tathā ca āvaśyakam kartum nimajjya atha jale śubhe dadarśa tau jale tatra rāma kṛṣṇau śubha anvitau śarad koṭīm dusam kāśam nīlām bara dharam prabhum rakta āra danayanam puḍam rīkāvatam sakam rāmam dadarśa kṛṣṇam ca nīla nīrada sannibham divya pītām bara dharam puṇḍarīka āyata īkṣaṇam haricandana liptām gaṃ nānā ratna vibhūṣitam dṛṣṭvā tatra yaduśreṣṭhaḥ vismayam param aṅgataḥ harim dṛṣṭvā tasmin jaledevam vismayam paramam yayau tuṣṭāva atha yaduśreṣṭhaḥ harim sarvagam īśvaram akrūraḥ uvāca vikārāya avikārāya pratyakṣa puruṣāya ca govindāya namaḥ tubhyam trayī nāthāya śārṅgiṇe nārāyaṇāya viśvāya vāsudevāya te namaḥ viṣṇave puru rūpāya śāśvatāya namaḥ namaḥ udyat koṭi ravi prakhya bhūṣaṇa āṣcita varcase haraye sarva lokānām īśvarāya namaḥ namaḥ saṅkarṣaṇāya kṛṣṇāya pradyumnāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ te nāga paryaṅka śāyine saumya rūpiṇe śrīdharāya namaḥ tubhyam śrīśāya ananta rūpiṇe īśvaraḥ uvāca sarva tīrtha phalam prāpya viṣṇu sāyujyam āpnuyāt kṛtakṛtyaḥ tadā akrūraḥ nirgatya yamunā jalāt sametya rāma kṛṣṇau tu praṇanāma śubha anvitaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā prāha govindaḥ vinītam vismitam hariḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca kim āścaryam jale tasmin dṛṣṭavān asi yādava īśvaraḥ uvāca akrūraḥ tu yadu śreṣṭham prāha kṛṣṇam su tejasam akrūraḥ uvāca kim āścaryam hṛṣīkeśa jagat sarvam tvam eva hi tvattaḥ na anyat vāsudeva jīmūtāt amṛtam yathā tvam yajṣaḥ tvam vaṣaṭkāraḥ tvam om kāro haviḥ tathā tvam eva sarva devānām īśvaraḥ śāśvataḥ avyayaḥ na akāraṇāt kāraṇāt vā akaraṇa akāraṇāt paraḥ dharma trāṇāya deveśa śarīra grahaṇam tava īśvaraḥ uvāca āruroha ratham divyam tābhyām sahayadu uttamaḥ tatas tūrṇam samāsādya mathurām devanirmitām rāmakṛṣṇau pura dvāri niveśya antar puram yayau rājṣā sampūjitaḥ tena tatas sva gṛham āviśat atha sāyāhna samaye rāma kṛṣṇau mahā balau parasparam karau gṛhya mathurāyām samāgatau dadṛśatuḥ mahātmānau ajakam vastraram jakam divya vastra vṛtam rāja geham āyāntam acyutaḥ yayāceta ani vastrāṇi saha rāmeṇa vīryavān nadattavān jakaḥ bahūni kaṭu vākyāni prāha tatra adhvani sthitaḥ tāḍayāmāsatam kṛṣṇaḥ talena eva mahā balaḥ tāni vastrāṇi ramyāṇi gopālaiḥ saha bāndhavaiḥ dhārayāmāsatuḥ vīrau yathā ham rāma keśavau mālākāra gṛham prāpyate na dṛṣṭau namaskṛtau samāgatau punar vīthyām āyām tīm ca śubha ānanām kubjān triyam mahābhāgau dhṛta candana bhājanām vakrām ga pṛṣṭhām vanitām dṛṣṭvā a gandham ayācatam nirīkṣyamāṇau yoṣidbhiḥ sukumārau śubha ānanau viveśatuḥ mahātmānau yajṣa śālām saha anugaiḥ dṛṣṭvā a samarcitam divyam kārmukam tatra keśavaḥ līlayā eva gṛhītvā atha babham bibhajyamānam tat cāpam śrutvā kaṃsaḥ su vihvalaḥ āhūya mallān sūtān tu pramukhān daitya puṅgavān vimṛśya mantribhiḥ prāha cāṇūram daitya puṅgavaḥ kaṃsaḥ uvāca rāma kṛṣṇau samāyātau sarva daitya vināśakau īśvaraḥ uvāca iti ādiśya tatas rājā sa anujaḥ sacivaiḥ saha āruroha bhayāt tūrṇam divya prāsāda mūrddhani dvāreṣu sarva mārgeṣu gajān mattān ayojayat mallān mada utkaṭān nāgān sthāpayāmāsa sarvatas jṣātvā kṛṣṇaḥ api tat sarvam saha rāmeṇa dhīmatā uvāsa rajanīm tatra yajṣa gehe saha anugaiḥ tatas rajanyām vyuṣṭāyām śayanāt utthitau vīrau rāmakṛṣṇau kṛta udakau vinirgatau gṛhāt tasmāt atim sahau iva mahā guhāt rāja dvāri sthitam nāgam himādri śikhara upamam nāmnā a kuvalayāpīḍam kaṃsasya jaya varddhanam devakum jarat arpa ghnam mahā kāyam mada utkaṭam dṛṣṭvā atam ca mahā nāgam paṣca asya eva keśavaḥ bhrāmayitvā atha cikṣepa dharaṇyām dharaṇīdharaḥ papāta sahasā bhūmau mamāra ca mahāgajaḥ hatvā dantau samutpāṭya gṛhītvā ārāma keśavau mallaiḥ āyodhanam kartum raṃ gam viviśatuḥ tadā tatra sthā dānavaiḥ a dṛṣṭvā govindasya parākramam bhītāḥ pravidrutāḥ puram āyayuḥ kapāṭau su dṛḍhau badhvā tatra tasthuḥ sahasraśas dṛḍha bandha kapāṭān tu dṛṣṭvā akṛṣṇaḥ tu līlayā tāḍayitvā a padena eva pātayāmāsa vīryavān tatra sthāni hatāḥ ga śirodharāḥ bhrāmayam gaupī nauraṇa utsukau dadṛśāte mahātmānau mallau cāṇūramuṣṭikau kaṃsaḥ api dṛṣṭvā govindam rāmam ca su mahā balam bhayam āviśya cāṇūram prāha malla varam tadā kaṃsaḥ uvāca īśvaraḥ uvāca tasmin navasare kṛṣṇaḥ mallābhyām dṛśyate mahān vartā agniḥ iva acyutaḥ strīṇām ca sākṣāt madanaḥ pitroḥ śiśuḥ iva aparaḥ tridaśānām hariḥ iva gopālānām sakhā yathā anyam prāsādam āruhya dadṛśuḥ kadanam mahat mukham sa aśru pūrṇa īkṣaṇā aśubhā tābhiḥ āśvāsitā devī bhavana antaram āviśat tuṣṭuvuḥ jaya śabdena puṇḍarīkākṣam acyutam jahi kaṃsam iti prāhuḥ uccais devā marut gaṇāḥ cāṇūreṇa tu govindaḥ muṣṭikena halāyudhaḥ yuyudhāte mahātmānau nīla śveta adri sannibhau malla yuddha vidhānena muṣṭibhiḥ pāda tāḍanaiḥ babhūva kadanam ghoram devānām ca bhaya āvaham cāṇūreṇa ciram kālam krīḍitvā atha janārdanaḥ niṣpiṣya gām mallasya pātayāmāsa līlayā sapapāta mahī pṛṣṭhe sam vaman rudhiram bahu muṣṭikena tathā rāmaḥ cira kālam ayudhyata muṣṭibhiḥ tāḍayāmāsa tasya vakṣasi vīryavān tatas tu dudruvuḥ sarve mallāḥ dṛṣṭvā a parākramam kaṃsaḥ mahat bhayam tīvram āviśat vedanā āturaḥ e tasmin nantar evīrau rāmakṛṣṇau durāsadau ārohatuḥ mahātmānau caitya prāsādam ūrjitam tāḍayitvā talena eva kaṃsam mūrdhni janārdanaḥ apātayat dharā pṛṣṭhe prāsāda śikharāt hariḥ sa tu nirbhinna sarvām go dharaṇyām tyakta jīvitaḥ kṛṣṇena nihata ikam sa irāmaḥ api su mahā balaḥ tasya anujam sunāmānam muṣṭinā eva jaghāna ha dharaṇyām pātayāmāsa anujam ca dharaṇīdharaḥ hatvā a kaṃsam durātmānam sa anujam rāma keśavau cakratuḥ putra lālasau tayoḥ upari devakyāḥ stanau kṣīram vavarṣatuḥ tatas āśvāsya pitarau rāmakṛṣṇau bahis gatau vineduḥ puṣpa varṣāṇi vavṛṣuḥ tridaśeśvarāḥ nanda gopam namaskṛtya gopa vṛddhān cakeśavaḥ rāmeṇa saha dharma ātmām udāsam pariṣasvaje sarvān tān gopa vṛddhān ca vastraiḥ ābharaṇa ādibhiḥ bahubhiḥ dhana dhānyaiḥ capūjayāmāsa keśavaḥ visṛṣṭāḥ tena kṛṣṇena nanda gopa purogamāḥ mātāmaham samāsādya rāmakṛṣṇau durāsadau cakre tasya abhiṣekam tu tad rājye madhusūdanaḥ akrūra pramukhān rājye saṃsthāpya yadu puṅgavān rājānam ugrasenam tu kṛtvā adharmeṇa medinīm pālayāmāsa dharma ātmā vasudeva sutaḥ hariḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite kaṃsa vadhaḥ nāma paṣcatvāriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣaṭcatvāriṃśadhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī maheśvaraḥ uvāca putrayoḥ veda vidhinā tasmin vairāma kṛṣṇayoḥ ācāryeṇa hi gargeṇa sam skṛtau rāma keśavau paṇḍitaiḥ vaiṣṇavaiḥ divyaiḥ snāpanaiḥ vimalaiḥ śubhaiḥ kṛtasam skārakarmāṇau rāmakṛṣṇau mahā balau sām dīpaneḥ gṛham gatvā namaskṛtya mahātmanaḥ adhītya veda śāstrāṇi tasmāt tau dvija puṅgavāt mṛtam putram samānīya dadatuḥ tasya dakṣiṇām āśiṣaḥ vacanam labadhvā guroḥ tasmāt mahātmanaḥ atha kṛṣṇena nihatam śrutvā kaṃsam durāsadam śvaśuraḥ tasya nṛpateḥ jarāsandhaḥ mahā balaḥ akṣauhiṇī sahasraiḥ tu senā anīkaiḥ mahā balaiḥ kṛṣṇam hantum samāgatya rurodha mathurām purīm rāma kṛṣṇau mahāvīryau vinirgatya pura uttamāt gaja vāji samākīrṇam tat vala ogham apaśyatām sasmāra vāsudevaḥ tu pūrvam rūpam sanātanam tasya smaraṇa mātreṇa dārukaḥ viṣṇusārathiḥ sugrīvapuṣpakam nāma samānīya mahā ratham divya āyudhaiḥ upetam tam śaṅkha cakra gadā ādibhiḥ avanīm prāpya govindam praṇamya hari sārathiḥ dṛṣṭvā harṣeṇa kṛṣṇaḥ api pariṇīya mahā ratham āruroha agrajena eva stūyamānaḥ marut gaṇaiḥ caturbhujam vapuḥ bhūtvā śaṅkha cakra gadā asi bhṛt kirīṭī kuṇḍalī sragvī saṅgrāma abhimukham yayau baladevaḥ api muśalam lāṅgalam gṛhya vīryavān dārukaḥ caratham śīghram nodayāmāsatat raṇe tṛṇa gulma latā krām te kānane agnim iva anilaḥ tad ratham chādayāmāsuḥ jarāsandhasya sainikāḥ cakreṇa eva hariḥ tūrṇam tāni cit cheda līlayā bahūni tṛṇa kāṣṭhāni mahā vahniḥ iva arciṣā tatas śārṅgam samādāya sāyakaiḥ akṣayaiḥ śitaiḥ ciccheda tāni sainya anina prājṣāyata kim cana gadayā ācūrṇitāḥ kecid kecid anyaiḥ mahā raṇe kecid ca eva asinā āchinnāḥ tathā nyeśara tāḍitāḥ lāṅgala agra hata grīvā muśala āhata mastakāḥ kṣaṇena tat valam sarvam nihatya madhusūdanaḥ śaṅkham śaṅkha rāva vinirbhinna hṛdayāḥ te mahā balāḥ yodhāḥ sa aśvāḥ sa nāgāḥ ca patitāḥ tyakta jīvitāḥ akṣauhiṇī saha tusa aśvam sa rathakum jaram kṛṣṇena ekena nihatam niḥśeṣam tat abhūt valam nihatam vāsudevena prahara arddhena śārṅgiṇā vavṛṣuḥ puṣpa varṣāṇi sādhu sādhu iti ca abruvan sarvam api avanī bhāram vimucya dharaṇīdharaḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ tridaśaiḥ babhau saṅgrāma mūrddhani nihatam sva balam dṛṣṭvā jarāsandhaḥ ati vīryavān rāmaḥ ulāṅgalam ādāya ratham tasya sa sārathim vinipātya raṇeśa ūraḥ gṛhītvā atam mahā balam udyamya a muśalam tūrṇam tam hantum upacakrame prāṇa saṃśayam āpannam jarāsandham nṛpa uttamam kṛtam rāmeṇa balinā asim henā iva mahā gajam dṛṣṭvā akṛṣṇa ugrajam prāha naham mocayāmāsa dharma ātmā ajarāsandham mahāmatiḥ vimucya kṛṣṇa vākyena śatrum saṅkarṣaṇaḥ avyayaḥ sa kālayavanam prāpya mahā vīryam bala anvitam dānavānām vadham ca eva kaṃsasya nidhanam tathā akṣauhiṇīnām ca vadham tathā svasya parājayam sarvam nivedayāmāsa kṛṣṇasya caritam mahat magadha adhipateḥ tasya sahāya artham mahā balaḥ tena eva sahitaḥ tūrṇam jagāma mathurām purīm balaiḥ ācchādya pṛthivīm nānā janapada anvitām sam niveśya mahā sainyam rurodha mathurām purīm kṛṣṇaḥ api cintayitvā atha paurāṇām kuśalam tadā yayāce sāgaram bhūmim nivāsa artham janasya ca trim śat yojana vistīrṇām asṛjat payasām madhye tatra dvāravatīm purīm bahu prāsāda sam yuktām hema prākāra toraṇām nānā maṇi mayaiḥ divyaiḥ gṛha paṅktibhiḥ āvṛtām asṛjat puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ yathā indrasya amarāvatīm suṣuptān mathurāyām tu paurān tatra janārdanaḥ uddhṛtya sahasā rātrau dvārāvatyām niveśayat hema harmya tale viṣṭā avismayam paramam yayuḥ paripūrṇaiḥ iva ābhogaiḥ gṛha mukhyaiḥ samāvṛtāḥ tasmin prahṛṣṭāḥ sam tasthuḥ dim videva gaṇāḥ iva yavanena tadā yoddhum rāma kṛṣṇau mahā balau rāmaḥ ulāṅgalam ādāya muśalam ca mahā rathaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ tu śārṅgam āsajya vāṇaiḥ agni śikhā upamaiḥ nirdadāha balam sarvam mlecchānām devakī sutaḥ nihatam sva balam dṛṣṭvā asakālayavanaḥ balī kṛṣṇaḥ api kadanam tena kṛtvā aciram anāmayaḥ vimukhaḥ prādravat tasmāt saṅgrāmāt kamala īkṣaṇaḥ sonu yātaḥ ativegena tiṣṭha tiṣṭha iti ca bruvan vegāt kṛṣṇaḥ giri guhām praviveśa mahāmatiḥ adṛśyaḥ tasya nṛpateḥ saṃsthitaḥ bhagavān hariḥ yavanaḥ api mahā vīraḥ gadām udyamya pāṇinā kṛṣṇam hantu samārabdhaḥ guhām tām praviveśa ha dṛṣṭvā āśayānam rājānam matvā a kṛṣṇam janārdanam pādena tāḍayāmāsa mucukum dam mahā munim krodhāt sam rakta nayana ūhum kāram kṛtavān asau tasya hum kāra śabdena tathā krodha nirīkṣaṇāt tatas tu kṛṣṇaḥ udadṛśe rājarṣeḥ puratas prabhuḥ nīlotpala dala śyāmaḥ puṇḍarīka nibha īkṣaṇaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ pīta vāsāḥ janārdanaḥ dṛṣṭvā tam sahasā utthāya rājarṣiḥ amita ojasam pulakām gaḥ sānam da aśru jala ākulaḥ namaḥ te vāsudevāya jagannāthāya śārṅgiṇe dāmodarāya devāya tejasām nidhaye namaḥ sam hava puṣenamaḥ rāghavāya namaḥ tubhyam puṇḍarīkekṣaṇāya ca acyutāya avikārāya tathā naṃ tāya te namaḥ govindāya namaḥ tubhyam viṣṇave jiṣṇave namaḥ nārāyaṇāya śrīśāya kṛṣṇāya paramātmane mukum dāya namaḥ tubhyam catur vyūhāya te namaḥ patayenamaḥ evam praṇanāma punar punar sam tu dam mahā munim śrī bhagavān uvāca varam vṛṇīṣva a rāja ṛṣe yat te manasi vartate saḥ api muktim yayāca atha punarāvṛtti varjitām tasmai dadau tadā kṛṣṇaḥ divyam lokam sanātanam rājā atu mānuṣam rūpam vihāya atha mahāmatiḥ samānam rūpam āsthāya devasya paramātmanaḥ vainateyam samāruhya śāśvatam padam āviśat iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umāheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite mucukum damokṣaḥ nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptacatvāriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ muktim muktim taḥ yadu nandanaḥ hatam ca yavanam śrutvā jarāsandhaḥ su durmatiḥ yayudhe rāma kṛṣṇābhyām sva balena samāvṛtaḥ kṛṣṇena nihatam sainyam sarvam tasya durātmanaḥ sapapāta mahī pṛṣṭhe mūrcchitaḥ magadha adhipaḥ tu vihvala aṅga ubhaya āturaḥ na śaśāka raṇe yoddhum rāmeṇa magadha īśvaraḥ vimukhaḥ prādravat tūrṇam hata śeṣa bala anugaḥ ajeyau iti taumatvārāmakṛṣṇau mahā balau tayoḥ virodham tyaktvā atha nagarīm svām viveśa ha mathurām tyajya nagarīm praviṣṭa audvārikām purīm indreṇa preṣitaḥ uvāyuḥ sabhām tatra divaukasām kṛṣṇāya pradadau prītyā anirmitām viśvakarmaṇā vajra vaiḍūrya racitām bahu āsana vicitritām tām prāpya ramyām tu sabhām ugrasena ādayaḥ nṛpāḥ modam tena aigamaiḥ sārdham divideva gaṇāḥ iva ikṣvākuvam kanyām duhitaram svasya sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutām rāmāya pradadau prītyā arevatī nāma nāmataḥ ramayāmāsa catayā śacyā iva sura īśvaraḥ vidarbha rājaḥ dharma ātmā bhīṣmakaḥ nāma dhārmikaḥ vabhūvuḥ tasya putrāḥ turukma prabhṛtayaḥ śubhāḥ teṣām avarajā kanyā rukmiṇī vara varṇinī kamala aṃśena sambhūtā sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutā rāghava tve abhavat sītā rukmiṇī kṛṣṇa janmani anyeṣu eva avatāreṣu viṣṇoḥ eṣā sahāyinī hiraṇyaka hiraṇyākṣau sambhūtau dvāpare punar rukmiṇīm śiśupālāya dātum aicchat tad ātmajaḥ tam nā icchatī patim sā tu śiśupālam śubha ānanā bālyāt prabhṛti vai viṣṇum anuraktā dṛḍha vratā uddiśya kṛṣṇam bhartāram surāṇām arcanam sadā cakāra rukmiṇī kanyāḥ dānāni vividhāni ca vrata caryā parā bhūtvā dhyāyantī puruṣottamam ātma īśam svasya bhartāram uvāsa pitṛ mandire kartum tām śiśupālāya vivāham pārthiva uttamaḥ cakāra yatnam putreṇa rukmiṇā savidhī matā purohita sutam vipram preṣayāmāsa rukmiṇī uddiśya kṛṣṇam bhartāram sa tūrṇam dvārakām yayau sametya kṛṣṇam rāmam ca tābhyām vidhivat arcitaḥ ekām te sarvam ācaṣṭa rukmiṇī bhāṣitam tayoḥ tat śrutvā rāma kṛṣṇau tu tena vipreṇa dhīmatā sarva śastra astra sampūrṇam ratham ākāśa gam prabhuḥ āruhya sūta mukhyena dārukeṇa mahātmanā vidarbha nagarīm tūrṇam jagmatuḥ puruṣa uttamau rājānaḥ sarva rāṣṭrebhyaḥ vivāham draṣṭum āgatāḥ jarāsandha mukhāḥ sarve śiśupālasya dhīmataḥ tasmin udvāha samaye rukmiṇī rukma bhūṣaṇā durgām niḥsṛtā arcayitum sakhībhiḥ nagarāt bahis ratha sthām tām ca jagrāha balāvān madhusūdanaḥ saha sāratham āropya yayau tūrṇam svam ālayam tatas krodha samāviṣṭāḥ jarāsandha mukhāḥ nṛpāḥ rukmiṇā rāja putreṇa yuddhāya samupasthitāḥ anuyātāḥ harim kruddhāḥ catur aṅga bala anvitāḥ lāṅgalam muśalam gṛhya nijaghāna kṣaṇāt arīn rathān aśvān mahā nāgān tathā pāda carān api vai nijaghāna balāt raṇe tasya lāṅgala pātena cūrṇitāḥ ratha paṅktayaḥ nāgāḥ ca patitāḥ bhumau vajreṇa iva mahīdharāḥ kṣaṇena eva hatam sainyam balarāmeṇa vai tadā sa aśvam sa nāgam sa ratham sa padātim mahā raṇe samantāt samare tatra susruvuḥ śoṇita āpagāḥ prabhagnāḥ pārthivāḥ sarve dudruvuḥ bhaya pīḍitāḥ kṛṣṇena kadanam cakre rukmī krodha vaśāt balī dhanuḥ udyamya bāṇa oghaiḥ tāḍayāmāsa śārṅgiṇam tatas prahasya govindaḥ śārṅgam ādāya līlayā jaghāna ekena bāṇena ratha aśvān tasya sārathim ratham dhvajam patākām ca ciccheda dharaṇī dharaḥ virathaḥ khaḍgam ādāya dharaṇyām sa aupasthitaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ tu khaḍgam ciccheda bāṇena ekena vīryavān tatas sa muṣṭim udyamya kṛṣṇam vakṣasi atāḍayat tam nibadhya nibiḍam hariḥ tīkṣṇam kṣurapramādāya prahasan madhusūdanaḥ śirasaḥ muṇḍanam kṛtvā mumoca ca janārdanaḥ sa tu śoka samāviṣṭaḥ niḥśvasan uragaḥ yathā āviveśa puram svīyam tatra iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite vidarbhasenāvidhvaṃsanam nāma saptacatvāriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aṣṭacatvāriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha kṛṣṇaḥ tu rāmeṇa rukmiṇyā dārukeṇa ca tatas praviśya nagarīm dvārakām devakī sutaḥ upayeme nṛpa sutām rukmiṇīm rukma bhūṣitām vineduḥ puṣpa varṣāṇi vavṛṣuḥ sura sattamāḥ balabhadraḥ mahā tejāḥ ye ca anye yadu puṅgavāḥ cakruḥ kṛṣṇasya rukmiṇyāḥ vivāham su sukham yathā svala ghṛtābhiḥ yoṣābhiḥ yaśodā ca samāgatā revatī rohiṇī devī yāḥ ca anyāḥ pura yoṣitaḥ sarvāṇi udvāha karmāṇi cakruḥ harṣa samanvitāḥ surāṇām arcanam prītyā akartavyam tatra devakī vṛddhābhiḥ nṛpa yoṣidbhiḥ cakāra vidhinā tadā brāhmaṇān bhojayāmāsa vastraiḥ ābharaṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ ugrasena ādayaḥ tatra rājānaḥ ca su pūjitāḥ nanda gopāda yogopāya śoda ādyāḥ ca yoṣitaḥ bahubhiḥ svarṇa ratna ādyaiḥ vāsobhiḥ sa vibhūṣaṇaiḥ pūjitāḥ samprahṛṣṭāḥ te tad vivāha mahā utsave patīsam āśliṣya praṇatau jātavedasam tasyām vivāha vedyām tu śuśubhāte vadhū varau brāhmaṇebhyaḥ atha vṛddhebhyaḥ rājanyaḥ saha bhāryyayā vyasarjayan nṛpān sarvān ye ca tatra samāgatāḥ prasthitā a hariṇā tatra pūjitā a nṛpa puṅgavāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ su mahātmānaḥ niryayuḥ svakam ālayam tayā vai ramayāmāsa nārāyaṇaḥ iva śriyā ahani ahani hṛṣṭa ātmā asukhena eva janārdanaḥ atha uvāsa suśobhāyām dvāravatyām sanātanaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite rukmiṇī vivāha kathanam nāma aṣṭācatvāriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekonapaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī rudraḥ uvāca satrāji tasya tanayā anāmnā asatyā yaśasvinī pṛthivyam śenasambhūtā bhāryām tṛtīyā tasya bhāryā sālīlām śāsam upasthitā vim dānuvim dasya sutām mitra vindām śuci smitām svayam vara sthitām kanyām upayeme janārdanaḥ pāśena ekena baddha atān bṛṣabhān sapta durmadān tām vīrya śulkām jagrāha padma patra āyata īkṣaṇaḥ satrājitaḥ mahā ratnam syamam ta ākhyam mahīpatiḥ yayācetam maṇi varam kadācid madhusūdanaḥ uvāca vāsudevam tam prasenaḥ prasabham tadā bhārān aṣṭa suvarṇa anityam tasmāt kasyana dātavyam syamam ta ākhyam idam mayā mahādevaḥ uvāca kṛṣṇaḥ tu tad abhiprāyam jṣātvā atūṣṇīm uvāsaha kadācid mṛgayām karttum kṛṣṇaḥ sarvaiḥ yadu uttamaiḥ praviveśa mahā araṇyam prasena ādyaiḥ mahā balaiḥ pratyekam vaimṛgān hantum anuyātāḥ sahasraśas ekaḥ eva mahā araṇye prasenaḥ dūram āgataḥ tam sim ho dṛṣṭam āsādya hatvā ratnam jahārasaḥ tam sim ham jāmbabān hatvā maṇim gṛhya mahā balaḥ praviveśa bilam tūrṇam divya strībhiḥ niṣevitam tasmin nastam gate sūrye vāsudevam saha anugaḥ caturthyām uditam candram dṛṣṭvā svam puram āviśat tatas sarvepura janāḥ kṛṣṇam procuḥ parasparam syamam takam maṇi varam agrahīt aviśam kayā tat ākarṇya hariḥ tasmin dvārakā jana bhāṣitam darśayāmāsata ān sarvān vane labdha ātma śuddhiḥ tatra iva saṃsthāpya mahatīm camūm ekaḥ śārṅga gadā pāṇiḥ jagāma gahanam vanam dṛṣṭvā mahābilam kṛṣṇaḥ praviveśa viśam kitaḥ sutam jāmbavataḥ dhātrī dolām āropya līlayā dhṛtvā ādolayan gāyatīm udā siṃ haḥ prasenam avadhīt siṃ ho jāmbavatā ahataḥ sukumārakam ārodīḥ tava hi eṣasi amam takaḥ tat śrutvā vāsudevaḥ atha śaṅkham dadhmau pratāpavān tena nādena mahatā nirjagāma atra jāmbavān ca tathā kṣayam saḥ ayam rāmaḥ avatīrṇaḥ atra dharma trāṇāya vaipunaḥ evam prāṣjaliḥ prāha govindam kaḥ bhavān iti vismayāt nivartya kadanam śauriḥ proce gambhīrayā a girā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mamaratnam syamam ta ākhyam hṛtavān tvam su nirbhayaḥ tat dīyatām ca śīghram yathā vadham eṣyasi mahādevaḥ uvāca tat śrutvā jāmbavān hṛṣṭaḥ praṇanāma atha daṇḍa vat pariṇīya namaskṛtya vinayāt prāha keśavam jāmbavān uvāca dattavān asi govinda kadanam pūrvakām kṣitam mayā idam kadanam mohāt yat kṛtam svāminā a tvayā tat kṣamyatām jagannātha karuṇā ākara śāśvata mahādevaḥ uvāca iti uktvā praṇataḥ bhūtvā namaskṛtya punar punar nānā ratna maye pīṭhe niveśya vinayāt prabhum śārada abja nibhau pādau prakṣālya śubha vāriṇā vastraiḥ ābharaṇaiḥ divyaiḥ pūjayitvā a vidhānataḥ putrīm jāmbavatīm nāma kanyām lāvaṇya saṃyutām anyaiḥ camaṇi mukhyaiḥ casyamam ta ākhyam dadau maṇim tatra iva udvāhyatām kanyām prahṛṣṭa para vīra hā dadau tasmai parām muktim prītyā jāmbavate hariḥ gṛhītvā atanayām tasya kanyām jāmbavatīm mudā satrājitā idadau ratnam syamam ta ākhyam yadu uttamaḥ mithyā abhidūṣaṇam prāhuḥ tasmāt tat parivarjayet prāpyate darśanam tatra caturthyām śītagoḥ naraḥ syamam tasya kathām śrutvā mithyāvādāt pramucyate su lakṣmaṇām nāgnajitīm su śīlām ca yaśasvinīm madra rāja sutāḥ tisraḥ kanyakāḥ tāḥ śubha ānanāḥ svayam vara sthāḥ tāḥ kṛṣṇam varayāmāsuḥ ujjvalāḥ aṣṭau mahiṣyaḥ tāḥ sarvāḥ rukmiṇī ādyāḥ mahātmanaḥ rukmiṇī satyabhāmā ca kālindī ca śuci smitā mitravindā jāmbavatī nāgnajityaḥ sulakṣmaṇā suśīlā nāma tanvaṅgī mahiṣī ca aṣṭamī smṛtā bhūmi putraḥ mahā vīryaḥ narakaḥ nāma rākṣasaḥ jitvā deva patim śakram sarvān ca eva surān raṇe adityāḥ deva mātuḥ ca kuṇḍale ca suvarcasī balāt jagrāha devānām ratnāni vividhāni ca māṇikya ādi dhaneśasya śaṅkha padma nidhim tathā striyaḥ ca apsarasaḥ ca eva hṛtavān kṣiti nadam naḥ vajra ādi hetīḥ teṣām ca balāt dhṛtvā divaukasām tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve puraskṛtya śacī patim bhaya ārtāḥ śaraṇam jagmuḥ kṛṣṇam akliṣṭa kāriṇam kṛṣṇaḥ api tat upaśrutya sarvam naraka ceṣṭitam tam āruhya dvijaśreṣṭham satyayā asaha keśavaḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ munibhiḥ prayayau rākṣasa ālayam pradīpyamānam ākāśe yathā sūḥ yasya maṇḍalam dadarśa tat puram kṛṣṇo durbhedyam tridaśaiḥ api tad āvaraṇāni bhagavān vīkṣya cakreṇa vīryavān ciccheda tejasā ādīptyā tamām sica divākaraḥ tatas te rākṣasāḥ sarve śataśas atha sahasraśas udyamya śūlāni tadā yuddhāya abhimukham yayuḥ tatas tu tomaraiḥ divyaiḥ bhindipālaiḥ su paṭṭiśaiḥ keśavam tāḍayāmāsuḥ palālaiḥ iva pāvakam tatas tu śārṅgam ādāya bhagavān garuḍadhvajaḥ divya śastrāṇi cit cheda bāṇaiḥ agni śikhā upamaiḥ teṣām śirodharā nāgān aśvān ca eva tarasvinaḥ chinnāḥ tathā gadayā a nihatāḥ kecid rākṣasāḥ tad raṇa ajire evam sarve pātita ādharaṇī tale śakra utsṛṣṭena vajreṇa nirbhinnāḥ iva bhūdharāḥ nihatya dānavān sarvān puṇḍarīka āyata īkṣaṇaḥ pāṣcajanyam mahā śaṅkham pradadhmau puruṣottamaḥ tatas arddhacandra vāṇena vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ sa tena bhinna hṛdayaḥ papāta urvyām mahā asuraḥ upagamya tatas kṛṣṇaḥ samīpam tasya rakṣasaḥ bhūmyā samprārthitaḥ prāha varam vṛṇu itirākṣasam sacā āha rākṣasaḥ kṛṣṇam garuḍa upari saṃsthitam vareṇa asti narakaḥ aham tathā mṛta ahanitum ekṛṣṇa sarva bhūta īśvara īśvara na teṣām niraya prāptiḥ bhavatu evam bhaya apaha mahādevaḥ uvāca tatas paśyan hareḥ sākṣāt śaradam buja sannibhau caraṇau vajra vaiḍūryya nūpurābhyām virājitau tyaktvā aprāṇān mahīputraḥ sārūpyam agamat hareḥ tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve harṣa nirbhara mānasāḥ vavṛṣuḥ puṣpa varṣāṇi tuṣṭuvuḥ ca mahā ṛṣayaḥ praviśya nagaram tasya kṛṣṇaḥ kamala locanaḥ balāt tena gṛhītāni ratnāni tridivaukasām airāvatam gaja śreṣṭham pradīptam maṇi parvatam sarvam etat yaduśreṣṭhaḥ udadau śakrāya vajriṇe pārthivān sarva rāṣṭrebhyaḥ jitvā asau nara kovalī kanyā ṣoḍaśa sāhasram hṛtavān narakaḥ tadā sanniruddha astutāḥ sarva a naraka antar purā itadā dṛṣṭvā akṛṣṇam mahā vīryam kam darpa śata sam nibham bhartāram vavrire sarvām patim viśvasya sarvagam tāsām kara graham cakre vidhinā puruṣottamaḥ narakasya sutāḥ sarve puraskṛtya mahīm tadā govindam śaraṇam jagmuḥ tān arakṣat ghṛṇā nidhiḥ tad rājye sthāpya tān sarvān pṛthivyāḥ vākya gauravāt vimānam āropyatāḥ ca sarva avara striyaḥ deva dūtaiḥ mahābhāgaiḥ dvāravatyām nyaveśayat svar lokam prayayau tūrṇam draṣṭum tām devamātaram praviśya nagarīm tatra devarājṣaḥ janārdanaḥ avaruhya dvijaśreṣṭhāt patnyāsaha mahā balaḥ tatra vam dyām tām tridivaukasām niveśya āsana mukhye tu pūjayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ śatakratu purogamāḥ tatra sampūjayāmāsuḥ yathā rham parameśvaram śacī gṛham samāgamya satyabhāmā yaśasvinī tayā samarcitā devyā samāsīnā sukha āsane tasmin tasya kim śacyai devyai daduḥprītyā sahasrākṣeṇa coditāḥ pragṛhya tāni puṣpāṇi śacī devī sumadhyamā avamānya śacī tatra satyabhāmām yaśasvinīm anarhā amānuṣī ceyam deva arham kusumam śubham sametya kṛṣṇam bharttāram uvāca kamala īkṣaṇā eṣā aśacī yaduśreṣṭha pārijāta ena garvitā mahādevaḥ uvāca satyayā ābhāṣitam śrutvā vāsudevaḥ mahā balaḥ utpāṭya pārijātam tu niveśya garuḍa upari āruhyasatyayā atūrṇam vainateyam mahā balam prayayau dvārakām ramyām nagarīm devakī sutaḥ tatas kopa samāviṣṭaḥ devarājaḥ śatakratuḥ rudraiḥ vasubhiḥ ādityaiḥ sādhyaiḥ ca marutām gaṇaiḥ vavṛṣuḥ śastra varṣāṇi meghāḥ iva mahā acalam kṛṣṇaḥ ciccheda cakreṇa tāni astrāṇi divaukasām pātayāmāsatān devān palālāni iva mārutaḥ tatas kruddhaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ devānām īśvaraḥ prabhuḥ mumoca sahasā dīptam vajram kṛṣṇa jighām sayā jagrāha kṛṣṇaḥ tam vajram hastena ekena līlayā tatas bhītaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ nāga indrāt avaruhyasaḥ prāṣjaliḥ puratas sthitvā namaskṛtvā janārdanam deva yogyam idam kṛṣṇa pārijātam tvayā purā datta umam asurāṇām ca katham sthāsyati mānuṣe mahādevaḥ uvāca śacyā avamānitā satyā tava gehe sura īśvara adattvā pārijāta ani satyā yaisā pulomajā asyāḥ nimittam deva indra pārijātaḥ hṛtaḥ mayā asyai pratiśrutam dātum mayā sura gaṇa īśvara tava gehe pārijātam sthāpayāmi iti vāsava tasmāt adya na dātavyaḥ pārijātaḥ sureśvara devatānām hita arthāya prāpayiṣyāmi bhū tale tāvat tiṣṭhatu deva indra pārijātaḥ mama ālaye mayi svargam gate śakra gṛhāṇa tvam yathā icchayā mahādevaḥ uvāca kṛṣṇaḥ api satyayā devyā garuḍa upari saṃsthitaḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ munibhiḥ dvāravatyām viveśa ha satyayā nikaṭe sthāpya pārijātam suradrumam ramayāmāsa bhāryābhiḥ sarvābhiḥ sarva go hariḥ niśā su tāsām sarvāsām gṛheṣu madhu sūdanaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite śrīvāsudevavivāhakathanam nāma ekonapaṣcāśat adhika paṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī rudraḥ uvāca rukmiṇyām śena jajṣe asau madana śam bhūtaḥ mahā balaḥ śam baram jaighnavān saḥ apibāṇa putrīm uṣām nāma kanyām upayeme puṇḍarīka nibha īkṣaṇam mahā bāhum vicitra ābharaṇa upetam ṣoḍaśa samāḥ yathā vat upabhujyaprabudhyatam madanenapīḍitā abhrānta tu tyaktvā avayaskam rakta aravim tatas tasyāḥ sakhī citralekhā iti nāma kanyām tādṛśīm avasthām gatām vilokya kim nimitta vibhrānta cittā asi iti papraccha sā api svapna labdham patim yathāvat ācaṣṭa sā api sakala deva mānuṣa ādi śreṣṭhān paṭe vilikhya tasyai darśayāmāsa yadu vaṃśa sambhūtān kṛṣṇa saṅkarṣaṇa pradyumna aniruddha ādīn api samyak nivedayāmāsa kṛṣṇam anumānya pradyumna anantaram aniruddham dṛṣṭvā saḥ eti eṣa eti āliliṅga dṛṣṭvā gṛhītvā mohayitvā māhiṣmatyām bāṇasya antar pure caitya prāsāda ādi yukta itasyāḥ bāṇaputryāḥ śayyāyām cikṣepa saḥ apiprabuddha uti ramye gapāvake saṃsthitām uṣām sarva lakṣaṇa lakṣitām vicitra ābharaṇa vasana gandha mālya alam kṛtām kām cana varṇām su keśīm sujāta stanīm dṛṣṭvā agāḍham āliṅgya kariṇyā gandhahastīvatayā ati prīti sam yuktayā yathā sukham ramayāmāsa evam māsa mātram ramamāṇam kadācid antar pura nivāsinyaḥ vṛddhā daitya striyaḥ jṣā tvārā jṣenivedayāmāsuḥ sa rāja akrodha tāmra akṣaḥ param vismayam gatvā atam iha ānayata iti puras kim karān preṣayāmāsa te api tūrṇam nṛpa prāsādam āruhya rāja putryāḥ śayane saṃsthitam aniruddham grahītum ājagmuḥ satān samārabdhān dṛṣṭvā prāsādaḥ tam bham ekam helayā utpāṭya niyuta sam khyākān kim karān mu bhena cūrṇita mātram cakāra atha daitya patiḥ nihatān kim karān dṛṣṭvā kautūhalam gatvā asau śrī kṛṣṇa pautraḥ iti devarṣiṇā proktaḥ dhanuḥ ādāya svayam eva aniruddham grahītum tad samīpam ājagāma kṛṣṇaḥ api tam bhūta patim gaja carma kapāla bhasma dharam jvalita uraga ākalpam piṃ galam trilocana triśūla dharam sarva bhūta gaṇa sam hṛti karttāram sarva bhūta bhaya āvaham sam varta agni prabham putra dvaya samanvitam samasta gaṇa āvṛtam prathamam tat abhūt ghoram kṛṣṇa śaṅkarayoḥ tadā pināka śārṅga nirmuktaiḥ bāṇaiḥ sam vartaka upamaiḥ rāmaḥ api cakre bāṇena pradyumnaḥ ṣaṇmukhena ca yuyudhāte mahā vīryau sim hau iva bala utkaṭau rāmaḥ umuśalam ādāya tasya dantam atāḍayat gaṇān vidrāvaya mā sa muśalena halāyudhaḥ kṛṣṇena su ciram kālam yuddha asau nīlalohitaḥ tāpa jvaram mahā dīptam asmin sam yojya sāyake kopāt sam rakta locanaḥ tat astram vārayāmāsa kṛṣṇaḥ śītajvareṇa tu tābhyām hariharābhyām tu visṛṣṭau tau imau jvarau viśatuḥ mānuṣe loke tayoḥ eva ajṣayā bhṛśam hari śaṅkarayoḥ yuddham mānavāḥ tatas sa tuhṛṣīkeśaḥ mohana astram durāsadam niyujya bāṇam bhūteśe mumoca madhusūdanaḥ papāta mūrcchitaḥ bhūmau śaṅkaraḥ tridaśeśvaraḥ pitaram mohitam dṛṣṭvā aśaktim udyamya vīryavān yoddhum abhyāyayau kṛṣṇam ṣaṇmukhaḥ śikhivāhanaḥ hum kāreṇa eva tam kṛṣṇaḥ cakāra atra parāṅmukham evam jitvā yadu śreṣṭhaḥ śūlapāṇim trilocanam mahā svanam pām cajanyam śaṅkham dadhmau pratāpavān kṛṣṇena nirjitam śrutvā sa ātmajam śaṅkaram tadā bāṇaḥ syandanam āsthāya yauyuddhāya keśavam sa dṛṣṭvā asahasā kṛṣṇam garuḍa upari saṃsthitam chādayāmāsa govindam bahu śastra astra vṛṣṭibhiḥ gadābhiḥ parighaiḥ śūlaiḥ śaktibhiḥ tomaraiḥ api bhinḍipālaiḥ ca khaḍgaiḥ ca cakraiḥ bāṇaiḥ nirantaram tāni sarvāṇi cit cheda cakreṇa eva janārdanaḥ sasarja tasya bāhūnām chedana artham sudarśanam chinnam cakre sahasradhā hareḥ samīpam āgatya kṛtām jaliḥ abhāṣata pārvatī uvāca kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa jagannātha nārāyaṇa dayā nidhe tvayā adattam varam mahyam tadā akauśalaparvate saubhāgyam śāśvatam saumya prasannena mahātmanā tat satyam kuru govinda garuḍa ārūḍha śāśvata evam uktaḥ tatas devyā kṛṣṇaḥ kamala locanaḥ astram sam hārayāma asaumohitaḥ patiḥ kṛṣṇa astreṇa vinirmuktaḥ sarva bhūta patiḥ śivaḥ utthāya prāṣjaliḥ bhūtvā tuṣṭāva jagatām patim śaṅkaraḥ uvāca kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa jagannātha bhavagan puruṣottama pareśa parameśāna anādinidhana avyaya tīvra vīryam manuṣya iṣu śarīra grahaṇa ātmikā sarvasya tava ceṣṭā iyam māna lakṣaṇam eva tat tubhyam prasīdam amaśāśvata tvam eva jagatām sraṣṭā ādhātā āharttā jagadguruḥ tvam ādiḥ tvam anādiḥ tvam īśvaraḥ śeṣaḥ eva ca kṣara akṣara ipara dhāma nirucaḥ nityam sura āśraye yathā yaḥ tvām na veda loke asmin samūḍhaḥ sarva bhāvanaḥ parāvara īśvaram dhām aviduḥ dāsye manīṣiṇaḥ tu nityam tasya tu mithuna an itava adhyakṣa bruvata iyat uśāśvata tava nāmāni karmāṇi guṇāni śāśvatāni ca śvarya aṇi guṇātīta bruvate ca uttame ime tvam prajñānam param brahma tvayā a prājṣena śāśvata jīvaya etena prajṣena pareṇa eva ātmanā tvayā prajñānam ca eva vijñānam medhām dṛṣṭim tathā dhṛtim sarvān kāmān avāpnoti amṛtam sabhavet tadā etat sam jñānam ātmānam yat etat hṛdiyat manaḥ sam kalpaḥ eva ca bhavanti eṣatvam paramam brahma eṣatvam vaiprajāpatiḥ eṣatvam indraḥ rudraḥ ca eṣatvam sarva devatāḥ tathā jarāyu ja aṇḍa jāta anisveda ja udbhidya jāni ca aśvā gāvaḥ ca puruṣāḥ hastinaḥ ca itarāṇi ca yatim kacid prāṇi jātam ca jaṅgamāḥ ca eva jantavaḥ tvayā eva prerita ālokāḥ ca iṣṭam te sādhu asādhuṣu tasmāt mayā akṛtam yat ca aparādham idam prabho namaḥ te puṇḍarīkākṣa govinda acyuta mādhava namasyāmi jagatsvāmin ṛim sam ha karuṇākara śrīśa sarva gata śrīman paramātman namaḥ astu te trayī nātha namaḥ tubhyam rāma rājīva locana bhū bhāraka vināśāya kṛṣṇa ānanda svarūpiṇe evam stutvā atha govindam praṇipatya aumāpatiḥ prāṣjaliḥ prāha bhūta īśaḥ vākyam gambhīrayā girā tathā iti uktvā āca bhagavān bāṇam bali sutam tadā prāṇa saṃśayam āpannam chinna bāhum asṛj catam sam hṛtya cakram govindaḥ mumoca karuṇā nidhiḥ mocayitvā abali sutam śaṅkaraḥ sam śita vrataḥ vṛṣabha indram samāruhya pārvatyā sahitaḥ prabhuḥ sa tu bāṇaḥ namaskṛtya rāma kṛṣṇau mahā balau tābhyām vainagarīm gatvā amumoca madana ātmajam vastraiḥ ābharaṇaiḥ divyaiḥ pūjayitvā yathā rhataḥ uṣām sampradadau tasmai kṛṣṇa pautrāya śauraye udvāhya rāmakṛṣṇa autama niruddham yathāvidhi uṣayā sahitam tatra aniruddham vaijanārdanaḥ yasya tadā praviveśa purīm ramyām tridaśaiḥ maghavān iva aniruddhaḥ bāṇa putryāḥ nānā ratna maye gṛhe aniśam ramayāmāsa nānā bhogaiḥ mudā anvitaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde bāṇāsura saṅgrāma kathanam nāma paṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī rudraḥ uvāca atha pauṇḍraka vāsudevaḥ kāśi rājaḥ vārāṇasyām maheśam arccayat nirāhāraḥ paṣca akṣaram jajāpa pauraḥ caraṇa kāle śaṅkaram sva netra kamalena pūjayāmāsa tatas śūlapāṇiḥ umāpatiḥ prasannaḥ varam vṛṇīṣva iti tam āha śivaḥ tasmai śaṅkha cakra gadā padma yuta caturbhujam puṇḍarīka dala nibha locanam māna kirīṭa talam pīta vastra kaustubha ābharaṇa ādi cihnāni api mahyam dehi iti yācitaḥ śivaḥ sarva tasmin tasmin neva kṣaṇe garuḍa patākā yuta rūpam ratham āropya caturam gākṣauhiṇī balena dvārakām avāpa mām a jitvā tava vāsudeva tvam na asti iti dūtam preṣayāmāsa mā āsīnam śaṅkha cakra gadā padma hastam dadarśa kṛṣṇaḥ atha śārṅgam ādāyasam varta agni prabhaiḥ bāṇaiḥ tathā śva gaja padāti yuktam mahat akṣauhiṇī balam muhūrta dadāha pavitreṇa sudarśanena kirīṭa kuṇḍala yutam tasya śiraḥ kamalam chittvā vārāṇasyām antar purenipātayāmāsa tat dṛṣṭvā asarva ekāśī nivāsinaḥ kim etat iti āśam kya vismitāḥ babhūvuḥ tasya pauṇḍrakasya sutaḥ daṇḍapāṇiḥ iti vāsudevena bhagavatā a nihatam sva pitaram śrutvā mātrā mṛtyunā āsa mā ādiṣṭaḥ sva purohitena abhiyuktaḥ māheśvareṇa kratunā aśaṅkaram iyāja satu prasannaḥ māheśvarīm mahā uśvarīm jvālā ākula upacita vigrahām samdīpta saṭā kalāpām piṃ gala netrām jvalat karāla vadanām triśūla hastām garāga liptām nara muṇḍa mālā vibhūṣitām sarva deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra dattām sa deva bhayam karīm rudra da mīkṣya sa putra dāra bāndhava sahitam kṛṣṇam jahi iti prerayāmāsa pṛthvīm sva tejasā a nirdaham tī pralaya aśani nirbhara svanam nava dam tatra tyāḥ sarvejanāḥ tām dṛṣṭvā a mahāpralayam iti matvā hāhākāram kurvantaḥ kṛṣṇam nivedayāmāsuḥ kṛṣṇaḥ api tān sarvān na bhetavyam iti uktvā prākāra toraṇe sthitām mahā raudrām kṛtyām tathā vidhām dṛṣṭvā sakala śastra astrā nivāraṇa samartham sahasra aram sudarśanam tasya ākṛtyāyām sahasā āmumoca vinaṣṭa tejā abhaya ārtā krośantī vārāṇasīm prati dudrāva sudarśanam api tām kṛtyām bhṛśam anvagāt sā api bhaya ārtā krośantī kāśi pateḥ tasya antaḥpuram praviveśa sudarśanaḥ api tām vārāṇasīm purīm prāpya sa bhṛtya bala vāhanam pauṇḍraka sutam daṇḍapāṇim nāma kāśi rājam bahu prāsāda harmya mālinīm purīm māheśvarīm api bhasma avaśeṣām kṛtvā sakala deva mahā ṛṣibhiḥ pūjyamānaḥ punar eva dvāravatyām kṛṣṇa hastam su saumyam kalpam iva āviveśa atra ca ślokāḥ gīyante kṛtyām bhasma avaśeṣam tān tatas vārāṇasīm purīm prabhūta ratha mātaṅga aṃsa aśvām pum strī samanvitām sa aśeṣa koṣa koṣṭha antām durnirīkṣyām suraiḥ api dvāra upalakṣitā śeṣa gṛha prākāra catvarām pradadāha hareḥ cakram sakalām eva tām purīm akṣīṇa gati sāmarthyam asādhya kṛta sādhanam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite pauṇḍraka putra kṛtyā vidhvaṃsanam nāma ekapaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvipaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī rudraḥ uvāca atha magadha adhipaḥ kaṃsa vadha anantaram dviṣan eva yādavān sadā pīḍayāmāsa te duḥkhitāḥ kṛṣṇam ūcuḥ sa ca bhīma arjunau āhūya saṃmantrayāmāsa kṛṣṇaḥ anena rudraḥ pūjitaḥ tad prasādāt śastraiḥ avadhyaḥ param kena api prakāreṇa hantavyaḥ iti saḥ api mahā vīryān akṣatriyān yuddhe nirjitya balāt gṛhītvā sva veśmani nirudhya māsi māsi kṛṣṇa caturdaśyām ekaikam hatvā tad raktena eva balim bhairavāya akarot teṣām vāsudevaḥ prahasan pārthivam tam uvāca kṛṣṇa bhīma arjuna a yuddha artham āgatāḥ sma asmākam anyatamam dvandva yuddha artham vṛṇīṣu etya vadat tatas kṛṣṇena eva saṣcoditaḥ vāyu putraḥ tasya śarīram dvidhā kṛtya bhūmau nipātayāmāsa evam jarāsandham pāṇḍu putreṇa hatvā atān jarāsandha nirodhitān vāsudevaḥ api pārthivān mocayāmāsa nihatya vāyu putreṇa jarām sandham yadu udvahaḥ tad gṛhe sanniruddhān tu mocayāmāsa pārthivān svān svān jana padān sarve jagmuḥ kṛṣṇena rakṣitāḥ atha tābhyām indraprastham gatvā vāsudevaḥ tatra mahā kratum rājasūyam yudhiṣṭhiram kārayāmāsa tatra samāpte kratau agra pūjām bhīṣma anumatena kṛṣṇāya dattavān tatra śiśupālaḥ kṛṣṇam bahūni ākṣepa vākyāni uktavān kṛṣṇaḥ api sudarśanena tasya śiraḥ ciccheda atha śiśupālam nihatam śrutvā dantavaktraḥ kṛṣṇena yoddhum mathurām ājagāma kṛṣṇaḥ tu tat śrutvā ratham āruhya tena yoddhum mathurām āyayau saḥ api hareḥ sāyujyam yogi gamyam nitya ānanda sukham śāśvatam paramam padam avāpa kṛṣṇaḥ api tam hatvā yamunām uttīrya nanda vrajam gatvā prāktanau pitarau abhivādya āśvāsya tābhyām sa aśru kaṇṭham āliṅgitaḥ sakala gopa vṛddhān praṇamya āśvāsya ratna ābharaṇa ādibhiḥ tatrasthān santarpayāmāsa kālindyāḥ puline ramye puṇya vṛkṣa samāvṛte gopa nārībhiḥ aniśam krīḍayāmāsa keśavaḥ atha tatrasthāḥ nanda gopa ādayaḥ sarve janāḥ putra dāra sahitāḥ paśu pakṣi mṛga ādayaḥ ca vāsudeva prasādena divya rūpa dharāḥ vimānam ārūḍhāḥ paramam vaikuṇṭha lokam avāpuḥ kṛṣṇaḥ tu nanda gopa vraja okasām sarveṣām paramam nirāmayam sva padam dattvā divi deva gaṇaiḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ dvāravatīm śrīmatīm viveśa tatra vasudeva ugrasena saṅkarṣaṇa pradyumna aniruddha akrūra ādibhiḥ pratyaham sampūjita ṣoḍaśa sahasra bhāryābhiḥ aṣṭābhiḥ divya mahiṣībhiḥ ca viśva rūpa dharaḥ divya ratna maya nānā gṛha antareṣu suta kusuma āṣcita ślakṣṇatara paryaṅkeṣu ramayāmāsa atha rāma kṛṣṇa sa tīrthyaḥ vipraḥ bāla sakhā sadā atyanta dāridrya pīḍitaḥ muṣṭi mātrān yācana āpta pṛthukāḥ jīrṇa vāsasi nibadhya vāsudevam draṣṭum śrīmatīm dvārakā nagarīm ājagāma sa tu rukmiṇī antaḥpura dvāri kṣaṇam tūṣṇīm tasthau kṛṣṇaḥ api samāgatam brāhmaṇam jṣātvā pradyumnena namaskṛtvā vāma karam gṛhītvā gṛha antare sva āsane niveśya bhayāt vepamānam tam rukmiṇī hasta gata suvarṇa kalaśa jalena pādau prakṣālya madhu parkeṇa pūjayāmāsa sa tu kṛṣṇena visṛṣṭaḥ mama kiṃcid vastram vā dhanam vā kṛṣṇena na dattam iti manyamānaḥ sva puram viveśa atha bahu dhana dhānya yutam sva gṛham dṛṣṭvā tad prasādāt idam labdham iti vadan prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā divya vastra ābharaṇa ādinā bhāryayā saha sarvān kāmān bhuktvā hari santuṣṭyai bahu yajṣān iṣṭvā tad prasādena paramam nityam svarga sukham avāpa atha dhṛtarāṣṭra tanayaḥ duryodhanaḥ pāṇḍu tanayān kapaṭa dyūta vyājena rājyam apahṛtya sva rāṣṭrāt vivāsayāmāsa te tu yudhiṣṭhira bhīma arjuna nakula sahadevāḥ su patnyā draupadyā saha mahā araṇyam gatvā tatra dvādaśa abdān sthitvā saṃvatsara paryantam sarve matsya deśa adhipateḥ virāṭasya niveśane sthitvā vāsudevena sahāyena dhārtarāṣṭrān yoddhum ājagmuḥ teṣām dhārtarāṣṭra pāṇḍu putrāṇām nānā deśa adhipa nṛpaiḥ kurukṣetra mahā puṇye devānām api bhayam karaḥ mahā saṃgrāmaḥ abhavat atha śrī kṛṣṇaḥ api arjuna sārathyam kurvan arjune sva śaktim āveśya tena duryodhana bhīṣma droṇa pramukhān sarvān pārthivān ekādaśa akṣauhiṇī bala sahitān kurukṣetre hatvā pāṇḍavāḥ narāḥ niḥśeṣeṇa sarva bhū bhāram apāsya svām purīm praviveśa kasyacid tu atha kālasya katipaya ahani vaidikaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ amṛtam paṣca vārṣikam bālam ādāya rāja dvāri nidhāya bahuśas vilapan bahūni ākrośa vākyāni kṛṣṇam jagāda kṛṣṇaḥ tam ākrośam śrutvā tuṣṇīm uvāsa sa tu mama paṣca putrāḥ pūrvam hatāḥ ayam tu ṣaṣṭhaḥ enam kṛṣṇaḥ na jīvayiṣyati tarhi rāja dvāri mariṣyāmi iti uvāca tasmin kāle arjunaḥ kṛṣṇam draṣṭum āgataḥ tathā-vidham tam putra śokena vilapantam dadarśa arjunaḥ api kāla dharmam upāgatam paṣca vārṣikam bālakam dṛṣṭvā kṛpayā āviṣṭaḥ tava putram aham jīvayiṣyāmi iti brāhmaṇāya abhayam dattvā pratiśrutavān brāhmaṇa stutena āśvāsitaḥ hṛṣṭavān atha etam brāhmaṇa śiśum bahubhiḥ sam jīvinā astraiḥ abhimantrya alabdha jīvitam dṛṣṭvā a vṛthā pratijṣām avāpya bahu śoka samanvitaḥ tena eva prāpya ṇān tyam ktum aicchat kṛṣṇaḥ tu tat sarvam jṣātvā antar purāt viniṣkramya tam vaidikam prāha tava putrān sarvān aham dāsyāmi iti uktvā śva asya vainateyam āruhya arjuna sahitaḥ vaiṣṇavam lokam ājagāma tatra divya maṇi maṇḍapa uddeśe devyā saha samāsīnam nārāyaṇam dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇa arjunau namaścakratuḥ sa tu nārāyaṇaḥ tādṛś vayasi saṃsthitān brāhmaṇa putrān kṛṣṇāyasam dadau ṇaiḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ dvāravatīm āviveśa tasmai brāhmaṇāya paṣca varṣa vayaḥ sthān ṣaṭ putrān dadau saḥ api atyanta haṣa samanvitaḥ kṛṣṇam varddhayasva iti āśiṣam prāyacchat arjunaḥ tu saphalām pratijṣām avāpya kṛṣṇam namaskṛtya yudhiṣṭhira pālitām svām purīm ājagāma kṛṣṇasya ṣoḍaśa sahasra bhāryāsu ayuta sāhasra putrāḥ jajṣire teṣām putra pautra sam khyām vaktum na śakyate atra api ślokaḥ aṣṭauśatāni putrāṇām sahasrāṇi ayutam tathā pradyumnaḥ prathamaḥ teṣām sarveṣām rukmiṇī sutaḥ a sam khyaiḥ taiḥ yādavaiḥ iyam pṛthivī sam vṛtā abhavat punar api avanī bhāra śam hartum aicchat kadācid sarve kumārāḥ narmadāyām vihartum ājagmuḥ tatra tapam tam kaṇvam mahā ṛṣim dṛṣṭvā a jāmbavatyāḥ putram yoṣit veṣam kṛtvā atasya udare kātvā āyasam musalam baddhvā samīpam āgatya sarve namaskṛtvā a patnī rūpam sām bam kumāram tasya puratas nidhāya asya a garbheḥ strī iva a puruṣaḥ uva abhaviṣti iti brūhi iti ūcuḥ sarva ananena musalena yūyam sarve nihatāḥ abhavata iti uvāca sarve samudvigna manasaḥ kṛṣṇam sametya mahā ṛṣiṇā uktam tat karma nivedayāmāsuḥ kṛṣṇaḥ api tat āyasam musalam cūrṇībhūtam hradenipātayāmāsa tad ayaḥ cūrṇībhūta bīja samudbhūtā vajra sannibhā mahā kāśāḥ sambabhūvuḥ tatra tam musala avaśiṣṭam kaniṣṭhā aṅguli mātram matsyaḥ ujagrāsatam matsyam niṣādaḥ gṛhītvā tad udara stham muśala khaṇḍam ādāya bāṇa agre phalakam akarot kadācid sarveya ādava ārāma kṛṣṇa pradyumna ādayaḥ maghavatā preṣitām vāruṇīm pītvā a mattāḥ babhūvuḥ parasparam vīraṇam nītvā a bahūni ākrośa vākyāni vadantaḥ yuddham cakruḥ kṣayam ca gatāḥ kṛṣṇaḥ tu yuddha śrāntaḥ kalpataru chāyāyām śayanam cakāra sa niṣādaḥ dhanuḥ bāṇam gṛhītvā ākheṭaka vṛttim ja gāma evam niḥśeṣam tyakta jīvitāḥ babhūvuḥ te sarve svān svān tridaśān prapedire evam hṛtya sarvam svayam ekaḥ devaḥ bahu gulma samākīrṇa mahā druma chāyāyām suptaḥ caturvidha vyūha gatam vāsudeva ātmakam ātmānam cintayaḥ jānu upari padam nidhāya ātmanaḥ mānuṣam vapuḥ tyaktum anuniṣasāda sa tadā akāla prabhāvena cakra vajra dhvajām kuśa ādi cihnitam ati raktatamam hareḥ pāda kamalam dṛṣṭvā tad anantaram śrī kṛṣṇam su mahā bhaya ārtaḥ kṛtām jali puṭa umahat aparādhaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ tathā bhūtam dṛṣṭvā asudhā maya karābhyām antam utthāpya bha vata anāparāddham kṛtam iti vadan mahā bhaya pīḍitam āśvāsayan uvāca tatas yogi gamyam apunarāvṛtti śāśvatam sarva upaniṣada mayam vaiṣṇavam lokam pradadau asau tasmin na iva muhūrte mānuṣam rūpam vihāya paṣca upaniṣad mayam sakala putra dāra sahitaḥ dīpti mayam vaiṣṇavam lokam divyam vimānam āsthāya sahasra arka dyuti sadṛśam divya apsaraḥ gaṇa ākīrṇam hi raṇmayam vāsudeva iti ekam jagāma tasmin kāle dārukaḥ ratham āruhya viṣṇoḥ samīpam viveśa kṛṣṇaḥ api mad sva rūpam arjunam pūrvam ānayasva iti preṣayāmāsa kṛṣṇaḥ stutam āha pārtha aham sva lokam yāsyāmi tvam tu dvāravatīm gatvā tatra stha rukmiṇī ādi aṣṭa bhāryā ānīya mama śarīre preṣaya sa dārukeṇa sahitaḥ nagarīm ājagāma tasmin svar lokam yiyāntam kṛṣṇam dṛṣṭvā ṛṣibhiḥ sārdham stu tvā puṣpa varṣāṇi vavṛṣuḥ kṛṣṇaḥ api mānuṣa yam anāmayam vāsudeva ātmakam deham dhṛtvā vainateyam āruhya mahā ṛṣibhiḥ tūyamānaḥ jagāma tat śrutvā sarve paura janāḥ striyaḥ ca dvāravatīm utsṛjya antar purāt vahis niṣkramya sarvāḥ tāḥ kṛṣṇa vallabhā vasudeva ugrasena sahitāḥ śīghram eva hareḥ samīpam jagmuḥ revatī ca balabhadra śarīram pariṣvajya agnim praviśya tasmin deham prāpya divya vimāna ārūḍhā bhartuḥ sthānam saṅkarṣaṇa lokam divyam avāpa śarīrāṇi sampūjya agnipraveśam cakruḥ teṣām sarveṣām arjuna aurddhvadaihikam kṛtavān jagāma tatas sarvām ṣoḍaśa sahasra bhāryyā arjunena saha indraprastham gaccham pūrvam deva gandharva yoṣitaḥ hi aṣṭāvakram mahā munin dṛṣṭvā jahasuḥ tatas tena śaptāḥ veśyāḥ bhaviṣyatha tatas tāḥ śoka samāviṣṭaḥ mama bhuja balam sa vīryam kṛṣṇena eva saha sarvam aiśvaryam niryātam iti matvā adya mama abhāgya kṣaya eti vadan sāyam samdhyā raviḥ iva niḥśeṣa vinaṣṭa tejāḥ svām purīm samājagāma evam hita arthāya sarva devānām samasta bhū bhāra vināśāya yadu vam śe avatīrya sakala rākṣasa vināśam kṛ tvā mahāntam api ca urvī bhāram nāśayitvā ānanda vraja dvārakā mathurā nivāsinaḥ sarvān sthāvara atra ślokāḥ anye sarve avatārāḥ syuḥ kṛṣṇasya caritam mahat bhū bhāraka vināśāya prādurbhūtaḥ uramāpatiḥ etat kṛṣṇasya caritam duṣṭānām nāśa hetave śrī kṛṣṇaḥ karuṇā sindhuḥ vaikuṇṭhe modate sadā ati adbhutam idam devi kṛṣṇasya caritam śubham smaret vā āśṛṇuyāt bhakti āsayā ati paramam padam mahāpātaka yuktaḥ uvā tathā upapātaka saṃyutaḥ bālakṛṣṇasya caritam śrutvā pāpaiḥ pramucyate dvāravatyām samāsīnam rukmiṇī sahitam harim saṅgrāmesam kaṭe durge śatrubhiḥ pariveṣṭite netāram sarva devānām dhyātvā a su vijayībhavet yaḥ smaret gopa kanyābhiḥ krīḍam tam govrajeśubhe sarva kāmān avāpnoti saubhāgyam ca eva jetāram ca mahāraudrīm kṛtyām kāśī pure sthitām kṛṣṇāya namaḥ iti evam mantram uccārayet budhaḥ kṛṣṇāya vāsudevāya haraye paramātmane praṇataḥ kleśa nāśāya govindāya namaḥ namaḥ sarveṣām eva devānām īśvaraḥ asau janārdanaḥ rakṣaṇāya ca lokānām avasthā antaram eti vai buddha rūpa dharaḥ śrīmān mohayāmāsa tad ripūn mohitāḥ tena śāstreṇa sarva dharma vivarjitāḥ nārāyaṇa astreṇa mayāḥ nihatāḥ deva śatravaḥ avatīrya kalāvam te brāhmaṇasya niveśane haniṣyati tathā raudrān mlechān sarvān janārdanaḥ taiḥ taiḥ bhāvaiḥ mayā avasthāḥ sarvāḥ proktāḥ jagat pateḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde śrī kṛṣṇa carite dvipaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tripaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī pārvatī uvāca te tasmin rāma kṛṣṇābhyām caritram ati vismitam aho rāmasya caritam kṛṣṇasya ca mahātmanaḥ śṛṇvatyāḥ mama deveśa kalpa antara śataiḥ api tṛptim nā evā iti bhūteśa cetaḥ hari kathā amṛtam adhunā śrotum icchāmi viṣṇoḥ māhātmyam uttamam śrī rudraḥ uvāca śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi hareḥ ca su mahātmanaḥ śilā mṛd dāru loha ādyaiḥ kṛtvā pratikṛtim hareḥ śrauta smārta āgama prokta kriyā saṃsthāpanam hi yat tat sthāpanam iti proktam svayam vyaktam hi me śṛṇu yasmin saṃnihitaḥ viṣṇuḥ svayam eva nṛṇām bhuvi pāṣāṇa dārvoḥ ātma īśaḥ svayam vyaktam hi tat smṛtam svayam vyaktam sthāpitam vā pūjayet madhusūdanam devatānām mahā ṛṣīṇām arcana arthe sanātanaḥ svayam eva jagannāthaḥ sānnidhyam yāti keśavaḥ śrī raṅga śāyī deveśaḥ vidhinā arcyaḥ surottamaḥ saḥ eva ikṣvāku nāthānām tapasā āvirabhūt bhuvi mama api kāśyām sampūjyaḥ mādhavaḥ kaluṣa apahaḥ na aṣṭāṅga yoge yajṣa īśaḥ tu arcāyām vindate nṝṇām cakṣuṣoḥ viṣayam prāpya dadāti varam īpsitam ajṣānām api sānnidhyam sarvadā pṛthivī tale jambūdvīpe mahā puṇye varṣe vai bhārate śubhe arcāyām saṃnidhau viṣṇuḥ na itareṣu kadācana bhārate asmin mahā varṣe nityam sam nihitaḥ hariḥ kāśyām prayāge saumye ca śālagrāma acale tathā dvāravatyām naimiṣe ca tathā badarikāśrame kṛta śauce haret pāpam pauṇḍarīke ca daṇḍake māthure veṅkaṭādrau ca śvetādrau garuḍa acale kāṣcyām ananta śayane śrī raṅge vāsava acale nārāyaṇa acale saumye vārāhe vāmana āśrame evam ādyāḥ svayam vyaktāḥ sarva kāma phala pradāḥ mahā bhāgavata śreṣṭhaḥ vidhinā sthāpya keśavam mantreṇa kuryāt sāṃnidhyam sthāpanam tat viśiṣyate tasmin sampūjayet devam grāmeṣu ca gṛheṣu ca śālagrāma śilāyām tu gṛha arcā sadbhiḥ iṣyate arcanam mantra paṭhanam yāga yogaḥ mahātmanaḥ nāma saṅkīrtanam sevā tad cihnaiḥ aṅkanam tathā tadīya ārādhanam ca syāt navadhā bhidyate śubhe mahā bhāgavataḥ śreṣṭhaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ vai guruḥ nṛṇām sarveṣām eva lokānām asau pūjyaḥ yathā hariḥ tāpa ādi paṣca saṃskārī nava ijyā karma kārakaḥ artha paṣcaka vid vipraḥ mahā bhāgavataḥ smṛtaḥ tad cihnaiḥ aṅkane sevā tadīyānām ca pūjanam mantra varṇasya japanam nāma saṃkīrtanam hareḥ vandanam ca viśām proktam ṣaṣ karma ijyā vidhānataḥ nāma saṅkīrtanam sevā pūjanam vandanam tathā arcanam ca tadīyānām paṣca ijyā śūdra janmanaḥ sādhāraṇena sarveṣām mānasa ijyā nṛṇām priye sva adhikāra anurūpaḥ ca kāryā ca ijyā jagat pateḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ itaraiḥ ca api pūjanīyaḥ hariḥ sadā yathocitā ca varṇasya kāryā ijyā hareḥ nṛṇām varṇa āśrama anurūpaḥ ca kartavyam vaiṣṇavaiḥ śubhaiḥ śruti smṛti ukta karmāṇi na atikrāmeta buddhimān śruti smṛti uktam ācāram yaḥ na seveta vaiṣṇavaḥ tasmāt varṇa anurūpām vai kuryāt ijyām jagat pateḥ tasmāt smṛti uktam ācāram kuryāt vai mānavaḥ sadā sādhāraṇā hi sarveṣām mānasa ijyā śubhe nṛṇām sva adhikāram nirīkṣya eva karma kuryāt atandritaḥ śamaḥ damaḥ tapaḥ śaucam satyam āmiṣa varjanam asteyam eva ahiṃsā ca sarveṣām dharma sādhanam tasmāt varṇa anurūpeṇa pūjayet madhusūdanam yathā vidhi sahasranāmabhiḥ bhaktyā ākīrtayet vāgyataḥ śuciḥ śaucam kṛtvā yathā nyāyam ācamya prayataḥ śuciḥ danta dhāvana pūrvam tu snānam kuryāt yathā vidhi ādāya tulasī mūla mṛd anta patra saṃyutām mūlamantreṇa abhimantrya gāyatryā ca śubha ānane mantreṇa eva anuliptām gaḥ snāyāt kṛtvā aghamarṣaṇam hari pāda udbhavām gaṅgām tatra āvāhya su nirmale ācamya mārjanam kuryāt pauruṣa ukta kramāt atha paścāt āśu nimajjya atha mūlamantram japet budhaḥ śati vāram vā aśatam aṣṭa uttaram ca vā ācamya tarpayet devān nṛṣīn ca eva pitṝn tathā nipīḍya vastram ācamya dhauta vastreṇa veṣṭitaḥ vimalām mṛttikām ramyām ādāya dvija sattamaḥ mantreṇa eva abhimantrya atha lalāṭa ādiṣu vaiṣṇavaḥ dhārayet ūrdhva puṇḍrāni yathā sam khyam atandritaḥ upāsya vidhivat samdhyām sāvitrīm ca japet budhaḥ sam yata ātmā gṛham gatvā a pādau prakṣālya vāgyataḥ ācamya ekāgra manasā a pūjā maṇḍapam āviśet tasmin niveśya devam tam lakṣmī nārāyaṇam prabhum pūjayet vidhinā asamyak gandha puṣpa akṣata ādibhiḥ sthāpanā iva asvayam vyakte gṛha arcāyām bidhānataḥ śrauta smārta āgama uktānām arcanam vidhinā dvijaḥ kuryāt bhaktyā yathārham ca viṣṇoḥ prayata mānasaḥ yathā upadiṣṭam guruṇā tathā kurvīta vaiṣṇavaḥ śrautam vaikhānasam proktam vāsiṣṭham smārtam ucyate paṣcarātra vidhānam ca divya āgamam iti īritam kriyā lopam na kartavyam viṣṇoḥ ārādhanam param āvāhana āsana arghya ādyaiḥ gandha puṣpa akṣata ādibhiḥ dhūpaiḥ dīpaiḥ ca naivedyaiḥ tām bula ādyaiḥ namaskṛtaiḥ kuryāt ārādhanam viṣṇoḥ yathā śaktyā mudā anvitaḥ pratyṛcam puruṣasūktena mūlamantreṇa vaiṣṇavaḥ mantra dvayena kurvīta ṣoḍaśaiḥ upacārakaiḥ bhūyas pratyupacāreṣu dadyāt puṣpa aṣjalim tatas āvāhayet jagannātham mudrayā ca eva vaiṣṇavaḥ āsanam tu yathā dadyāt puṣpakeṇa ca mudrayā dīpa arghya ācamanam snānam pātra sthaiḥ vimalaiḥ jalaiḥ surabhīṇi su puṣpāṇi bhaktyā samyak nivedayet dhūpam daśa ām gam aṣṭa ām gam dīpaḥ ca su manoharam naivedyam vividham dadyāt pāyasa apūpa miśritam dīpaiḥ nīrājanam kṛtvā puṣpa mālām samarcayet garuḍa aṅke śāyayitvā amaṅgala arghyam nivedayet sam kīrtya nāmabhiḥ puṇyaiḥ paścāt homam samācaret hareḥ naivaidya śeṣeṇa jahuyāt vahni maṇḍale hotavyam ājyasam miśram haviṣā a vaidika anale aṣṭottaraśata vāram aṣṭāvim śatim eva ca yajṣa rūpam mahā viṣṇum dhyāyan vaijuhuyāt haviḥ śuddhajām būnada nibham śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam samasta veda vedānta sāṅga upām ga yutam prabhum devyā āśriyā samāsīnam dhyātvā homam samācaret ekaikām āhutim paścāt nāmabhiḥ juhuyāt haviḥ bhū līlā vimalā ādyāḥ ca śaktayaḥ prathamam kramāt vāsudeva ādayaḥ paścāt tathā śakti ādi devatāḥ mūrttayaḥ keśava ādyāḥ ca tathā saṅkarṣaṇa ādayaḥ matsya kūrma ādayaḥ ca eva tathā cakra ādi hetayaḥ kumuda ādayaḥ ca tridaśāḥ tathā candra ādi devatāḥ indra ādi lokapālāḥ ca tathā dharma ādi devatāḥ hotavyāḥ kramaśas tasmin sampūjyāḥ ca viśeṣataḥ etat vaikuṇṭha homam tu mahā bhāgavata uttamaḥ gṛha arcane gṛha dvāri paṣca yajṣa vidhānataḥ dattvā a balim vidhānena paścāt ācamanam caret upaviśya āsane śubhre kṛṣṇājina kuśa uttare samyak padmāsana āsīnaḥ bhūtaśuddhim samācaret prāṇāyāma trayam kuryāt mantreṇa vijita indriyaḥ udak mukham tatas kṛtvā āhṛt paṅkajam anuttamam vikāsam tasya kurvīta a vijñāna raviṇā hṛdi tad karṇikāyām vahni arka śaśi bim bāni anukramāt trayam trayī maye tasmin cintayet vaiṣṇava uttamaḥ nānā ratna mayam pīṭham teṣām upari cintayet tasmin hṛd padma mūlām tebāla arka sadṛśa dyutim aṣṭa aiśvarya dalam padmam mantra akṣara mayam caret tasmin devyā samāsīnam koṭi śītāṃśu saṃnibham catur bhujam sundara aṅgam śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam padma patra viśāla akṣam sarva lakṣaṇa lakṣitam vicitra ābharaṇaiḥ yuktam divya maṇḍana maṇḍitam bāla arka koṭi sadṛśam kāntyā devyā śriyā saha sarva lakṣaṇa lakṣaṇyā samāśliṣṭa tanuḥ śivam evam dhyātvā japet mantram samāhita manāḥ śuciḥ sahasram śata vāram vā yathā śaktyā athavā api ca tadīyān arcayet bhaktyā tasmin kāle samāgatān arcayitvā pitṝn devān tarpayet ca vidhānataḥ sampūjya atithi bhṛtyān ca bhuṣjīyātām ca dampatī yakṣa rākṣasa bhūtānām arcanam varjayet sadā yakṣāṇām ca piśācānām madya māṃsa bhujām tathā divaukasām tu bhajanam surā pāna samam smṛtam brahma rākṣasa vetāla yakṣa bhūta arcanam nṛṇām koṭi janma kṛtam puṇyam yajṣa dāna kriyā ādikam sadyas sarvam layam yāti yakṣa bhūta ādi pūjanāt striyaḥ vā puruṣaḥ vā api yakṣa bhūta ādika arcanāt kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca krimiḥ bhūtvā atha viṣṭhāyām pitṛbhiḥ saha majjati yakṣāṇām ca piśācānām tāmasānām divaukasām nivedita annam yaḥ aśnāti pūya śoṇita bhuj bhavet yakṣān bhūta gaṇān ca anyān krūrān vai brahma rākṣasān uddiśya bhuṅkte yaḥ vipraḥ sadyas cāṇḍālaḥ eva saḥ yā nārī pūjayet yakṣān piśāca uraga rākṣasān sā yāti narakam ghoram kāla sūtram adhas mukhī pitṛbhiḥ saha kalpa antam uṣitvā tatra dāruṇe lihan mūtra purīṣam vai kṛcchrāt sūci mukhaiḥ tathā kṛmibhiḥ bhakṣamāṇām go yāvat ābhūta samplavam paścāt bhūmau daśa aheṣu jāyate śata saṅkhyayā tasmāt yakṣa ādikānām ca devānām arcanam tyajet arcayitvā jagat vandyam devam nārāyaṇam harim hareḥ bhukta avaśeṣeṇa balim tebhyaḥ viniḥkṣipet homam ca eva prakurvīta tad śeṣeṇa eva vaiṣṇavaḥ pitṛbhyaḥ ca api tat dadyāt sarvam ānantyam āpnuyāt prāṇinām pīḍanam yat tat viduṣām nirayāya vai tila piṣṭam śigru bilvam tathā kośātakīm tathā alābum ca eva vārtākam bījālīm kavacāni ca evam anyāni abhakṣyāṇi śāstra dṛṣṭāni vai naraḥ avaiṣṇavānām yat ca annam patitānām tathā eva ca anarpitam tathā viṣṇau śva māṃsa sadṛśam bhavet yakṣa rākṣasa bhūta annam surā madyam yaḥ aśnāti nirayam yāti pūya śoṇita bhojanam etaiḥ saṃsthāpana sparśa sahavāsa ādibhiḥ naraḥ patitānām sargāt pākhaṇḍānām tathā eva ca sarva yajṣasya bhoktāram purāṇam puruṣottamam jṣātvā sarvam prakurvīta nitya naimittikāḥ kriyāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa bhūtāḥ ca kūṣmāṇḍa gaṇa bhairavāḥ na arccanīyāḥ sadā devi svarga lokam abhī yakṣa rākṣasa bhūtānām arccanam varjayet dvijaḥ tasmāt rākṣasa bhūtānām arcanam pratiṣidhyate kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca rauravam narakam yāti yakṣa bhūta gaṇa arcanāt agamyā gamanāt dhiṃsā para dravya apahāraṇāt abhakṣya bhakṣaṇāt sadyas narakam samavāpnuyāt yaḥ tu pāṇi gṛhītām ca hitvā anyām striyam vrajet patitānām sargāt pākhaṇḍānām tathā eva ca vikarma sthānām ca tathā yāti eva nirayam naraḥ sam sargiṇām ca sam sargam tat sam sargam apityajet vaiṣṇavaḥ kulam ekam tu varjayet pāpa saṃyutam ekāntīsam tyajet grāmam mahāpātaka miśritam sva karmma jñāna bhakti ādi sādhanam vaiṣṇavam smṛtam caret saḥ ekāntībhavet vipraḥ vāsudeva parāyaṇaḥ akṛtyam vaiṣṇavaḥ pāpa buddhyā samyak parityajet ekāntīsam tyajet śāstram dūṣaṇāt manasā api ca nityam naimittikam kāmyam kṛtyam tu trividham smṛtam tad prāpti sādhanam viṣṇoḥ sva rūpa jñānam eva ca sudarśana ūrdhva puṇḍra ādi tad cihnaiḥ aṅkanam śubham smaraṇam kīrtanam viṣṇoḥ sevā ca paramātmanaḥ praṇāmaḥ tasya puratas tadīyānām ca pūjanam prasāda tīrtha sevā ca bhaktiḥ navavidhā smṛtā yasmāt prapadyate devam śaraṇam vaiṣṇavaḥ harim prapattiḥ sā tu vijṣeyā trividhā samprakīrtitā tāmasī rājasī ca eva sāttvikī trividhā smṛtā sā api tridhā kṛtā siddhiḥ sāmānyā sarva dehinām etat catuṣṭayam devi heyam sam tyajya vaiṣṇavaḥ upāya bhāvāt sam tyajya karma jṣāna ādikam naraḥ naimittike viśeṣeṇa pūjayet vidhinā śubhe pratyaham kārttike māsi jātī puṣpaiḥ samarcayet dadyāt akhaṇḍam dīpaḥ ca niyata ātma a dṛḍha vrataḥ brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā ām hari sāyujyam āpnuyāt dhanuṣi uṣasi deveśam māsam ekam nirantaram tapaḥ māsi udite bhānau snātvā nadyām viśeṣataḥ snātvā sampūjayet viṣṇum māsam ekam nirantaram śarkarām nityam udyānam vinivedayet vaiṣṇavān pūjayet bhaktyā māsa ante śubha darśane pūjayet jagatām īśam guḍa annam ca nivedayet māsām tevaiṣṇavān viprān bhojayet su samāhitaḥ sahasra vārṣikīm pūjām pratinityam avāpnuyāt pāṭalaiḥ kumuda utpalaiḥ arcayitvā hṛṣīkeśam annam cūta phalaiḥ yutam vaiṣṇavān bhojayitvā atha sarvam ānantyam āpnuyāt āṣāḍhe deva deveśam lakṣmī bhartāram acyutam śrī puṣpaiḥ arcayet nityam pāyasa annam nivedayet bhojayet ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrasya pūjām prāpnoti asaṃśayaḥ dadyāt apūpān bhaktyā atha śarkarā ghṛta miśritān brāhmaṇān bhojayet tadvat sarva mānam tyam āpnuyāt kṣīra annam guḍasam miśram bhaktyā tatra nivedayet gavām koṭi pradānasya pratyaham phalam āpnuyāt kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca vaiṣṇavam lokam āpnoti muditaḥ sva janaiḥ vṛtaḥ pūjayitvā acyutam bhaktyā tad sāyujyam avāpnuyāt kṣīra ājya śarkarā upetam annam vaipāyasam tathā amāyām mam davāreca vaiṣṇava ṛkṣe tathā eva ca ravi sam candra sūryayoḥ viśeṣeṇa arcayet viṣṇum yathā śaktyā varānane iṣṭim ca vaiṣṇavīm kuryāt śaktyā vai dvija sattamaḥ dadyāt puṣpa aṣjalim tatra pratyarcam vedasam mitam pāraṇam ca api kurvīta caruṇā a pāyasena vā vaiṣṇavān bhojayet viprān śaktyā dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām kula koṭim samudhṛtya avaiṣṇavam padam āpnuyāt aṣṭottarasahasram tu juhuyāt haviṣā yajet viśeṣeṇa arcayet vidvān mahā bhāgavata uttamān ante ca avabhṛtham kuryāt yathā vibhava sārataḥ vaiṣṇavaiḥ anuvākaiḥ ca kuryāt avabhṛtham dvijaḥ atra snātvā vidhānena yathā śaktyā dvijottamaḥ śubhe pātra antare ramye pādau prakṣālya bhaktitaḥ bhojayitvā anna pāna ādyaiḥ praṇamya ca punar punar gṛham praviśya deveśam pūjayet prayata ātmavān tadīyān ca viśeṣeṇa pūjayet sarvadā śubhe ārādhanānām sarveṣām viṣṇoḥ ārādhanam param tasmāt parataram devi tadīyānām samarcanam na sa bhāgavataḥ jṣeyaḥ kevalam dāmbhikaḥ smṛtaḥ pumān tasmāt prayatnena vaiṣṇavān pūjayet sadā sarvam tarati duḥkha ogham mahā bhāgavata arcanāt evam uktam mayā adevi viṣṇoḥ ārādhanam param nitya naimittikam ca eva tadīyānām ca pūjanam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde viṣṇu pūjā vidhāna vaiṣṇavācārakathanam nāma tripaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ catuḥpaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca evam uktā tu sā devi pati nā śūla pāṇinā praṇipatya mahātmānam uvāca prāṣjaliḥ tadā pārvatī uvāca sādhu uktam hi tvayā nātha vaiṣṇavam dharmam uttamam guhyāt guhyatamam viṣṇoḥ svarūpam paramātmanaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca samāśliṣya avadat devīm prahṛṣṭena antarātmanāḥ sādhu sādhu mahādevi sādhu sādhu varānane arcayasva hṛṣīkeśam lakṣmī bhartāram acyutam kṛta kṛtyaḥ asmi aham bhadre vaiṣṇavyā bhāryayā tvayā guruṇā tava cāru aṅgi vāma devena dhīmatā anujṣāta arcayasva īśam purāṇam puruṣottamam guru upadeśa mārgeṇa pūjayitvā eva keśavam prāpnoti sarvam na anyathā bhūdhara ātmaje vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca evam uktā tadā devi vāma deva antikam nṛpa jagāma sahasā hṛṣṭā viṣṇu pūjana lālasā vinīta ā prāṣjaliḥ bhūtvā uvāca muni sattamam pārvatī uvāca kariṣyāmi dvija śreṣṭha tvam anujṣātum arhasi vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca tasyai mantra varam śreṣṭham dadau sa vidhinā guruḥ nāmnām sahasram viṣṇoḥ ca proktavān muni sattamaḥ nivedayitvā pūjāyāḥ vidhānam api deśikaḥ uvāca parama prītyā pārvatīm saṃśita vratām vāmadevaḥ uvāca arcayitvā hṛṣīkeśam prātar nityam varānane vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca dvatī uktā tena guruṇā prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā pūjayitvā namaskṛtya punar āyāt svam ālayam śikṣitā guruṇā tena vāmadevena pārvatī tatas katipaya ahar tu dvādaśyām vṛṣabha dhvajaḥ kailāsa śikhare ramye viṣṇum ārādhya śaṅkaraḥ upaviṣṭaḥ tatas bhoktum pārvatīm śaṅkaraḥ abravīt śaṅkaraḥ uvāca vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca tam āha pārvatī devī japtvā nāma sahasrakam tatas tām pārvatīm prāha prahasan parameśvaraḥ śaṅkaraḥ uvāca dhanyā asi kṛtakṛtyā asi viṣṇu bhaktā asi pārvati durlabhā vaiṣṇavī bhaktiḥ bhāga dheyam vinā īśvari rakāra ādīni nāmāni śṛṇvataḥ mama pārvati manaḥ prasanna tām yāti rāma nāma abhiśaṅkayā rāma iti uktvā mahā devi bhuṅkṣva sārdham mayā adhunā vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca tatas rāma iti nāma uktvā saha bhuṅktvā atha pārvatī rāma iti uktā mahā devī śambhunā saha saṃsthitā papraccha śaṅkaram devam prīti praṇava mānasā pārvatī uvāca tasya aparāṇi nāmāni santi ced rāvaṇa dviṣaḥ śrī mahā devaḥ uvāca śṛṇu nāmāni vakṣyāmi rāmacandrasya pārvati laukikāḥ vaidikāḥ śabdāḥ ye kecid santi pārvati nāmāni rāmacandrasya sahasram teṣu ca adhikam teṣu ca atyanta mukhyam hi nāmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam tādṛś nāma sahasrāṇi rāma nāma samāni ca yat phalam sarva vedānām mantrāṇām japataḥ priye tat phalam koṭi guṇitam rāma nāmnā eva labhyate nāmāni śṛṇu rāmasya mukhyāni śubha darśane ṛṣibhiḥ parigītāni tāni vakṣyāmi te priye aum śrī rāmaḥ rāmacandraḥ ca rāmabhadraḥ ca śāśvataḥ sapta tāla prabhettā ca harakaḥ daṇḍa khaṇḍanaḥ jāmadagni mahā darpa dalanaḥ tāḍakā anta kṛt ca tri mūrtiḥ tri guṇaḥ trayī ṛkṣa vānara saṅghātī citrakūṭa samāśrayaḥ jayam tatrāṇa vara daḥ sumitrā putra sevitaḥ māyā mārīca hantā ca mahā bhāgaḥ mahā bhujaḥ sarva puṇya adhika phalaḥ smṛtaḥ sarva agha nāśanaḥ ādi puruṣaḥ mahā puruṣaḥ paramaḥ puruṣaḥ tathā smita vaktraḥ mita bhāṣī pūrva bhāṣī ca rāghavaḥ māyā mānuṣa cāritraḥ mahā deva adhipūjitaḥ śyāma aṅgaḥ sundaraḥ śūraḥ pīta vāsāḥ dhanuḥ dharaḥ sarva yajṣa adhipaḥ yajṣaḥ jarā maraṇa varjitaḥ param jyotiḥ param dhāma para ākāśaḥ parāt paraḥ iti śrī rāmacandrasya nāmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt vā api bhakti yuktena cetasā jalāni sthala tām yānti śatravaḥ yānti mitra tām rājānaḥ dāsa tām yānti vahnayaḥ yānti saumya tām ānukūlyam ca bhūtāni sthairyam yānti calāḥ śriyaḥ anugraham grahāḥ yānti śāntim āyānti upadravāḥ yam yam kāmam prakurute tam tam āpnoti kīrtanāt kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca vaikuṇṭhe modate nityam daśa pūrvaiḥ daśa aparaiḥ rāmam dūrvā dala śyāmam padma akṣam pīta vāsasam rāmāya rāma bhadrāya rāmacandrāya vedhase raghu nāthāya nāthāya sītāyāḥ pataye namaḥ sarva pāpa vinirmuktaḥ viṣṇu sāyujyam āpnuyāt kathitam vai mayā subhrūḥ tava prītyā śubha āhvayam vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca tat śrutvā śaṅkareṇa uktam māhātmyam parama ātmanaḥ praharṣam atulam lebhe ānanda aśru jala āplutā praṇamya prāha deveśam bhartāram vṛṣabhadhvajam pārvatī uvāca aho māhātmyam atulam rāmasya paramātmanaḥ dhanyā aham kṛtakṛtyā asmi sarvam uktam tvayā anagha vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca evam uktvā sva bhartāram gaurī bhāgavata uttamā rāmāya rāmabhadrāya rāmacandrāya vedhase raghunāthāya nāthāya sītāyāḥ pataye namaḥ etat te sarvam ākhyātam guhyāt guhyatamam nṛpa rudra proktāni śāstrāṇi tāmasāni eva pārthiva sam mohana artham lokānām proktavān vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ devyā prītyai mahādevaḥ kathayāmāsa tatparaḥ umā maheśvaram rājan sam vādam imam adbhutam yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt vā api bhakti yuktena cetasā tvad anvaye hariḥ śrīmān purāṇaḥ puruṣottamaḥ tasmāt ikṣvākavaḥ pūjyāḥ surāṇām api pārthiva yeṣām jātaḥ hi bhagavān rāmaḥ rājīva locanaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣcapacāśat sāhasryām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde rāmacandra aṣṭottaraśata nāmakathanam nāma catuḥ paṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ paṣcapaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dilīpaḥ uvāca sāmānyam ca viśiṣṭam ca svarūpam para jīvayoḥ dhanyaḥ asmi aham dvijaśreṣṭha tvad prasādāt sadā guro ekam anyam dvijaśreṣṭha pṛcchāmi tvām kutūhalāt kasmāt vigarhitam rūpam prāptavān sahabhāryyayā yoni liṅga svarūpaḥ ca katham syāt su mahātmanaḥ paṣcavaktraḥ caturbāhuḥ śūlapāṇiḥ trilocanaḥ katham vigarhitam rūpam prāptavān dvija puṅgava evam sarvam samācakṣva amitrāvaruṇa nandana vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājan pravakṣyāmi iyat mām pṛcchasi gauravāt sām buddhiḥ śreyasi jāyate tasmin samāgatāḥ sarve munayaḥ śam sita vratāḥ nānā śāstra vidaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ bāla sūrya anala prabhāḥ sarva veda vidaḥ viprāḥ sarva dharma parāyaṇāḥ vartamāne mahā satre munayaḥ kṣīṇa kalmaṣāḥ anveṣṭum devatāta tvam mithas procuḥ tapodhanāḥ viprāṇām veda viduṣām kaḥ brahma viṣṇu maheśānām kaḥ kasya pāda udakam sevyam bhukta ucchiṣṭam ca pāvanam kaḥ avyayaḥ paramam dhāma parama ātmā asanātanaḥ kasya prasādam tīrtham ca pitṝṇām tṛpti dam bhavet teṣām samupaviṣṭānām itivādaḥ mahān abhūt sūryaḥ eva ātmanām pūjyaḥ iti anye prāhuḥ uttamāḥ yaḥ asau sarva gataḥ śrīmān śrīpatiḥ puruṣottamaḥ avyayaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ vāsudevaḥ parātparaḥ an ādi nidhanaḥ viṣṇuḥ saḥ eva parameśvaraḥ sampūjyaḥ devatā śreṣṭhaḥ eti anye cocire dvijāḥ teṣām vivadatām tatra manuḥ svāyam bhuvaḥ abravīt puṇḍarīkekṣaṇaḥ śrīmān śrīpatiḥ puruṣottamaḥ viprāṇām veda viduṣām ekaḥ eva arcitaḥ prabhuḥ viprāṇām na itare pūjya a rajaḥ tama vimiśritāḥ bhṛgum tapaḥ nidhim vipram procuḥ prāṣjalayaḥ tathā ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ asmākam saṃśayam chettum tvam samarthaḥ asi suvrata brahma viṣṇu maheśānām anti kam braja suvrata gatvā teṣām samīpam tu tathā dṛṣṭvā tu vigrahān śuddha satva guṇam teṣām yasmin sam vidyate mune saḥ eva pūjyaḥ viprāṇām na itaraḥ tu kadācana śuddha satva mayaḥ sākṣāt brahmaṇyaḥ sabhaviṣyati tīrtha prasādavān loke viprāṇām sabhaviṣyati devatānām pitṝṇām su pāvanam tasmāt yā ahi muni śreṣṭha vibudhānām nivāsanam evam uktaḥ tatas tūrṇam kailāsam muni sattamaḥ jagāma vāmadevena yatra āste vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ gṛha dvāram upāgamya śaṅkarasya mahātmanaḥ śūla hastam mahā raudram naṃ dim ddaṣṭvā bravīt dvijaḥ samprāptaḥ aham bhṛguḥ vipraḥ haram draṣṭum surottamam nivedayasva amām śīghram śaṅkarāya mahātmane tasya tat vacanam śrutvānam uvāca paruṣam vākyam mahā ṛṣim amita ojasam nidhyam prabhoḥ tasya devyā ākrīḍati śaṅkaraḥ evam nirākṛtaḥ tena tatra atiṣṭhat mahā tapāḥ yasmin gṛha dvāri maheśituḥ brāhmaṇam mā avajānātitamasāsam upāgataḥ tasmāt annam jalam puṣpam tasmai dattam haviḥ tathā evam śaptvā a mahā tejāḥ śaṅkaram loka pūjitam uvāca gaṇam ati ugram naṃ diṃ śūla dharam nṛpa rudra bhaktāḥ caye loke bhasma liṅga asthi dhāriṇaḥ tepa akhaṇḍa tvam āpannā a veda bāhyā bhavam tu vai tatra daivaiḥ saha āsīnam brahmāṇam parameṣṭhinam dṛṣṭvā prāṣjalinā devam praṇanāma mahāmatiḥ praṇamya puratas tasya tūṣṇīm āsa mahā tapāḥ tam dṛṣṭvā muni śārdūlam rajaḥ guṇa samābṛtaḥ na arcayāmāsa dhātā asau mahā ṛṣim samupāgatam pratyutthānam priyam vākyam na kṛtam tasya vedhasā śvaryeṇa eva mahatā ātasthau tatrām bujāsanaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā arajasā udriktam mahā ṛṣiḥ paṅkajāsanam vyājahāra mahā tejāḥ vākyam lokapitāmahaḥ tasmāt tvam sarva lokānām apūjya tvam samāpnuhi evam śaptvā a mahātmānam brahmāṇam loka pūjitam praviśya vaiṣṇavam lokam kṣīrābdheḥ uttare taṭe tatra sthitaiḥ mahābhāgaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ yathā rhataḥ tatra anivāryamāṇaḥ tu praviṣṭa om taḥ puram dvijaḥ śayānam kedadarśa kamalāpatim lakṣmī kara sarojābhyām mṛjyamāna pada dvayam tam dṛṣṭvā muni śārdūlaḥ bhṛguḥ kopa samanvitaḥ savyam pādam pracikṣepa viṣṇoḥ vakṣasi śobhane hastābhyām caraṇam tasya pīḍayāmāsa harṣitaḥ śanais mṛditvā atas pādam madhuram vākyam abravīt apāra saṃsāra samudra setavaḥ punar tu mām brāhmaṇa pādapām savaḥ gaṅgā ādi sarva tīrthāni tasya tiṣṭham ti asaṃśayam iti uktvā sahasā utthāya devyā sārdham janārdanaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā muni śārdūlaḥ harṣa pūrṇaḥ aśru locanaḥ utthāya āsana mukhyāt tam praṇanāma dayā nidhim kṛtām jali puṭaḥ bhūtvā harṣāt prāha mahā tapāḥ śrī bhṛguḥ uvāca ahorūpa mahośānti rahojñāna mahodayā aho su nirmala akṣām hareḥ naisargikam śubham satvam tathā eva guṇa vāridheḥ na anyeṣām vidyate kim cit sarveṣām tridivaukasām brahmaṇyaḥ ca śaraṇyaḥ ca tvam eva puruṣottamaḥ brāhmaṇānām tvam eva īśaḥ na anyaḥ pūjyaḥ suraḥ kvacid ye arcayanti surān anyān tvām vinā puruṣottama tepā akhaṇḍa tvam āpannāḥ sarva loka vigarhitāḥ viprāṇām veda viduṣām tvam eva ijyaḥ janārdanaḥ na anyaḥ kaścid surāṇām tu pūjanīyaḥ kadācana an arcya a brahma rudra ādya a rajaḥ tamaḥ vimiśritāḥ tvam śuddha satva guṇavān pūjanīyaḥ agrajanmanām tvad pāda salilam sevyam pitṝṇām ca divaukasām sarveṣām bhūsurāṇām camukti dam kalmaṣa apaham tvad bhukta ucchiṣṭa śeṣam vai pitṝṇām ca divaukasām bhūsurāṇām ca sevyam syāt na anyeṣām tu kadācana itareṣām tu devānām annam puṣpam jalam tathā aspṛśyam tu bhavet sarvam nirmālyam surayā asamam tasmāt u nityam pūjayitvā asanātanam tvad tīrtham bhuktam annam ca bhajeta eva aniśam budhaḥ na anyam devam tu vīkṣeta brāhmaṇān a ca pūjayet na anya prasādam bhum viśet pitṝṇām śrāddha karmaṇi kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca devatānām pitṝṇām ca tṛptiḥ ānam tyam aśnute tasmāt tvam eva viprāṇām pūjyaḥ na anyaḥ ustikaḥ cana mohāt yaḥ pūjayet anyān sapākhaṇḍībhaviṣyati tvam hi nārāyaṇaḥ śrīmān vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ viṣṇuḥ sarva gataḥ nityaḥ paramātmā amaheśvaraḥ brahmaṇyaḥ śuddha satvavān pūjya tvāt brāhmaṇānām vaiśuddha satva guṇāt api sarveṣām eva devānām brāhmaṇa tvam avāpnuhi tatra na saṃśayaḥ brahmaṇyaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ brahmaṇyaḥ viṣṇuḥ acyutaḥ brahmaṇyaḥ bhagavān kṛṣṇaḥ vāsudevaḥ acyutaḥ hariḥ brahmaṇyaḥ nārasim haḥ syāt tathā nārāyaṇaḥ avyayaḥ brahmaṇyaḥ śrīdharaḥ śrīśaḥ govindaḥ vāmanaḥ tathā brahmaṇyaḥ rāghavaḥ śrīmān rāmaḥ rājīva locanaḥ brahmaṇyaḥ padmanābhaḥ syāt tathā dāmodaraḥ prabhuḥ brahmaṇyaḥ ca hṛṣīkeśaḥ pīta vāsāḥ janārdanaḥ namaḥ brahmaṇya devāya vāsudevāya śārṅgiṇe nārāyaṇāya śrīśāya puṇḍarīkekṣaṇāya ca namaḥ brahmaṇya devāya vāsudevāya viṣṇave kalyāṇa guṇa pūrṇāya namaḥ te paramātmane vārāha vapuṣe nityam trayī nāthāya te namaḥ namaḥ brahmaṇya devāya nāga paryaṅka śāyine rājīva dala netrāya rāghavāya namaḥ namaḥ māyayā a mohitāḥ sarve devāḥ ca ṛṣayaḥ tava na jānanti mahātmānam sarva loka īśvaram prabho nāma rūpa guṇaiḥ śrīśa cāritraiḥ api duṣkṛtaiḥ paratva sūcakam sattvam tava veditum īśvaraḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ preṣitaḥ aham āgataḥ asmi tavān tikam caraṇam mama keśava dattam vakṣasi govinda tatkṣam tavyam kṛpā nidhe punar jagāma hṛṣṭa ātmā yajṣa bhūmim śubha āhvayām samāgatam mahātmānam tatra dṛṣṭvā a mahā ṛṣayaḥ pratyutthāya namaskṛtvā apūjām cakruḥ vidhānataḥ teṣām vijṣāpayāmāsa tat sarvam muni puṅgavaḥ śapta aumayānapūjya utauviprāṇām ṛṣi sattamāḥ śaptaḥ kailāsa śikhare śaṅkaraḥ tamasā āvṛtaḥ śuddha satva mayaḥ viṣṇuḥ kalyāṇa guṇa sāgaraḥ nārāyaṇaḥ param brahma viprāṇām daivatam hariḥ brahmaṇyaḥ śrīpatiḥ viṣṇuḥ vāsudevaḥ janārdanaḥ brahmaṇyaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ govindaḥ hariḥ acyutaḥ saḥ eva pūjyaḥ viprāṇām na itaraḥ puruṣa ṛṣabhāḥ mohāt yaḥ pūjayet anyam sapākhaṇḍībhaviṣyati smaraṇāt devakṛṣṇasya vimuktiḥ pāpinām api tasya pāda udakam sevyam bhukta ucchiṣṭam ca pāvanam svarga apavarga dam nṝṇām brāhmaṇānām viśeṣataḥ yaḥ na dadyāt hareḥ bhuktam pitṝṇām śrāddha karmaṇi aśnanti pitaraḥ tasya viṣ mūtram satatam dvijāḥ itareṣām tu devānām nirmālyam garhitam bhavet sakṛt eva hiyaḥ uśnāti brāhmaṇaḥ jñāna durbalaḥ nirmālyam bho dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ rudra ādīnām divaukasām rakṣaḥ yakṣa piśāca annam sa samam smṛtam tat brāhmaṇaiḥ na bhoktavyam devānām jitam haviḥ pūjayadhvam dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ yāvajjīvam atandritāḥ tat viṣṇoḥ paramam dhāma anyantaḥ gatasam śayāḥ tāpa ādi paṣca sam skāraiḥ anviṣṭāḥ śubha cetasaḥ aprākṛtam harim samyak arcayadhvam dvijarṣabhāḥ śubhāḥ cakra lāṣchana hīnāḥ tu prākṛtāḥ tāmasāḥ smṛtāḥ tasmāt prākṛta sam sarga pāpa ogha dahanam hareḥ prataptam bibhṛyāt cakram śaṅkham ca bhuja mūlayoḥ urddhva puṇḍra aṇicām geṣu dhṛtvā śāstra ukta mārgataḥ tasya āvaraṇa pūjāyām tridaśān arcayet sadā tam eva sarva yajṣānām bhoktāram parameśvaram dvijāḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca evam uktāḥ tu te sarve ṛṣayaḥ kṣīṇa kalmaṣāḥ namaskṛtya bhṛgum samyak ūcuḥ prāṣjalayaḥ tadā ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ tvad prasādāt vayam viprabhaviṣyāmaḥ śivān yathā vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca evam stutvā abhṛgum vipram sarva eva mahā ṛṣayaḥ rāghavaḥ sarva devānām pāvanaḥ puruṣottamaḥ spṛṣṭa adṛṣṭāḥ ca tena eva vimalāḥ śaṅkara ādayaḥ sarveṣām api devānām pitā mātā janārdanaḥ etat te sarvam ākhyātam purāṇam vedasam mitam brahmaṇā a kathitam rājan manu svāyam bhuvaḥ om tare tasya sam śrāvayet nityam kathā śaṅkha cakra ūrddhva puṇḍra ādi vihita uvācakaḥ pumān tad mukhāt śrūyatām nityam putrī bhava sinān yathā yaḥ tu idam śrāvayet nityam paṭhet vāsu samāhitaḥ ananya bhaktiḥ śrīśasya jāyate tasya sarvadā vidyā arthī labhate vidyām dharma arthī dharmam āpnuyāt mokṣa arthī labhate mokṣam kāma arthī labhate sukham dvādaśyām śravaṇa arka icasam krāntau grahaṇe tathā amāvasyām paurṇamāsyām paṭhet bhakti samanvitaḥ śloka arddham śloka pādam vā a paṭhet yaḥ tu samāhitaḥ iti etat kathitam guhyam purāṇam sam hita ātmakam arcayasva hṛṣīkeśam yadi icchasi paramam padam sūtaḥ uvāca evam uktaḥ vasiṣṭhena guruṇā nṛpa sattamaḥ rājā āpūjayitvā yathā arcayitvā a hṛṣīkeśam yāvajjīvam atandritaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasryām sam vaiyāsikyām m uttara khaṇḍe bhṛguparīkṣākathanam nāma paṣcapaṣcāśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe ṣaṣṭham uttarakhaṇḍam samāptam puruṣottama māhātmyam atha śrī pādme mahā purāṇe saptamam kriyā khaṇḍam prārabhyate śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ atha kriyā yoga sāra khaṇḍam ārabhyate śreṇī namra śiraḥ lirolimā amalam vandāmahe santatam bhaktyā yogi manaḥ taḍāga suṣamā sandoha puṣyattamam yaḥ mūrtīḥ bahudhā vidhāya bhagavān rakṣan aśeṣam jagat purāṇeṣu jagāda devaḥ vyāsa svarūpeṇa jagat hitāya su ramye naimiṣa araṇye goṣṭhīm cakruḥ manoramām tatra antare mahā tejāḥ vyāsa śiṣyaḥ mahā yaśāḥ sūtaḥ śiṣya gaṇaiḥ yuktaḥ samāyātaḥ harim smaran tam āyāntam samālokya sūtam śāstra artha pāragam nemuḥ sarve samutthāya śaunaka ādyāḥ tapodhanāḥ saḥ api tān sahasā abhaktyā munīn parama vaiṣṇavān nanāma daṇḍa vat bhūmau sarva dharma vidām varaḥ uvāsaha muniḥ madhye sarvaiḥ śiṣya gaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ tatra upaviṣṭam tam sūtam śaunakaḥ muni sattamaḥ baddha aṣjaliḥ imām vācam uvāca vinaya anvitaḥ śaunakaḥ uvāca veda vidyā vihīnāḥ ca teṣām śreyaḥ katham bhavet prāṇa ālokāḥ su alpa āyuṣaḥ tathā niḥ dhanāḥ ca
